name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Peter, Gov Whitmer is in trouble. Again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
Have you seen the poll? 78% disapprove of Governor Whitmer’s handling of the Benton Harbor water catastrophe. | | | |
---
| | |
#### Have you seen the latest poll?
## 78% disapprove of Governor Whitmer’s handling of the Benton Harbor water catastrophe.
_The Marketing Resource Group (MRG) polled 600 Michigan voters between October 18-24._
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| 78% disapprove! That's a huge number and spells big trouble for "Big Gretch."

Peter, for two years Whitmer knew of the dangerous water conditions in Benton Harbor and she did nothing. She did not warn Benton Harbor residents about dangerous lead in their drinking water. She still hasn’t.

I’ve been at the forefront of this issue. I’ve written about it, and I’ve taken action where I could.

You can read my editorial here: [Passing the buck in Benton Harbor](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=b579dacd5f&e=0636b97700)

Just yesterday, I volunteered at the Abundant Life Church to distribute water for the citizens in Benton Harbor. I like getting my hands dirty and working so it was a pleasure to work with all the young men and women of Benton Harbor that were volunteering.
---
|
---
---
| **This water catastrophe is just that, a catastrophe. And it didn’t need to happen._Gretchen Whitmer must be held accountable_.**

Sitting in long lines waiting for cases of bottled water is no way to live for any community in the State of Michigan.

Every citizen in the state has my commitment that the entire government and the State of Michigan will be focused and will execute their respective duties. We’re not going to drop the ball like the Whitmer administration.

This should have never occurred and now this community will be playing catch-up for several years. And no one knows the long-term health ramifications.

**Help me defeat Gretchen Whitmer.** _Let’s put real, conservative leadership in charge and kick out the radical democrats who are ruining our great state_.

Please take a minute and make a donation to my campaign. Any amount will help.

**Can you spare $10 or $20? How about $50 or $100?**
---
|
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=fe2f08a1eb&e=0636b97700 "DONATE TODAY")
---
| __**It’s time to Dump Whitmer.**__ But I need your help now.

Please make a donation today. You won’t regret it.

Thank you.

Michael Brown
_Candidate for Governor_

PS – our "Dump Whitmer" yard signs are available now in our campaign store. Check them out.
---
| [ ](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=7127d51aa6&e=0636b97700)

Peter, for two years Whitmer knew of the dangerous water conditions in Benton Harbor and she did nothing. She did not warn Benton Harbor residents about dangerous lead in their drinking water. She still hasn’t. I’ve been at the forefront of this issue. I’ve written about it, and I’ve taken action where I could. You can read my editorial here: Just yesterday, I volunteered at the Abundant Life Church to distribute water for the citizens in Benton Harbor. I like getting my hands dirty and working so it was a pleasure to work with all the young men and women of Benton Harbor that were volunteering. | | This water catastrophe is just that, a catastrophe. And it didn’t need to happen.Gretchen Whitmer must be held accountable. Sitting in long lines waiting for cases of bottled water is no way to live for any community in the State of Michigan. Every citizen in the state has my commitment that the entire government and the State of Michigan will be focused and will execute their respective duties. We’re not going to drop the ball like the Whitmer administration. This should have never occurred and now this community will be playing catch-up for several years. And no one knows the long-term health ramifications. Help me defeat Gretchen Whitmer. Let’s put real, conservative leadership in charge and kick out the radical democrats who are ruining our great state. Please take a minute and make a donation to my campaign. Any amount will help. Can you spare $10 or $20? How about $50 or $100? | | "DONATE TODAY" | It’s time to Dump Whitmer. But I need your help now. Please make a donation today. You won’t regret it. Thank you. Michael Brown Candidate for Governor PS – our "Dump Whitmer" yard signs are available now in our campaign store. October 26th, 2021
## Walz & Pawlenty Get Booster
The Political Class continues its propaganda campaign to make sure YOU get vaccinated with a product from their biggest supporters - Big Pharma. Governor Walz and former Republican Governor Tim Pawlenty [united today, rolled up their sleeves](https://www.action4liberty.com/walz_and_pawlenty_team_up_to_con_you_into_getting_booster?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_and_pawlenty_get_booster&n=2) and got the booster jab. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/walz_and_pawlenty_team_up_to_con_you_into_getting_booster?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_and_pawlenty_get_booster&n=3) Nothing could make puppy-killing-doctor Fauci more excited than to have members of both political parties unite to con us all into getting the vaccine. Ya know, a "vaccine" so good that you need to get endless boosters while still being able to catch and spread the disease. **How do you know these guys are lying? Because they've completely thrown out all knowledge and understanding we have of the effectiveness of natural immunity! They still want you to roll up your sleeve!!!** While the political elites are doing everything in their power to manipulate and control all of us, thousands of patriots marched on the Capitol and Governor's mansion to protest the Walz and Biden Mandates. Shout out to Mark Bishofsky for an excellent job organizing another major medical freedom event. Don't expect to see any coverage from the corporate media though - they would prefer the public doesn't know it ever took place. Thanks to our field team, we are able to share pictures and videos of the event for those who were unable to attend. [**Click here**](https://www.action4liberty.com/media_silent_as_thousands_protest_biden_walz_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_and_pawlenty_get_booster&n=4). **Jake Duesenberg** **Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_and_pawlenty_get_booster&n=5 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_and_pawlenty_get_booster&n=5)

Please read the message below from our sponsor, 4Patriots.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

|
# Outrage Over Survival Food
According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life – depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished...

Well, I decided not to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://mgemail.americanpatriotdaily.net/c/eJxtkcuOpSAARL_muiS8wYWL6en0fwDiFRTkCqj49WPvJ6ll5SR1ahz0RAmWnRswxAhBLCBEPWIAAdl_QfxN-i_O2d8_Er4oVMHuzqiYVNndVkbl1gaiLd08iBFqqZXSRlooubBSY4ZYTy23hBHVhYH0D5_jvluHuZT0In9e-OdJ2ZVZwH_ZZgu_HfJzlfVFvsOReV3Gs1Kycd_YejceA_dupWdMGi43TG2KM5lqo3XxBJdDKk7o3S9OJZHuw7Y3kZ7b_V3hMZU1XfqSduQG3lP2Zr7MVpd0wpo_WYue0UliNqNKsYqNVJFni1mp8tp4iHNKvcYLv67V-LSFZuZbsg_KCLey2yJjzdAVJpHFe_ZCZliF19OnRb_we3vHDL2dVivOS242BmLQAS-bWRzVZIy-wrm5fld7GRn9JDwuqjXNV-80C_CQU35hbt38uFnuIGMunqc9eKHnW2R_HLHljyBaveduH8Z0unV1mYvny3d4DP8K7spwgR0FCCFApE8gVBXdDUKpuBowe5YxBOyGioJJ0JGAZ9U_io3Aig). Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a **fraction of what some other brands charge**.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a **shelf life of up to 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they **taste as good or better than any other survival food I've ever had**. And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through any short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of their top-rated items on their website. So you'll get those 2 complimentary 72-hour Survival Food Kits AND... _(Hold on to your hat, folks)_ **FREE Bonus #3, 4, 5 and 6:** They're also going to give you their **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... name: John Castorani
subject: Destroying the bastards was my mission

body:
For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=471c73dde0a042c3b5be7c380d265789&_t=lZgxeGqhR5K7KUEuwRVf2U8dQ9WWaXMeDxd4GItlJvtJVw47YMo8Wk1YOuz_fzluuBdBGuaZzZl1m3Jgbzfkeln14nfQMkuixRjOisduU1NqzUVkp14mBOtxmFHUz0UID6yj5I83E0EDvvk2aCQCtODJqECoEV-QcLATlVxg2Mc%3D) | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=471c73dde0a042c3b5be7c380d265789&_e=Z6_VFNSZz2aki-b8hO_0N8TbxDLYsBqWCBjG6aAYa3OXOmZqYFHA_ZcnGtJ1M_eaw1q-Y11hiA7sS6Mc0XBu8v5btGO2cGZQxMrzHrQll51rDizy-iBuUGs4EylQzHtkLmg5RGuA_axiJa_banhxx0uuy2sjviJMGu8fcnGH5kQXjssp2Qnl8zqBgPPLPowq2hxZb_G4J3XlbVlX-wX9Hj6xIbgk1ICPuKRgb6REm9eyCIuoVVsJ6Vbvpd8XaUCa82JWylrsz7xxY8zlUqQK4RfdKw522eo_20hjPSM3bZpipn7slHmvIIK7jk8EWUPDUHB1n-iUI4AhtnlxkoWyz1-DhDt1iHlJbnBbw8n9-mYNYgGgY5vomRBTdJ1niSihedmfppGY4X7yQqyDnfNnRQ2FckjtCgUHjwCzw96aSmc2QD2RBRsh5Bl4Njt0ujXcwv-F1VLr6iCImh6C4falfEX95ldIqRpcnMZNXIevgoBTD5tdohOee81-NpjfJQrR)
---

Peter,

My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox **I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today.**

I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.**I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own**.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=471c73dde0a042c3b5be7c380d265789&_e=Z6_VFNSZz2aki-b8hO_0N8TbxDLYsBqWCBjG6aAYa3OXOmZqYFHA_ZcnGtJ1M_eaw1q-Y11hiA7sS6Mc0XBu8v5btGO2cGZQxMrzHrQll51rDizy-iBuUGs4EylQzHtkLmg5RGuA_axiJa_banhxx0uuy2sjviJMGu8fcnGH5kQXjssp2Qnl8zqBgPPLPowq2hxZb_G4J3XlbVlX-wX9Hj6xIbgk1ICPuKRgb6REm9eyCIuoVVsJ6Vbvpd8XaUCa82JWylrsz7xxY8zlUqQK4RfdKw522eo_20hjPSM3bZqvkCD_21B2dGOTURiv3B_LsMpglhF0h48sAFcLYOpIs8rejMK_Nzq1hWZhKEe22fGc169xM4cRQ7i92YhoaOO62FlZT87Ic30MYGmByD5wc1v2_d0X2-Y_2sN_88j_phBZinQQfi5UijY0eF1L96qfTF3sqvD7hcq6etT1i8EvQ-MhuC8fWzR6gQXUovKr2rRlNa2R7JQlxzP6xcpEl005)

Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency **[I gave up my career in the intelligence service- along with my security clearance - to run for Congress](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=471c73dde0a042c3b5be7c380d265789&_e=Z6_VFNSZz2aki-b8hO_0N8TbxDLYsBqWCBjG6aAYa3OXOmZqYFHA_ZcnGtJ1M_eaw1q-Y11hiA7sS6Mc0XBu8v5btGO2cGZQxMrzHrQll51rDizy-iBuUGs4EylQzHtkLmg5RGuA_axiJa_banhxx0uuy2sjviJMGu8fcnGH5kQXjssp2Qnl8zqBgPPLPowq2hxZb_G4J3XlbVlX-wX9Hj6xIbgk1ICPuKRgb6REm9eyCIuoVVsJ6Vbvpd8XaUCa82JWylrsz7xxY8zlUqQK4RfdKw522eo_20hjPSM3bZrwzrdZNmMEn17Ih2hLgSqzMy3ACq2Wwx8QIXA6l789ulcl5o1JtuJRVIG53NVXyldmH-LjNm-H9ZPVwiAkrhYxWoD1h0hQXAcRLHMsnDJWpbgi6GiTIY16OZnuwYXvjDC5M7nU2dP4f_cd2jxTzMl7w9jZ2wyaoUppNe-6N1wBbH7jPHiB3Efyabdfp0QA00Y1ue_J5rbPaHZ82Wzpkif3)**. I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price.

If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.**As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable** , and in a moment, [**I’m going to humbly ask for your financial assistance regarding my campaign.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=471c73dde0a042c3b5be7c380d265789&_e=Z6_VFNSZz2aki-b8hO_0N8TbxDLYsBqWCBjG6aAYa3OXOmZqYFHA_ZcnGtJ1M_eaw1q-Y11hiA7sS6Mc0XBu8v5btGO2cGZQxMrzHrQll51rDizy-iBuUGs4EylQzHtkLmg5RGuA_axiJa_banhxx0uuy2sjviJMGu8fcnGH5kQXjssp2Qnl8zqBgPPLPowq2hxZb_G4J3XlbVlX-wX9Hj6xIbgk1ICPuKRgb6REm9eyCIuoVVsJ6Vbvpd8XaUCa82JWylrsz7xxY8zlUqQK4RfdKw522eo_20hjPSM3bZo7t71qxBiXX2LD5f8pCheLcDpzt9Hjk0AKkYg-axzsqNEWa_Nv6MNcFEMS82nlpvga6n1qSy3A4fH8_QUg7p3cyulaZsHOWsy4WIP30JayhmoBA1Sz150VGLjtVQWdZkRTVCiJC64e-IVgz3u0Oge_XyLmxKljhCuuztH8xBWAh-zCjin4g2lYJrgwRiSMU1X96X4wAX27g_4HImqyJhfq)

You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, _**who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades**_ - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel.

**This political assassination made my blood boil**. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. _**We have to fight for it**_.

| [**HELP ME FIGHT FOR _YOU_
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=471c73dde0a042c3b5be7c380d265789&_e=Z6_VFNSZz2aki-b8hO_0N8TbxDLYsBqWCBjG6aAYa3OXOmZqYFHA_ZcnGtJ1M_eaw1q-Y11hiA7sS6Mc0XBu8v5btGO2cGZQxMrzHrQll51rDizy-iBuUGs4EylQzHtkLmg5RGuA_axiJa_banhxx0uuy2sjviJMGu8fcnGH5kQXjssp2Qnl8zqBgPPLPowq2hxZb_G4J3XlbVlX-wX9Hj6xIbgk1ICPuKRgb6REm9eyCIuoVVsJ6Vbvpd8XaUCa82JWylrsz7xxY8zlUqQK4RfdKw522eo_20hjPSM3bZrT6Y9GT2mQttwVXGWkjApM-JVFw6rwQDZvkKlunbSRl0e3wdNgWP0h17R4nkye6BUTfUf34RxikR5jmA3vktvvHhPTzAG8Oq3XEAi7X0AjrLipAHYZoDTUUwa-JtDYkNKORcL9SnseOM2ZDpK1batqDqWZffLgOE3GDpBbLWCqSRj0M1Mu5pl0blcVqSOjy3a_bTpq2CzuVQRgqak_VU_o)
---

Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason **[I’m running for Congress, and today I’m asking if you’ll chip-in $5 or $10 to help me get my campaign off the ground.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=471c73dde0a042c3b5be7c380d265789&_e=Z6_VFNSZz2aki-b8hO_0N8TbxDLYsBqWCBjG6aAYa3OXOmZqYFHA_ZcnGtJ1M_eaw1q-Y11hiA7sS6Mc0XBu8v5btGO2cGZQxMrzHrQll51rDizy-iBuUGs4EylQzHtkLmg5RGuA_axiJa_banhxx0uuy2sjviJMGu8fcnGH5kQXjssp2Qnl8zqBgPPLPowq2hxZb_G4J3XlbVlX-wX9Hj6xIbgk1ICPuKRgb6REm9eyCIuoVVsJ6Vbvpd8XaUCa82JWylrsz7xxY8zlUqQK4RfdKw522eo_20hjPSM3bZomULpjhAPrX9uhG9rg_14O4QDv4r0OSeTBsJS2CE-SMOrI8yJvQdXfNuOuWDa8aJ8LtiOMHwfVRJ7d-jSMJev4qiP20Rp4JARuB-gLCvIrfKSLVKyVN8s1POR-Sjd-aHFAnK8hXfRXu2WGxkMzjEhe8i_qTNZT9z0IIH3MkzglnEvMaI0rwspAjzLinFy_cXS18vS2T9BckSa4stO8rKLu) **

clean_body: For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? | Peter, My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today. I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own. Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency . I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price. If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable , and in a moment, You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel. This political assassination made my blood boil. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. We have to fight for it. | Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason At the time of the Benghazi attacks, Hillary Clinton knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were pre-meditated by an al-Qaeda ally. . We are almost there folks, We are approaching the last week in October, and that means that there is a little over a week till the election. | | | [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=4f0caf8413de4d628580dbe42e32231a&_e=eDFRlVIS-kQOqKPmrmSCtl6R6zV53R_hzWDTO4Hf_LjmoJhhrqXnCdrGCw-Tehg2tna-saybj6pfFs2nZc3TfdgCR72PeaiWGmG4T1TFZXD1IhvvrwDSeEjbVXrafSCX63A59gI46nj_PcSXGwXddse30SPxeCmRbEZh_dmjwhPHonNwY53BQ9EIhROM0NbrHAKDcx7o8YZZtrZ1z5eBG-NK-rjTb-0QE-2EWe6hTin1b2ftoLof3nXFW4zqjoG0lDpK6uMq76QdnNhzf0FfO93Ds_shrIeMqzqoLFf5uZ6v30ZtdIluOd6hUjHQOzuX7OVzbKdYlyHRZifAQKh-mzLQPcfZYMZ-9K8H9GXaHhPAiwSU5PXlI54ShiPfwnXLhFenD98X0eKHBElroJNUpePCvwnHPcCPlXBaJyhFlw2acfSiOgtg0s5yMdbxeFfizzs0CENafyPlQkQe5EM6L-B87PpyBP1phakSpYox5ok%3D) We are almost there folks, We have one week until the election. **[As we enter this critical period, I wanted to tell you a little bit about why I am still the best candidate for the job but before I get into it, will you chip in one more donation before October ends?](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=4f0caf8413de4d628580dbe42e32231a&_e=HpDgk0gA_3-n0hOHxgxuwGRVW2C4_FA_ggeYCEITCOohIRr5IBmAOb_6JlitUnCZeUXQ06EgJIc8n00LNwk-tmjPh01IYLTAx4KH-UBdorsvmNIH2F6v_Utod8E5UGcFSVuijaaYEMGlUlieppqJWFg3GIDRI4mmCTYNtDyjSuahXV6ScXorjCvKbJRttX61b9f_g5TiR411VrqgTVLeNnWCzBm5XJQ37YtLvHF3x2h9L-bVa2BYoqqP-eksXtSsxk6mYywBHIssgR5t5d-AbsgxloYV2GweUbSuZ6A962GQemDUq2JoBeP6-h69WzoIzgNqu89L9fjWBDgTYjFXGdtONjoWsGH-ND23zGMB7pxkAfJl-AZnbl2VQrUULmVVb6t52Gbk89YkMXfTrUaVtSVvHp2CNd0IvR0xL4xQOYWNXvLWg8bMIBghBsFXkXSGvixq0hFn5QQkurlQC3LgMJZDd__aXPGxnvixHA4yMbg%3D)** I am honored to have made history in my first term by being the first black mayor elected in a Montana city since it officially became a state. Helena has been my home for over 20 years. I love it dearly and am incredibly proud of the work we have been able to accomplish together. However, there is still work to be done and we can’t let someone like my extremist opponent come in and ruin all the progress we have made. As we continue into the next term I will do everything in my power to make sure that refugees, like me, are welcomed into our city. I will fight for more affordable housing and childcare, and do my part to combat climate change, such as getting us to be 100% reliant on renewable energy by 2030. I have been listening, Helena, and while we have come a long way I know that there are still many issues that need to be addressed and I am looking forward to the challenge. It is my hope that together we can continue to make Helena an even better place to live, work, and raise our families. I truly believe that as your Mayor, we can accomplish this. I’ve seen what we can do and I see what needs to be done. **[No one will work harder for you than me, so please vote for me and if you can, donate $25 to help my campaign finish this race strong.](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=4f0caf8413de4d628580dbe42e32231a&_e=HpDgk0gA_3-n0hOHxgxuwGRVW2C4_FA_ggeYCEITCOohIRr5IBmAOb_6JlitUnCZeUXQ06EgJIc8n00LNwk-tmjPh01IYLTAx4KH-UBdorsvmNIH2F6v_Utod8E5UGcFSVuijaaYEMGlUlieppqJWFg3GIDRI4mmCTYNtDyjSuahXV6ScXorjCvKbJRttX61b9f_g5TiR411VrqgTVLeNnWCzBm5XJQ37YtLvHF3x2h9L-bVa2BYoqqP-eksXtSsCjPLm3tffO3xpWqPdiWEUaIyw7lD9mvFOHTty9TmqZ-SBFXF92jqcyN2zubcZEr9LP_XuypSkDoxe_s5vfq4aektrvWI7DnnecU5N6BZb6PP8DXaao4g_jPLOrAndZLxQu2ue2OdkGnu9gPahI7zvxKMEPC4MJbPc3SZl-BgZ-ZayawrrWh6RGE-UCkQ4eAFsN01Fud5mM1cxSgVLrRMtz7U-p2HZW4iThbBIvlTtj-op9YMvWBeSjMIlVb3Lrql)** Thank you for your support! Let’s set an example for the rest of Montana. Wilmot Collins Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins

body:
Here are ways that you can help immediately. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us1.campaign-archive.com/?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=2c2877e715&e=33b11688c1)

| |

| |
# Let's Heal Minnesota.
Peter,

I am so humbled you've chosen to keep updated with our campaign or possibly help us down the road. Together, we're going to heal Minnesota. This will be a long journey to November 2022, but our state needs a dramatic change in leadership. We're going to keep you in the loop all along the way with how you can help and what you need to know!

In that spirit, I have three asks for you right away:
1. [**Please donate.**](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=c61f396958&e=33b11688c1) Any dollar amount would help! Our campaign is run by grassroots Minnesotans and we are laser focused on winning this state.
2. **Follow us on social media**. You can find links below. We need a grassroots army to share our content, videos, and messages!
3. **Pray.** Prayer was a vital component in my family making the plunge with me to run for Governor. Please pray for peace, for focus, and for the hearts of Minnesotans to receive our message. We have been through so much as a state. Will you commit to pray for this campaign and for me? Humbly, I'm asking for them. Thank you.

Tim Walz's leadership has been a catastrophe for Minnesota. We are so thankful to you for joining our fight and helping us take this state back. Common sense, conservative values, and REAL science will lead the day once more.

Sincerely,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Minnesota Governor

name: Trump Media & Technology Group
subject: Statement on TMTG by the 45th President Donald J. Trump
body:
| | |
---
**Statement on TMTG** **by the 45th President Donald J. Trump** **October 26, 2021** Last week, I announced the creation of a major new company that will challenge the dominance of the Big Tech giants and Big Media bosses. Today I want to explain more about what I am doing and why. For me, this endeavor is about much more than politics. This is about saving our country.

America has always been a nation of smart, spirited, and independent people who take pride in thinking for themselves. We admire those who aren’t afraid to speak their minds, or go against the tide. Yet suddenly, we find ourselves being censored and dictated to by a small group of self-righteous scolds and self-appointed arbiters of what everyone else is allowed to think, say, share, and do.

Nowhere is this censorship more dangerous and brazen than on social media, the public square of our times. We have seen renowned medical doctors being banned from platforms for contradicting “health authorities” or questioning the political narrative of the moment. We’ve seen scientists blacklisted for sharing evidence that the pandemic began in a Chinese lab. We’ve seen vital reporting about Joe and Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings—information that voters needed and deserved to hear—ruthlessly suppressed and erased from the internet just weeks before a presidential election. And as everyone knows, we’ve seen a sitting president of the United States effectively silenced by a small oligarchy of tech titans and “mainstream” media corporations.

The corruption of these platforms cannot be ignored. We have fallen far down the “slippery slope” of censorship in our country, and the topics that Americans are increasingly forbidden to debate are among the most important issues of our day.

This wildly aggressive censorship and “cancel-culture” is not only un-American—it has direct, real-world consequences. Most obvious are the many catastrophes unfolding under the current administration: the calamitous Afghanistan withdrawal, the disaster at the Southern Border, runaway inflation, and the multi-trillion-dollar socialist spending nightmare, just to name a few. In a country that had free speech and a free flow of information, none of this would ever have happened—and no one understands that better than the people doing the censoring.

Yet the silencing and cancellation also affects our country in more subtle, but equally destructive, ways. How many Americans no longer trust a word they hear from their leaders, media, or public health officials, because the one thing they know for certain is that they are not getting the full story? How many ordinary citizens have sadly come to resent their neighbors, feeling that they now live in two entirely different realities? And how many millions of Americans silently oppose so much of the nonsense being inflicted on us, but see the heavy hand of the cancelers, and conclude that their voice can make no difference, or that the cost of speaking up is just too high?

The new age of censorship is a disaster for our country. Things were far better in the days when we had our debates fiercely and openly, and then we could move forward together, as Americans, with both sides knowing that their voice, and their best arguments, had been heard.

The more I looked into this problem, the more I realized that to restore free speech, a major new platform would have to enter the market, with an ironclad commitment to protecting vigorous debate from all sides. But since it is both hard and expensive to build a new platform totally independent of Big Tech’s infrastructure, it would have to be an extremely well-funded, multi-year undertaking. In addition, such a platform would need the ability to rapidly attract millions of users, welcoming not only Republicans to join, but Independents and Democrats as well.

It’s a tremendously difficult set of challenges—and I realized I might be the only person in America with the megaphone, the resources, the experience, and the desire to make it all happen. So with the same “can-do” spirit that has always allowed Americans to persevere, that is exactly what I am doing.

To take on Big Tech censorship, we are creating a “Big Tent” platform: Truth Social. We are inviting people of all political stripes, and all different viewpoints, to come and participate once again in the great American debate. That’s what our country is supposed to be about. Unlike with the Big Tech platforms, there will be no shadow-banning, throttling, demonetizing, or messing with algorithms for political manipulation. We will not be treating users like lab rats for social experiments, or labeling alternative views as “disinformation.” We will not silence our fellow citizens simply because they might be wrong—or worse, because we think that Americans “can’t handle the truth.”

It will be as free, vibrant, lively, and diverse as America itself. And Truth Social is only the beginning of our plans. The Trump Media and Technology Group will also be launching an on-demand video streaming service that competes with the increasingly “woke” and politicized ‘entertainment’ programming created by Big Tech and Big Media players. TMTG also sees opportunities to create “cancel-proof” alternatives in other key areas ranging from web services to payment processing.

In the end, a small number of powerful people who all think the same and wish to silence anyone who thinks differently cannot be trusted to control almost every major media, technology, and entertainment company in America. I am determined to break their chokehold over the voices of the American People—not just for myself and my own supporters, but for the United States of America!

[unsubscribe](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJyNT0FuxCAMfA25JTIEwnLg0Ha1_8BAdpFIggKoyu9LVmnPlayxPbJnbKdR3OykuqAZMEqBSaBCUDqAQecMMEVxHiUywmE5zOL3YM2aTNnDVoZtf3YvjfNkqAI3OyUmOk4NnbSKW4_gJYgu6lcpKZPxg7BHi5TzsFYbfc1-MSEOdlsabZYUw3y0KlfMdg-phG3Nra_rxaAn46MJ3dFKdYr3BmfoOdx8j9zJHpWg0nljOYdu1y59hxhDnmS7__nr1V1OmshPwlitwbX0Po_9R_gcZl8Ny5H83-YlOrxfOll5_wEZqmp1)

Thank you for taking the time to connect. **My mission is simple – to serve you, the constituents, not politics.**
I'm a 20-year enlisted army vet and hold degrees in human resources, animal science, and international relations. I also raise livestock right here in Western Minnesota. My hope for this country is that we, as Americans, start electing leaders that work for the people, not a political party. We are Americans first and foremost and need to come together under the red, white, and blue as a truly united nation to ensure a safe and prosperous future for all. I'm not afraid to talk about the big issues and welcome engaging conversation from all sides of the aisle. Your support, in any capacity, is not only welcome, but key to the success of this campaign.

body:

team and help me finish what President Trump started?")** When a true conservative comes here, especially a true conservative WOMAN, the machine protects itself. That's **why they have put a challenger up against me in the 2022 campaign, and they are funneling MILLIONS in national liberal money into the race from all of Nancy Pelosi 's friends from California to New York and everywhere in between.** He doesn't know anything about the district, and the liberals funding his campaign don't know anything about him - they just know that he is running to defeat ME - that's enough. **[That is why I need your help to counter the liberal hate for this conservative woman with your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or just $45 to make a big difference in _this_ race.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58619388:JYYKg32NK:m:1:3103520637:8B36D4ECF327C0283B7030329E9EF148:r "That is why I need your help to counter the liberal hate for this
conservative woman with your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or just $45 to make a big difference in this race.")** I am proud of who I am, but I have seen what the Democrat hate machine can do to a patriot. They are relentless, and they have no problem with destroying a person's life if they threaten to expose the Swamp for what they are or for standing in the way of implementing their cradle-to-grave socialist spending spree. **Joe Biden is afraid of me because I am going to impeach him.** Nancy Pelosi is scared of me because I won't let her push me around. we can defeat the socialists in the Washington Swamp.")** Thank you. God Bless America. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58619387:JYYKg32NK:m:1:3103520637:8B36D4ECF327C0283B7030329E9EF148:r "Marjorie
Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: My election ➡️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| | There isn't much time left, so I'll make this quick.

Virginians have already begun casting their ballots and there are just 6 days left until Election Day.

If Clinton-ally Terry McAuliffe wins this race, there will be dire consequences for Virginia. He's bad on crime, bad for our economy, and bad for our schools.

If I'm elected, on day one I'll cut exploding costs for families, defend our police instead of defunding them, jumpstart job growth, and ban Critical Race Theory.

_**[If you have anything to spare, I'm asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58620539:JRDxsJ2NW:m:1:3253819041:6DF8E8E3518ADD55BFDAAA0C7A9B9C65:r "If you have anything to spare, I’m asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.")**_

---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58620539:JRDxsJ2NW:m:1:3253819041:6DF8E8E3518ADD55BFDAAA0C7A9B9C65:r)
---

All eyes are on Virginia. The results of this election will be used as a guide map for what could follow in next year's midterms.

If Republicans _win_ , it will be a huge blow to the Democrats' hopes of holding onto their majority. But if Republicans _lose_ , Democrats will leverage our loss for their own gain.

We _can_ win. In fact, the latest polls have me and McAuliffe neck-and-neck.

**This race will come down to the final get-out-the-vote efforts.** Every single dollar could impact how many more doors we can knock, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach.

_**[So, can I please count on you to pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $1?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58620539:JRDxsJ2NW:m:1:3253819041:6DF8E8E3518ADD55BFDAAA0C7A9B9C65:r "So, can I please count on you to pitch in anything you’re able ASAP, even if it’s just $1?")**_

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

Sincerely,

Glenn Youngkin

body:
The first thing they did during the COVID lockdowns was to close churches and synagogues.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk428uprdtc2brngj139tvv1qfelec5lpabr30so_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrrec74cji79cri61jr4opgm9jb4d5kmmrb4c9nchqneo5n6ljm4sjke9j71o30cv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3imlj30s5jchg7eob662ob4ohme8gq48bi4bh28or6clj64o74shi649fg)
| | | | | Please read this message from our sponsor Newsmax Media.

**Forced Vaccinations Threaten Your Freedom and Christianity**
David Horowitz has been warning Americans that leftist agenda items like forced vaccinations are the opening salvo in their real target – banning Christianity _and the Bible._
“This is about control, not public health,” he says.
The far left wants to control you, your kids, and your religion.
This famous _Jewish thinker reveals his latest warning._
**Read below.** ******_Urgent Message From David Horowitz_** Dear Reader, Remember: _The first thing they did_ during the COVID lockdowns was to close churches and synagogues. They shut down churches as these same blue state COVID demagogues allowed mass and maskless protests after George Floyd. The closed down almost every business in America, _but kept open bars and abortion clinics._ Now, the Biden administration and the "woke" left are embracing a radical new approach: _forced vaccinations._ Don't get me wrong: Everyone at risk should get the vaccine. But the science clearly shows that if you have already have had COVID or you are young and healthy – the virus is like any other flu.
_Mortality is almost zero._ But Biden and the CDC are racing to force vaccinations among the military, school teachers, employees of private companies . . . even our children. Even if they are healthy and not in a risk group . . ._why?_ _Because this is all about control._ And then there was Obama's recent 60th birthday bash. More than 300 people crowded into a small tent in Martha's Vineyard. The media reported wild music, dancing, _and no one wearing masks._ This was _just two weeks after Nancy Pelosi_ and the House Democrats sought to arrest Republican congressmen who did not wear masks even after _they had been vaccinated!_ If you don't see the shocking hypocrisy of the left and their real agenda in this, you should stop reading this! Make no mistake about it, the left's anti-Christian and anti-Semitic agenda is being ramped up dramatically . . . . . . _and it's frightening._ Think about it. The governor of California, Gavin Newsom, actually banned private home Bible studies, while OK'ing mass BLM protests and worse . . . This is a sickening violation of religious freedom. It's a threat to Christianity. And I am Jewish! Newsmax calls me one of the “most important conservative and Jewish thinkers in America.” I have authored numerous _New York Times_ bestsellers. But my book **_Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America_** is the most important. My book reveals the left's dangerous agenda against Christianity. When I began research for the book, I thought this war against Christians would be sometime in the future. Instead I found that Obama and others _had already started this war._ Now they are accelerating their **power grab to systematically dismantle religion and banish God** from the lips, minds, and hearts of the faithful . . . . . . remove His holy name from our civil society, even destroying religious symbols and artifacts along the way. _Think about this:_ The media was so proud of tens of thousands of BLM protesters last year who rampaged through our cities . . . And yet, in San Francisco the Roman Catholic archdiocese was slapped with a cease-and-desist order saying some churches violated a local ban on large outdoor gatherings. Some churches were even fined and threatened with criminal prosecution for holding services outdoors, with social distancing and masks . . . Under **critical race theory, the BLM protests are "good"** even if they violate public health orders, but if Christians want to meet and pray -- _that's bad and evil!_ **Oh, but it gets worse . . .** Unable to attend worship services, people are becoming disconnected and distanced from their faith. But the Constitution provides you with a basic and unlimited freedom of religion. **This new war on Christianity, using COVID, demonstrates the Constitution doesn't matter, that you can't worship as a right, and you must follow orders made up by leftist officials.** Everything you need to know about what is happening is exposed inside _**_[Dark Agenda](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuvr88kdrcg9gkn3159v6hdn8k6siqk8fod2jhvg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cph61p74chh2bs)_**_[.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zljrkua3332borsbraaqp579irg3oiv07ths4ec0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cph61p74chh2bs) I am deeply troubled by what I see . . . You may remember this:
* Bill Maher shouting "death to religion" on national TV . . .
* Monuments in Washington whitewashed of God and
prayer . . .
* Religious crosses confiscated . . .
* Lenten ashes on children's foreheads being scrubbed off at school. . .
* Prayer in school being ruled unconstitutional overnight . . .

Whether you do or don't remember any of the above, please keep reading. This is serious stuff. Our faith and our ability to worship freely is in serious jeopardy. If you're a person of faith, this directly impacts you, your family, friends, and loved ones -- and it's terrifying. Every day the writing on the wall becomes clearer. Listen . . . Hatred is growing in our nation toward Jews and Christians -- being spread like wildfire. Why? What is behind this evil movement? Everything you need to know is laid out in my runaway bestselling book, _[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5f4hnmgrj7k9n00agtblpuqr7bfdldmnapma4o8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cph61p74chh2bs)_. _[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb2q5ub1jum0srk02usofvnugkvg3r6i05v122q8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cph61p74chh2bs)_ has rocked the media and political world. **Tucker Carlson** said he couldn't put the book down. Tucker said you must "read this disturbing but vital book." **Mike Huckabee** has urged every Christian to get and read this book. Gov. Huckabee said this book was the best one he had ever read defending Christians -- and it was written by a Jew!

And **Glenn Beck** reports __[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdcjrlfkttim40brdf3hkmgogiqtigeccrekmvcg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cph61p74chh2bs)__ reveals a "dangerous" situation we all face. I uncovered the roots of this hateful, deadly movement and put it all in my new book, _[**Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9kuspj4idc96andhp7e2ju0kv2v2ocsudlrrpp0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cph61p74chh2bs)_[.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zml006pfcnnjl6ts729lvtldfb0um5q62r20fccg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cph61p74chh2bs) Look, there's no other way to say this . . . **If you're a Christian or Jew or a faithful follower of God, you must read this book.** Folks, this is religious intolerance fueled by the left for 60 years -- a deep-seated animosity inciting vicious hate crimes and gaining momentum fast. Just look at this: _A headline that recently appeared on CBS News:_ **"U.S. 'moving into a dangerous phase' as anti-Semitic incidents surge."** Everyone must WAKE UP, which is why Newsmax is **_[giving you _Dark Agenda_ for FREE](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoo78qjq1ojo347lmkb8vu9u7v0oo02p5med48qo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cph61p74chh2bs)_**[!](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqqmsnvjgu75eemoelrd8ikmoblqvl1nbelmqjlg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cph61p74chh2bs) This is all part of the plan set in motion decades ago to rid God from public life. In fact . . . After a nearly 15-year drop, the Anti-Defamation League found acts of anti-Semitism started spiking in 2016.
What's worse, the most recent numbers show the highest number of anti-Semitic incidents in its recorded history. There were over 2,100 acts of violence -- assaults, vandalism, and harassment -- against Jews. Please, for all these reasons and atrocities being committed, I urge you now more than ever . . . [**Read this book**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk0ecuoqrkdb55t72s0t06d6r4vehlas00ep5f38_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cph61p74chh2bs). Remember, [**it's a FREE Offer, compliments of Newsmax.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs95418pclh3uk3rdcdrth1n1moh2qidplagc6vo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cph61p74chh2bs) Newsmax is completely wiping out the retail price of $26.99 for you -- it's THAT critical to get this book in your hands. **We must protect Christianity and Judaism before it's too late -- and save our most basic freedom of religion.** In _[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5b3va076695m0efmp05gqq4aa13irugcdp912ig_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cph61p74chh2bs)_ , you'll discover the plan that was set in place decades ago . . . and the series of events that have unfolded, allowing the plan to take hold. I name names -- Obama, Hillary, and the big media pushing this secular agenda. There are new ones now: **Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Andrew Cuomo** , and more. **They want a Godless society**. They're totally cool if thousands want to riot in protest against President Trump, breaking all COVID-19 rules.
But if you want to go to church or synagogue -- with social distancing -- they want you arrested! You'll discover who was responsible . . . how the Supreme Court failed Christian America . . . why school administrators are brainwashing our kids . . . and the names of those carrying out the plan in Washington today. When you're done reading _[**Dark Agenda**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf2s80f1u5r2lpirkb0ioio72nvai7o0q8m0hfp8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cph61p74chh2bs)_ , you'll understand the deep divide in America. This is critical as we roll through the post-election year. **President Trump has been at the very epicenter** of this battle between the forces of good and evil right here in America. And President Trump, out of office, _will actually be a bigger threat -- and a bigger target -- for the far left._ We must fight back, or our children and generations to come will live in fear of expressing their faith. Yours for Freedom, **_D_**** _avid Horowitz_** P.S. Hurry! Shortly before he died, Rush Limbaugh talked about _**Dark Agenda.**_ He said the future of America depended on this battle between the forces of good and evil. You need to [**Claim your FREE BOOK**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1v056vk9psl069b047g0pbkcetp0l2u6q1j99c0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cph61p74chh2bs) before Newsmax runs out of copies. Remember, Newsmax is giving you _**Dark Agenda: The War to Destroy Christian America**_ [**absolutely FREE**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7e70g91qp1oia3g35r7g9svlp8tcj8afuhgftv8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cph61p74chh2bs)**.** **You can't get this $26.99 book for FREE anywhere else except from Newsmax -- or a friend willing to give you their copy! **[**Click here.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zebab06fm7gep1cuicu77o3sgne9jajmaioe4o80_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cph61p74chh2bs)

_– USA Today, 10/26/2021_ This poll also said 5% of voters are still undecided! This is all going to come down to voter turnout, Derek — that’s exactly why we set a million dollar fundraising goal for our Early Voting Fund.

_**[We urgently need to get out the vote in the final days of this campaign. Can you donate now to ensure we have the resources we need to compete with Glenn Youngkin on the ground and on the airwaves? Your donation will be matched until midnight tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37974318/313429713/-2023814932?refcode=20211027.1_TM_10HZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmQwZWQ4ZC0wZjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fA1wLdR-zElRU48b0zveiOkX41hH7mW8htYTx3ASWM=)**_

Look, money isn’t always everything in politics. But in a race that’s as close as this one, it truly does matter. Right now, our grassroots supporters are directly fueling our critical voter mobilization efforts.

**We’re knocking on doors. We’re calling voters. We’re running TV ads. And none of that would be even remotely possible if folks like you weren’t chipping in $25 whenever you can.**

_**[So please, rush a matched donation to my campaign before tonight’s midnight deadline to help me protect our democracy and keep Virginia blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37974319/313429714/-2023814932?refcode=20211027.1_TM_10HZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmQwZWQ4ZC0wZjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fA1wLdR-zElRU48b0zveiOkX41hH7mW8htYTx3ASWM=)**_

Thank you for being on my team,

Terry McAuliffe | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37974320/313429715/-2023814932?refcode=20211027.1_TM_10HZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmQwZWQ4ZC0wZjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fA1wLdR-zElRU48b0zveiOkX41hH7mW8htYTx3ASWM=)**

name: Jeff Fortenberry
subject: FBI Lied to Target Me with a Fake Crime!
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58621782:6Gn86J2qN:m:1:3298722022:6287A42814AA98AC329668A6A323C93C:r)
---
| Peter,
I'll get straight to the point.
**The FBI lied to me, so they could prosecute me for "lying."**
Biden's FBI is using its unlimited power and resources to target me, a red state member of Congress. They're accusing me of **fake process crimes** so they can destroy my reputation and turn my seat blue.
With the Afghanistan disaster, record inflation, and skyrocketing energy prices, Joe Biden's approval is tanking.
To keep him in power Biden's FBI is working to take out patriots like me--and you.
**[I'm reaching out today to urge you to make a most generous contribution of $25 or more to help fund the massive legal fees needed to fight Biden's Deep State.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58621782:6Gn86J2qN:m:1:3298722022:6287A42814AA98AC329668A6A323C93C:r)** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58621782:6Gn86J2qN:m:1:3298722022:6287A42814AA98AC329668A6A323C93C:r) For my whole life, and over 20 years of public service, I've been committed to honesty, fairness, and justice. I don't cut corners.
That's why this charge of lying is so incredible. Even more so because **the FBI lied to me, so they could accuse me of "lying."**
[I'm counting on the support of amazing patriots like you](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58621782:6Gn86J2qN:m:1:3298722022:6287A42814AA98AC329668A6A323C93C:r) to help me pay my massive legal costs.
Again, I DID NOTHING WRONG.
However, Biden's FBI has access to endless amounts of your and my taxpayer dollars to fund their attacks on me.
My only chance of proving my innocence is to hire a top-notch legal team, one that includes my friend former Congressman Trey Gowdy.
But since I've used my office for public service, never personal gain, I can't fund this by myself.
**[I'm counting on generous patriots like you to help fund my legal battle against a weaponized Justice Department by chipping in your best gift of whatever you can afford.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58621782:6Gn86J2qN:m:1:3298722022:6287A42814AA98AC329668A6A323C93C:r)** | | | | [Chip in $25!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58621783:6Gn86J2qN:m:1:3298722022:6287A42814AA98AC329668A6A323C93C:r)

---
Thank you in advance for your generous support!

Yours in liberty,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58621782:6Gn86J2qN:m:1:3298722022:6287A42814AA98AC329668A6A323C93C:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58621782:6Gn86J2qN:m:1:3298722022:6287A42814AA98AC329668A6A323C93C:r)

Jeff Fortenberry
Congressman

body:
Law enforcement needs our help
---
| | | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NUkKEAyoTc6CEMfg1mmAgkrT2lmInAaxrcrOdCRrusGk9UlAyGLZZnzmsYncDuGOzNYAXxZu4cN-Z3ZeSomUx0dDCHUFpCu10yVLzxOzUOkMyavLUBu2ffczerUa6Q9o4OmRjfGnyt9XnUehBPdvPl6zKMQVxo8jKhhKNnrchX5lZo511_hf-4gxsAz1FiFx&c=GVMuisW7rgDN95mSUx16RECNkE7TBdqbTmTvdxj8uoZ7XePjnlop_g==&ch=g3Mq-qyk_6_GZKHa5EgqoyXCOT32P9-0gMUK37ybsUFVizUh6aQuwQ==)

body:
By now, I'm sure you have heard the news that Joe Biden wants the authority to tax profits on all of your investments - even bef

Liberals want even more of your money

Dear fellow conservative-

By now, I'm sure you have heard the news that Joe Biden wants the authority to tax profits on all of your investments - even before you sell them. This incredibly dangerous policy will affect every American who owns a home, invests in a 401k, or even casually trades stocks.

It seems that monitoring our bank accounts with just $600 wasn't enough for these thieves, so now they are going even further to steal the hard-earned dollars from middle-class Americans.

It's time we organize against these destructive policies coming from Washington - that's why we created [CaucusRoom.com](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp447gje4mlqo0k2t3kgpo8gpoq0mo0tvaisir58_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cpj62oj2c5h2bs).

[CaucusRoom.com](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmsutno483633hhkjtatgdsi0i5db1femdenmqa0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cpj62oj2c5h2bs) is for verified conservatives only - and is always free to join. On [CaucusRoom.com](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9oo58vlgoobgsdrui3bplouneubehba26toaf30_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cpj62oj2c5h2bs), you can be comfortable sharing information that the mainstream media and big tech increasingly censor.

If we are going to get this country back on track, we must work together.

Join [CaucusRoom.com](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjqruqe6cj76af6d00n4n0cei826kvcddvq608jo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cpj62oj2c5h2bs) today.

clean_body: Need your help before midnight. | | | = | | Derek, we have an urgent deadline at midnight. I’m humbly asking for your support because I’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $1 million to fuel our final push to get every Democrat in Virginia out to vote before Early Vote ends on Saturday. = This race is a must win for Democrats here in Virginia and across our country. Three consecutive polls show a tied race. If my Trump-backed opponent starts to pull ahead, I can promise you extreme, Trumpian guys like him will start popping up in every election in the country. He’s peddling lies about the 2020 election. He wants to ban abortion. He opposes marriage equality. Virginia is about stopping Trumpism and defending our progress — and we need everyone in this fight. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Terry McAuliffe =** Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. our deadline is coming up.

[**_If you don’t have time to read the rest of this email, you can click here to split your donation between my campaign and John King right away._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37975435/313433947/-844928598?refcode=blu-king-20211027-1-em&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjI3Nzc2Zi0xZDM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eiXE9U4pRRtvzMcooFNd0bEDaVAK5f7f1igIEh3Y0_I=) Thank you!

We urgently need federal protections to protect the right to choose.
The Texas law outlaws abortions after six weeks of pregnancy with almost no exceptions, and it deputizes citizen patrols to intervene in one of the most personal health choices someone can make.
This means any private citizen can sue doctors who perform abortions or individuals who provide any type of assistance to someone seeking an abortion -- such as offering a ride to a clinic or supplying monetary support.
And almost immediately after this draconian law was passed, Madison Cawthorn called for _all 50 states_ to pass copy-cat laws.
The decision to have an abortion is a deeply personal and often painful one. We need elected officials and judges who respect a person’s right to make decisions about their own body.
Jasmine is a pro-choice pastor who believes in protecting the right to choose and ensuring that everyone has access to the health care they need and deserve.

clean_body: | = | | BREAKING: The Supreme Court will hear oral arguments to the Texas abortion law beginning on November 1. = | | | = We urgently need federal protections to protect the right to choose. The Texas law outlaws abortions after six weeks of pregnancy with almost no exceptions, and it deputizes citizen patrols to intervene in one of the most personal health choices someone can make. This means any private citizen can sue doctors who perform abortions or individuals who provide any type of assistance to someone seeking an abortion -- such as offering a ride to a clinic or supplying monetary support. And almost immediately after this draconian law was passed, Madison Cawthorn called for all 50 states to pass copy-cat laws. The decision to have an abortion is a deeply personal and often painful one. We need elected officials and judges who respect a person’s right to make decisions about their own body. Jasmine is a pro-choice pastor who believes in protecting the right to choose and ensuring that everyone has access to the health care they need and deserve. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = In solidarity, Team Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. Peter,

subject: Nothing Scarier than the GOP Supermajority

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37978461/313444564/-232183106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDQ0NjAzNi0yNzM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6JGdzsuA63MHtbFA_mfL2o2Z2UW76Yx8wZQoHQVwBOc=)
Dear Peter,

We know its spooky season but that doesn’t mean we should be scared of change. The inhumanity and dishonesty of the GOP Supermajority in Tennessee needs to be removed from office. Supporting Democratic candidates in Tennessee’s House of Representatives, during the upcoming 2022 election cycle, is the only way to bring civility back to our state.
Because we cannot fundraise during the session, 4 PM is our deadline to meet our end of month goal. We are kindly asking - [will you join your fellow Democrats and chip in $22 to support the Democratic Party? Your contribution helps in our efforts to win back seats in the House.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37978462/313444570/-774923438?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDQ0NjAzNi0yNzM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6JGdzsuA63MHtbFA_mfL2o2Z2UW76Yx8wZQoHQVwBOc=)

Thank you,
Chairman Vincent Dixie
State Representative, District 54
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus Chairman

name: American Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8998%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=zHa%2fHP8l5%2fTmi9hmAiy7YQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16151%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r9HXLlI9060CbcbOTZ%2bmJQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16152%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QhWCyimyAu4uFCI35XjdtA&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16152%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QhWCyimyAu4uFCI35XjdtA&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8998%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=zHa%2fHP8l5%2fTmi9hmAiy7YQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8998%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=zHa%2fHP8l5%2fTmi9hmAiy7YQ&sysid=1)

name: Dr. Mary L Trump
subject: I’m stunned more people aren't worried about this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Are you?
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37978468/313444624/-2023814932?refcode=20211027.3_MT_10IB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjVhZjdkNS0yNTM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VUJDr-NG0jsFbFjfPrX0kYIlOE-ux3Jxiexxl_H1I_8=)

| | I thought more people would be concerned that my uncle, Donald Trump, could make a comeback in 2024 and win the presidency again.

I thought that after four years of having the most dangerous man in America in the Oval Office, people would do whatever it takes to make sure he doesn’t gain power again.

_**It seems I was wrong.**_

Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate for Governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is currently tied with Terry McAuliffe in the race for governor, and Democrats seem not to notice just how important this race is.

Turnout is low, and Terry tells me that donations have slowed to a trickle. We need more resources, so he can mobilize the voters he needs to win.

_**[Will you pitch in right now to help Terry mobilize Virginia voters over the last couple days of this election? clean_body: Are you? | | | = | | I thought more people would be concerned that my uncle, Donald Trump, could make a comeback in 2024 and win the presidency again. I thought that after four years of having the most dangerous man in America in the Oval Office, people would do whatever it takes to make sure he doesn’t gain power again. It seems I was wrong. Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate for Governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is currently tied with Terry McAuliffe in the race for governor, and Democrats seem not to notice just how important this race is. Turnout is low, and Terry tells me that donations have slowed to a trickle. We need more resources, so he can mobilize the voters he needs to win. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = I’m stunned that more people aren’t stepping up. Are you going to stand by and hand my uncle a victory? Or will you fight back and help Terry keep Virginia blue? name: Mark Kelly
subject: sincerely asking for $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
I remember when I first launched my campaign for Senate more than 2 years ago. | | |
---
Friends — I remember when I first launched my campaign for Senate more than 2 years ago. I wasn’t sure what to expect. One of my biggest concerns was whether or not we’d have the resources to win an expensive race with wild amounts of outside money spent to beat me. But then, minutes after we announced, a teacher from Tucson made one of the first donations and we were off... We’ve received hundreds of thousands of donations since then, funding our campaign with grassroots support that I’m very proud of. You should be too. Today, I’m asking if you can split a donation between my campaign and Maggie Hassan's. **[Our end-of-month deadline is right around the corner, and we’ve got a lot of ground to make up to reach our goals.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37980305/313453031/1696179105?refcode=e20211027_oct-mk-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2Y1NzllMS0yOTM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xMbdhuki0HupCX9TqmV1l2EX7QNRU1_XzFd0_c95fPw=)** | | [Can I count on you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37980309/313453039/1696179105?refcode=e20211027_oct-mk-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2Y1NzllMS0yOTM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xMbdhuki0HupCX9TqmV1l2EX7QNRU1_XzFd0_c95fPw=)

name: Ralph Northam
subject: Coming down to the wire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/jPMWSiynfmIx3kTMt2ZLzHkPnPJksPGsUQFYwQs3PxA=/19SwwmkU719C9Of9CYn4Vw8Md_vhX224jCm5z-zDWBQ=)
---
Friend, In 2019, we accomplished something great together: Democrats took control of the Virginia General Assembly by the slimmest of margins for the first time in over two decades. This year, with all 100 seats in the House of Delegates on the ballot once again, we _must _protect our Majority so we can secure our Democratic future in Virginia. All of the progress we've made on gun safety, justice reform, and women's reproductive healthcare access could be turned back with the drop of a hat if Democratic voters don't turn out next Tuesday. We know this election is going to come down to the wire so we need our grassroots army to step up today so we can charge across the finish line. [**Join our fight by making a contribution today so we can ensure Democratic victory on Tuesday!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/jPMWSiynfmIx3kTMt2ZLzHkPnPJksPGsUQFYwQs3PxA=/B9En4l4VW1lvfrJKgPV4idOzrdbgL98BFAZwmREuoec=) Trumpism is back on the ballot in just a few days time, and I need your help to put an end to it once and for all. **[I hope I can count on you to join me by making a contribution today!](https://act.myngp.com/el/jPMWSiynfmIx3kTMt2ZLzHkPnPJksPGsUQFYwQs3PxA=/B9En4l4VW1lvfrJKgPV4idOzrdbgL98BFAZwmREuoec=)** \- Ralph Northam

name: Peter Franchot
subject: My Running Mate
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
Today, I am thrilled to announce that I have selected Monique Anderson-Walker as my running mate. When I entered the race for Governor, I wanted someone by my side who had the vision, the expertise, and the experience to help me restore competent government to Annapolis and deliver the concrete results that Marylanders deserve.
The more time I spent with Monique, the clearer the choice became. As the first Black Woman to ever be elected to the Prince George’s County Council from District 8, Monique has championed innovative programs to improve the quality of life for Prince George’s residents. From education and workforce initiatives, to public safety, transportation, infrastructure and economic development, Monique has demonstrated an expansive, long-term vision to transform the lives of our communities. She’s precisely the kind of consummate public servant that we need now more than ever. I am deeply honored that she has joined our team, and I have no doubt that she will make an excellent Lieutenant Governor.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/announcement102721?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/announcement102721?amount=20.22]We’re building an inclusive people-powered movement to redefine the possibility of government, and voters are taking notice. A recent poll has shown that I am leading the Democratic field -- and with Monique by my side on the campaign trail, we’re going to take this movement to even greater heights in the coming months.
This is a major moment for our campaign, and we can’t let it go to waste. Fresh off the heels of this announcement, will you chip in to power our campaign to victory? We rely on grassroots supporters like you to help us sustain our momentum in this competitive race.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/announcement102721?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/announcement102721?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/announcement102721?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/announcement102721?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/announcement102721]Anything you can give is greatly appreciated. This election could be the most expensive in Maryland’s history, and we need all-hands-on-deck to maintain our lead and pull through to Election Day.
With your support, we can deliver on the concrete points of progress to lift our communities into the quality of life that they deserve. From creating 100,000 jobs in 100 weeks in industries of the future, to student loan forgiveness and expanding access to home ownership through state backed mortgages, to making Maryland the first Net Zero state in the nation and more, we have an exciting opportunity to bring transformational change to our state.
My running mate and I are relying on you to help sustain our momentum by powering this movement at the grassroots. Together, we’re going to change the way that government does business in 2022. Click here to chip in. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/announcement102721?amount=20.22]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/announcement102721?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

clean_body: Far-right politicians from Virginia to Iowa know that Trump is their ticket to re-election. | = Friend, In a moment, we're going to ask you to = to Democrat Terry McAuliffe for governor in Virginia. First, let us explain why it's so important, especially right now: Virginia's election is less than a week away. Reputable polls show McAuliffe and his far-right opponent Glenn Youngkin locked in an exact tie. Trump is backing Youngkin, and they're resorting to the same deceptive tactics and tired tropes we've come to expect from the far-right. Here in Iowa, our opponent Governor Kim Reynolds stood with Trump at his MAGA rally earlier this month. Trump called her "nice" and promised an endorsement. Some even say she's jockeying to be his running mate. Friend, here's the striking similarity between our states: Far-right politicians like Youngkin and Reynolds know that Trump is their ticket to re-election. They're willing to stoop to any level to get his endorsement, no matter what it means for our communities. Virginia is one of the few states where elections fall on the off-year, which means they're a pretty good indicator of what we can expect in the midterms. Democrats need to show up in force to prove we have strength and momentum. That's why we're asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = After Virginia, the nation will set their sights on the midterms. We believe Democrats across the country are seeing the value of investing in our race here in the Midwest -- we're building a strong operation to flip Iowa blue. But first, we must win Tuesday. = Thanks in advance, Team Ras Smith = | | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. O. name: Doug Gansler
subject: Bold action for our state
body:
I'm ready to take bold action to build the Maryland we deserve. | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/OllgZHPBxi5Nj1ruZQeQpwBj2yY3qrjjXDqCsubFGRpgnVewgtvgh6qNOeYPs4heNJgLarV4quNEJed3WxYi21vD2fBIdcIh9cItjOmZ4a7FPTPgXSJI-hmUv9DQskAN2gFxGlaPJn3VR8b0Vs2U1HfRcVVxdsHvv_RvvDS-eBSMquYlS26fi8r6ZFesiF1W6lpXySQfCX4iY8TLsNF2s8VbqrGWK6aK2PRzHIjPefIYB-69WZu-gtFFQj7bd51i/3gi/tyJnDSPHSreDFDoKWj6QbA/h0/koTMW7goPcqp1CcPRgG3j0gIl-N9R9YqorPpDd7y5BQ) Hi friends, Thanks for joining the team! As you probably know, the challenges facing Maryland right now are tremendous. Gaps between rich and poor are growing. Inequities in schools and health care have been amplified during the pandemic. Our economy and our work force have been hit hard. Climate change and threats to our environment have been ignored. I’m running for Governor because these challenges require someone with the experience to get the job done and finally deliver on the vision we share as progressive Democrats. **** [**Check out my announcement video here! **](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0pkdPTeWDxbBnoXXXLxMgPD59KyQriZV1SakT6_zI1CwOVxp6fSEPNc-L7QeMLy4IXm28hVSczaNL-n6DKkRul2YtSBgxp2w9dZrb5N6_GJQA58sJKc3SOSPJqsXbWmyWU0wstkaA-_8gcWl3PTNCNEQ2WwzezrUrfSgCz-64REYVPIkz5gFq3AMOsFEcEO2_axA0Grj711FvoFtKuhnYvf7cc1MOjp0bLKFbWqZBPi-/3gi/tyJnDSPHSreDFDoKWj6QbA/h1/VjHWWCiKBVN5gDOlCr8Z91RPvN8d9uXnZcdIxbHVKBA) ****My** _bold_** vision starts with:
* Affordable childcare for every Maryland family
* Make Maryland the national leader on climate change with 100% clean energy
* Universal pre-K to close gaps in opportunity
* Legalize and tax marijuana to pay for the investments our state needs

And why do I think I can do it? Because I’ve done it before. I served 16 years, eight as Maryland’s Attorney General, fighting for justice, standing up for marriage equality, championing the Bay and delivering over a billion dollars to keep Marylanders in their homes during the foreclosure crisis. Right now, we have the opportunity to shape a better future for our children and our state. I’m ready to take **_bold_** action to build the Maryland we deserve. **[Are you with me?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0pkdPTeWDxbBnoXXXLxMgPD59KyQriZV1SakT6_zI1CwOVxp6fSEPNc-L7QeMLy4IZ8wO2Xbes7-n3q7bMRE2wbRWBBdLNV2yxNLzuh4bnX7sB-EI1IjHtF1ku5AeN5JOITHFY79YTM4G2Sj_sKRxuCZugzKl4QmJxy696K3AV3l3-G8z_llNsIhAc78tc1jim_7zu7FtkAwzvbugviu6x6Wh_kWS00dxw2cPOyuOXRv/3gi/tyJnDSPHSreDFDoKWj6QbA/h2/Q0AeI4cRwauvC_I_Q7-LTI1mQLoDeJOImvpjBs9iyXM)** Thank you, Doug Gansler [ **DONATE** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wU4u8fRNsb1BaqkbIb_Tio_CBzkhD5I4Wkx3KagP2EhpGqFFhP9HxCXIrc_Zl6E0v2ZM1CcQZXzlYTHYSxYTotegnNGZsNdA1ccibqoK0N3zDZYf6dGzZBCthseGRXQEz3w2gu6ZylNzBldWtnqSiXFRGWEE7cIhW4JOIkUcUdEuezEEf7m0l5WlGxfD25Gq4hrN9BvClCZru6VxM6UBFzl4_d3kYvt_Vusw_w6G-yW_-eteNwKAxZVujJJxRGdM4oT503BEdIPzxtNKsAeQcG/3gi/tyJnDSPHSreDFDoKWj6QbA/h3/6DV4Ld7fosWSJPABe7s4vAkpGl2z9wpLblm3k6SnSoM) By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair.

Friends of Doug Gansler | P.O. Box 31102 | Bethesda, MD 20824 | United States
