name: Mckayla Wilkes
subject: introduction
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE
body:
I'm running for Congress again — because it's time for some damn change, and I believe that, together, we can be the change. | | | _Friend, you have stood up for Democratic and progressive values and candidates before; now we need you to help keep fighting. Mckayla is running a proudly progressive campaign for Congress. But if you don't want to hear about this campaign, please click[ _here._](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GduVWzPmTjGmLJetR2bvS9CY5nxKcyc3Fvk0ptPznDC6dE23y2dlEYrrWweSiHpgsyHLAQ9-P72CG71L5e_VBVE6bY90eKSWX5ZMSmSIeYH3KQz0T_g4qVf7sZcjrjP10_24RCFFPa7p_qSUPDPCVLGh3U5XHVwOHDXZWyRLBe8MwlNUcvC4TdoOAIsH4Qx4MKT6DAeiB9JzH4h_MOE8XXw/3gi/v_u_hjsbTbOED_qE_73iRQ/h0/GvhRCl66C5vkrvNQ6tevsqs0wZAFZUW_HIph6Yc1n8I)___ Team, **I'm proud that our progressive campaign for Congress is all about empowering working class communities and building resilient networks of change.** As a queer Black woman, I'm fighting alongside my community and working-class people for bold action on America's most critical issues: healthcare, education, climate change, and mass incarceration. I have seen first hand how powerful, conservative Democrats like Steny Hoyer here in Maryland's 5th District have abandoned the communities they supposedly represent. I don't have millions of dollars of corporate PAC money I can rely on — in fact, I don't accept a dime of corporate PAC money at all. I'm just a normal person running to fight for the interests of working-class, everyday people. **Now, more than ever, it's time for some damn change.** _[But we need your help to build a strong campaign for 2022! Can we count on you to officially endorse our campaign in this moment?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnU1NYh6hyzk1w9QwmxSPu9XR6dNUIMnCfudxfwJ6V8ivvAEXeemZp5vzLz9AcPJY09WcbYr2VgVWJzbie_TU5B-NduBsnqXLE0eaU5wx14sBQx481DeKuj0uFf8NInJ1vvvFoI4Yry108bjbq1JfEdlA2nmNVQEb1j6WWuKGEUiKSk4jPnxOA63jnsg5O4LaxnQBTf-zUO-aPPD2eIdfnT/3gi/v_u_hjsbTbOED_qE_73iRQ/h1/CRUArRtwcCy3FfH_Sg6dkBQ7Jc-tffbMCuVa0lbJ7WA)_ | [**ADD YOUR NAME** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnU1NYh6hyzk1w9QwmxSPu9XR6dNUIMnCfudxfwJ6V8ivvAEXeemZp5vzLz9AcPJY1Zb-uhBw4x1rtZTmajNXDkjIsCSw1AFG3eEBDUQTMDigeHYCiLKShp8dWFSl4tNhztC2O4N3LNWu0t4lj5EukfLgzY5nqHhELv937X2r7kXYcyIs95Uj8bFToC-rrhRU-W2ZN3E-syk-59wn7b2D4f/3gi/v_u_hjsbTbOED_qE_73iRQ/h2/m0Z6RFEYIsPxEcZSFdRVz_gd7PB7VoyKrspek6GW68A)
---
In 2020, we ran a grassroots primary campaign against Steny Hoyer and received more votes than any challenger in his 40-year tenure — and won the in-person vote!
Since then, Hoyer continued to bargain with our lives during the COVID-19 Pandemic. It's no surprise that Hoyer would be willing to gamble with our health, education, and livelihoods. Through his 40 years in office, he's helped build the country's mass incarceration system that has destroyed Black and brown communities.
When I was a child, I was incarcerated for missing class while dealing with grief and undiagnosed depression after losing my aunt in the [9/11](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnU1NYh6hyzk1w9QwmxSPu9XR6dNUIMnCfudxfwJ6V8ivvAEXeemZp5vzLz9AcPJY3mWH2VPrndUZhCQqu2jqjneFdpLUeRmQlbHISMyKkalX5RWKOggobakEh0F1aqIUN3wxRHinqCzRYrbwY6ClL-BmSP99wdCHYKCnAfIHfHCnQqobZd8r4sXLgBUELw4BZm-FCJdqBiVBRGT5QnhKG-/3gi/v_u_hjsbTbOED_qE_73iRQ/h3/Mq1RMnVkfAVAX44DWtu2q3fX8RzR0sCxTWd9qv5KBZs) terrorist attacks on the Pentagon. As an adult, I co-founded the nonprofit advocacy organization Schools Not Jails to ensure no one experiences the school-to-prison pipeline like I was forced to.
When I was pregnant with my daughter, I nearly died due to deep-vein thrombosis after my pain was repeatedly dismissed, then watched as my insurance company attempted to deny covering life-saving medication.
These experiences are how I know first hand it's time for some damn change.
There is so much at stake: our children's future, the health of our communities, and the livelihoods of our families are all on the line.
_[We're mobilizing local leaders and relying on support from everyday people like you. We are building a progressive, diverse, and innovative campaign. Will you officially endorse our campaign now?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnU1NYh6hyzk1w9QwmxSPu9XR6dNUIMnCfudxfwJ6V8ivvAEXeemZp5vzLz9AcPJY0vkkMCrtE93ZjGHhACTgE4VrHTcMb3-YtHScLY9hJuY4HCDh8wGR2vks5P7daYBYS8D9ym-ibyVwE3jI1LotggzLhM6-sV7MRbN-n5oAFGuU_oeBbZioMPwGrZRO8vbe2lifTpY9G9yDE7XxQtOrzy/3gi/v_u_hjsbTbOED_qE_73iRQ/h4/HfW7np5r-pBxTG-Lc0wXwDsaRFDs0mXiwnZF0OszZHc)_
[**ADD YOUR NAME** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnU1NYh6hyzk1w9QwmxSPu9XR6dNUIMnCfudxfwJ6V8ivvAEXeemZp5vzLz9AcPJY31AJjg4yY4UVOTUa7L7kCVws1tny7ftsTaU0A69UZAxnnr47gBJUzOhQ0DO5JVmaWkcIMK1C9BtmT10N7je1dKS-IhWERoa8s9cFtq1AsC5khKQOfro_L34Rxs1sVrbxLn2Z_OtfrQt8w0yJ5ObmGJ/3gi/v_u_hjsbTbOED_qE_73iRQ/h5/vY5AS1F7HuaH4ObkF3Mma1VZ2qRF-_rOE4qib2_gti8)
---
I'm running for Congress again — because it's time for some damn change, and I believe that, together, we can be the change.
In solidarity,
Mckayla

When I was pregnant with my daughter, I nearly died due to deep-vein thrombosis after my pain was repeatedly dismissed, then watched as my insurance company attempted to deny covering life-saving medication. These experiences are how I know first hand it's time for some damn change. There is so much at stake: our children's future, the health of our communities, and the livelihoods of our families are all on the line. I'm running for Congress again — because it's time for some damn change, and I believe that, together, we can be the change. In solidarity, Mckayla PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE mckaylawilkes.com | "Privacy Policy" Mckayla 2022 P.O. Box 670 Riverdale, MD 20738 | | Sent via . https://palmerforillinois.com/ [https://palmerforillinois.com/]
Peter, there’s a lot of work to be done...

*
We
need
to

But we can’t get started on our long list of priorities unless we secure and expand the House Democratic Majority next year.

Peter, I do not give up.

That’s why I’m asking for your help to protect our Majority and expand it by winning IL-13. Can you give now to show your support? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/DPIL-13-Email-Oct2021-FR-DefendMajority?refcode=E12073-20211027-IDoNotGiveUp-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20]

Thank you,

David Palmer

After years of hearing from entrenched D.C. politicians who care more about re-election than sticking up for the people they represent, David is ready to serve, listen, and do everything he can to make life better for the people here in Central Illinois. Our campaign runs on support from people like you, not special interests, so anything you can chip in will help give Illinoisans a leader they can count on. subject: Day 4: Dinwiddie to Danville

Dear Friend, We are officially less than a week away from Election Day! Thank you to everyone who has already joined our movement to elect a new kind of leader - one who will make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. The past 4 days of the #WinWithGlenn bus tour have been a blast, and it has been an honor to meet so many people who are ready for a change. I cannot wait to see what the next few days have in store!
---
---
| [ **BUS TOUR** ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VX419M2j_mKsW4SJ_jK6tQ0-9VVm64t4z8C7LN1MKF-f3lSbNV1-WJV7CgT0lW8HQjNK8tbsKtW96ZWw196-Y5FW9l_XGg2YPxP8W6tbjkV8nhRCCW6VjpWg5bnBncW9bmj4d7qyc6pW5fh-WZ2R6sFbW1_Gzv67F1r2CW7MWKFW1jyPrhN4dtfj2mRrKdW5nMM543knC4vW5Zv2lY925tZ2W42JZyP2f-nn_VfD2Hp2TJg4cV6vQqD2DzTD5W49ztsR69jsXzW3Wc14h35mHVzW47sxb82Q5cnQW8lJ4Xs519GlXN7R3P0-36Dj7W3YMbFb1Sl1rYW5dKy9f72Xncw3kx71)

---|---|---

---
Day 4 included stops at the Flat Rock Country Store in McKenney, South Boston, and Pittsylvania and Mecklenburg Counties. After talking to voters, it is clear that Virginians everywhere are fed up with the current administration and are ready for change.
---
---
Seeing the energy in Danville was an amazing way to end Day 4! Everyone remember to bring 10 friends to the polls and let's get Virginia moving again!
---
The #WinWithGlenn bus is on the road again today for Day 5 of our tour of the Commonwealth. We are making stops in Rocky Mount, Roanoke, Fairlawn, and Blacksburg. Don't miss out on a chance to sign the bus and join our movement! I can't wait to see you there! For Virginia,
---
---
Glenn Youngkin

Thank you to everyone who has already joined our movement to elect a new kind of leader - one who will make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. The past 4 days of the #WinWithGlenn bus tour have been a blast, and it has been an honor to meet so many people who are ready for a change. I cannot wait to see what the next few days have in store! | | | | ---|---|--- Day 4 included stops at the Flat Rock Country Store in McKenney, South Boston, and Pittsylvania and Mecklenburg Counties. After talking to voters, it is clear that Virginians everywhere are fed up with the current administration and are ready for change. Seeing the energy in Danville was an amazing way to end Day 4! Everyone remember to bring 10 friends to the polls and let's get Virginia moving again! The #WinWithGlenn bus is on the road again today for Day 5 of our tour of the Commonwealth. We are making stops in Rocky Mount, Roanoke, Fairlawn, and Blacksburg. Don't miss out on a chance to sign the bus and join our movement! I can't wait to see you there! For Virginia, Glenn Youngkin Paid for by Youngkin for Governor, Inc. Not authorized by any other candidate. Youngkin for Governor, PO Box 3950, Merrifield, VA 22116

Please read the message below from our sponsor.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

|
Fellow Patriot,

I have big news -- Anthony Fauci is in serious trouble.

The National Institute of Health just admitted that Fauci funded gain-of-function research at the Wuhan lab.

_Now it's all spiraling downhill for Anthony Fauci_.

When I called him out for funding gain-of-function research in Wuhan, I was called a lunatic conspiracy theorist by the mainstream media.

Now I'm vindicated. And Fauci has been proven to be a serial liar.

Here's the question now: will Joe Biden's Department of Justice investigate him for lying under oath in front of the U.S. Senate?

_Today, I am renewing my push for a criminal investigation of Anthony Fauci_.

Actions must have consequences. If you or I lied under oath, in any circumstance, we would be immediately hit with perjury charges.

Why do well-connected government officials like James Clapper or Anthony Fauci get away with lying to Congress?

It is now a matter of public record that Fauci's statements under oath were lies.

_And I refuse to let him off the hook_!

Fellow Patriot, I'm proud of the work that I've done exposing Fauci and holding him accountable.

And I promise you this is only the beginning.

If you support the work that I've been doing, I ask you to stand with me.

The threats that I face are constant. And I need proud patriots like you to have my back if I'm going to continue this valuable work.

**[Today is a turning point in the fight against Fauci. Please stand with me by contributing $100, $50, $25, or $10 right away](http://post.spmailtechnolo.com/f/a/lueiXsDrQUdcmiGF7cI4tA~~/AARgdgA~/RgRjW7bPP0TyaHR0cDovL3RyYWNrLmFtZXJpY2FucGF0cmlvdGRhaWx5LmNvbS8_eHRsPXBuZmt4cTU2Z2Y5Y2M5aGYyNm50MWplMzg3NG02b2drZWhxenpoaG9xM3puZ3V3YWI5dGd1ZHoyMXpycGF4eXc5M3I0NzZlaW5nZm04ZW5jejc3cWlyZDE1dTRseXFpM3g5NXE2MHBuNW82cWJzbWFsN2JpeGFubHdqMWphaXFhY3c2eWV0dWp3cjJ3MWdobXFwbnNueHRkczVlYnVjZmY5eSZlaWg9a3ptOG5zdGo2cHJtajdiaHo3c2p2dm55c3E3M2JhZ2hXA3NwY0IKYXbVMXlh-dXTuVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**.

The news about Fauci made me furious -- but it also made me more sure than ever that the work I am doing is important and necessary.

I was the first one in the U.S. Senate to question Fauci about his ties to the Wuhan lab.

And I led the way in sending a criminal referral against him to the Department of Justice after he blatantly lied to me.

_I know that if I keep telling the truth and asking the right questions, I will be vindicated -- and America will be better off_.

But I've learned the hard way on countless occasions that telling the truth can be a dangerous act, both personally and politically.

That's why I need you to stand with me today, Fellow Patriot.

**[If you support the work that I'm doing, and want it to continue, I ask that you support me with a generous contribution of $100, $50, $25, or $10](http://post.spmailtechnolo.com/f/a/6mF33Ao3LJUdZJrMZxv-_A~~/AARgdgA~/RgRjW7bPP0TyaHR0cDovL3RyYWNrLmFtZXJpY2FucGF0cmlvdGRhaWx5LmNvbS8_eHRsPXBuZmt4cTU2Z2Y5Y2M5aGYyNm50MWplMzg3NG02b2hpeW02c2Nya2kyZnZzNHUzazZ4M2NueXJmazdtNzZvdTNpeTU0ejJzYnlkamg5NTI0c2hsYThodjhnZjRoY3owMDY3ZnNyejZhb281aWs2aGRkc3plejRrcnBzNHF0NWZlbWlpdjR6Z3dmdjMzNmVkbjAydDVscXVvdDVnenhuZDcxMyZlaWg9a3ptOG5zdGo2cHJtajdiaHo3c2p2dm55c3E3M2JhZ2hXA3NwY0IKYXbVMXlh-dXTuVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**.

The Left is organizing against me, and getting stronger by the day. I must have help from patriots like you if I am going to continue this crucial work.

In Liberty,

U.S. Senator Rand Paul (R-KY)

P.S. The NIH admitted they funded gain-of-function research in Wuhan.

This proves that Fauci lied before the U.S. Senate.

_When I first exposed him for funding the Wuhan lab, the media called me crazy -- but now the truth is out and I am vindicated_.

Today, I am renewing my push for a criminal investigation of Anthony Fauci.

And if you support that work, I need you to stand with me immediately. Because the threats against me from the Left are endless.

**[Fellow Patriot, if you want my work to continue, please support me with a generous contribution of $100, $50, $25, or $10 right away](http://post.spmailtechnolo.com/f/a/ISzXxWUaIcx2K_C8m15XCQ~~/AARgdgA~/RgRjW7bPP0TyaHR0cDovL3RyYWNrLmFtZXJpY2FucGF0cmlvdGRhaWx5LmNvbS8_eHRsPXBuZmt4cTU2Z2Y5Y2M5aGYyNm50MWplMzg3NG02b2lncmFrOWYwMnJkdnJ3cXR6N3ppYnk0dDh4Z2Q1MGEzcHp3NGg1Mms0dWpiMnM5dGV1bXdkanhubnN3NDRkZ2gzaWQ2dHVibTAxdm81cjZqc2d2YnhhYXh3aDVsNmg5cjhoaDl5cnNnNjgyejN5bmN6bnhkeWh6N3VqdTVpeHppYXdmMCZlaWg9a3ptOG5zdGo2cHJtajdiaHo3c2p2dm55c3E3M2JhZ2hXA3NwY0IKYXbVMXlh-dXTuVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**.

And I refuse to let him off the hook! Fellow Patriot, I'm proud of the work that I've done exposing Fauci and holding him accountable. And I promise you this is only the beginning. If you support the work that I've been doing, I ask you to stand with me. The threats that I face are constant. And I need proud patriots like you to have my back if I'm going to continue this valuable work. ~. The news about Fauci made me furious -- but it also made me more sure than ever that the work I am doing is important and necessary. I was the first one in the U.S. Senate to question Fauci about his ties to the Wuhan lab. And I led the way in sending a criminal referral against him to the Department of Justice after he blatantly lied to me. I know that if I keep telling the truth and asking the right questions, I will be vindicated -- and America will be better off. But I've learned the hard way on countless occasions that telling the truth can be a dangerous act, both personally and politically. That's why I need you to stand with me today, Fellow Patriot. ~. The Left is organizing against me, and getting stronger by the day. I must have help from patriots like you if I am going to continue this crucial work. In Liberty, U.S. Senator Rand Paul (R-KY) P.S. The NIH admitted they funded gain-of-function research in Wuhan. This proves that Fauci lied before the U.S. Senate. When I first exposed him for funding the Wuhan lab, the media called me crazy -- but now the truth is out and I am vindicated. Today, I am renewing my push for a criminal investigation of Anthony Fauci. And if you support that work, I need you to stand with me immediately. Because the threats against me from the Left are endless. ~. | | Peter, 40,000 belligerent young men have recently joined up with far-right extremist group The Proud Boys, which now boasts well over 40 chapters nationwide. Look, these people aren't messing around. Donald Trump — who urged his Proud Boys supporters to storm the Capitol on January 6 and then delayed calling in the National Guard to give the Proud Boys time and cover — just tapped Herschel Walker to oust Raphael Warnock. And CBS News reports that in the first weeks of his campaign, Walker has raised an eye-popping $3.7 million. Hershel Walker easily inherited Donald Trump's riled up Proud Boys base. One of Walker's high-dollar donors— who had a swastika as her Twitter profile photo— said “I specifically chose that symbol as an artistic protest.” Now Walker refuses to apologize to the rightfully furious Jewish community. Raphael Warnock poses such a serious threat to the GOP establishment that Republicans are running anybody they can find who can galvanize Trump's best friends: The Proud Boys. Remember, members of The Proud Boys have repeatedly threatened Warnock's life online, writing “Dead men can't pass laws.” The Proud Boys represent the only path forward for the Party of Trump. And if Herschel Walker successfully steals Warnock's Senate seat, Mitch McConnell will regain control of the Senate overnight. That means: Goodbye, voting rights. Goodbye, gun reform. Hello, emboldened Proud Boys. Hello, Trump 2024. But CNN recently declared Warnock 2022's #1 most vulnerable Democrat. Now, we're doing everything we can to re-elect Warnock, and hundreds of people have donated, but up against Trump & Co's millions, progressives are in for the electoral fight of our lives. name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Democrats are blowing it in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Lynn for Congress
body:
This is the Republican party’s best shot at picking up a big win Dear friends,
Right now, I’m in the most competitive race of 2021 -- it’s a statistical TIE , and it’s Donald Trump and the Republican party’s best shot at picking up a big win before next year’s midterm.
My Trump-endorsed opponent, Glenn Youngkin, has promised to spend $75 million of his own fortune on buying the Virginia Governor’s office.
Youngkin’s a GOP extremist -- he was caught on video pledging to defund Planned Parenthood. He opposes Medicaid expansion, is anti-LGBTQ+, anti-woman, and pro-guns. His political mentor is Ted Cruz, and he’s been endorsed by Donald Trump SIX times.
So you can imagine how confused I am about why more people aren’t stepping up and donating. We’re blowing this one, friends.
We’re days away from Election Day, and we need to turn things around immediately. Will you step up and split a donation between my campaign and Eric Lynn's Congressional Campaign right now?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. Your contribution will be split evenly between Eric Lynn and Terry McAuliffe.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-mcauliffe2?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10] Express Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-mcauliffe2?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-mcauliffe2?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-mcauliffe2?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-mcauliffe2?express_lane=true&amoount=250&refcode=express_lane_250] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-mcauliffe2]I just don’t get how we’re letting Youngkin roll over us and outspend us. This is a must-win race, and we’ve got to stand up to this guy.
-- Terry McAuliffe

body:
{FirstName or 'Team'}},

As I’m sure you know, we’re facing a critical fundraising deadline on Sunday at midnight. I’m sorry to ask again, but I wanted to put this unique opportunity on your radar.

A generous group of donors (yes, this is real!) has agreed to MATCH all contributions up to $4,000 made in the next 24 hours.

This is a unique opportunity to double your impact on our movement. Please click here to chip in now and help us defeat Ron DeSantis. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-oct-match]

Ron DeSantis’ dangerous leadership continues to put Floridians at risk. From defunding our schools to calling a special session banning private employers from requiring vaccines, he’s more focused on scoring points with Fox News viewers than delivering for us.

DeSantis will spend $150 million on his re-election, and most of it will go towards attacking me. Every dollar we raise counts--and for the next 24 hours, yours counts twice as much.

Team, please click here to chip in $10 or whatever you can spare to help us defeat DeSantis and bring something new to Tallahassee. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-oct-match]

With Gratitude,

Nikki

body:
The GOP is waging all out war on the right to vote. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37989418/313491578/715298156?refcode=smp-em-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzBlMWMwNC0zZDM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ypkfxVCdGUVcVp9KtIuLoOG1jeNjwC6v-l2iDQLlwuU=)
Friends — Last week, Senate Republicans BLOCKED the _Freedom to Vote Act,_ a bill that would expand early and mail-in voting, same day voter registration, and access to the ballot box. It’s shameful but not surprising. This is exactly what Republicans were hoping to do. By refusing to pass this bill they are still able to cry fraud and promote their Big Lie. **The GOP is waging all out war on the right to vote and it’s time they paid the price for damaging our Democracy.** That’s why today we are calling on 1,000 Democrats to step up and chip in to defend the vote. If we can get a surge of support today it’ll go a long way towards kicking out some of these Republicans like Ron Johnson and Marco Rubio. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Eight presidential candidates and 1,000 cupcakes 🧁
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37989769/313491937/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk324-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzIyNWY5Mi0zZDM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AlwH3rJj7uZs5g_QV2vs-ehm27aBDeUClx9rGnTjMNM=)
Peter: I know that you've heard from me a lot recently about our race to defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA) – but today I have a special story to tell you and I hope you'll take a moment to read it.
If you know anything about Iowa politics, you know that we take our presidential caucuses – and all the festivities leading up to them – very seriously. So, back in 2019, when I had eight Democratic candidates and hundreds of voters attending my Finkenauer Fish Fry event, there was a bit of pressure, to say the least. People were going to be eager to talk politics – and just as eager to eat.
Thankfully, I come from a family that knows the meaning of hard work – and the importance of showing up for each other when we need it.
So when I asked for my mom's help, she was there. **My mom baked nearly 1,000 cupcakes for our guests – chocolate, pumpkin, red velvet, you name it.** And when she ran out of space to store them in our freezer, she used my dad's pickup truck, the cold weather and some classic Iowan problem-solving to improvise a second freezer to fit them all.
But trust me, 1,000 cupcakes are nothing compared to everything my family has done for me – I wouldn't be where I am today without them. They taught me the value of hard work and the power of a scrappy, passionate team. **That's how I became the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue – and it's how I'm going to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley to become the youngest woman elected to the Senate.**
Listen, the numbers are on our side: Nearly two-thirds of voters here don't want to reelect Sen. Grassley. We can win but only with hardworking people like you who care about flipping this seat blue, fighting for working families and protecting our Senate majority. **[That's why today I'm asking you to make a contribution to my campaign of $5, or whatever you can spare, so that we have the resources to defeat Sen. Grassley, bring new leadership to Iowa and protect our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37989770/313491938/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk324-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzIyNWY5Mi0zZDM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AlwH3rJj7uZs5g_QV2vs-ehm27aBDeUClx9rGnTjMNM=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37989771/313491939/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk324-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzIyNWY5Mi0zZDM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AlwH3rJj7uZs5g_QV2vs-ehm27aBDeUClx9rGnTjMNM=)
---
I know that we're going to win this thing – one dollar, or one cupcake, at a time. Thank you for standing with me.

– Abby
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37989772/313491940/496662621?refcode=jtk324-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzIyNWY5Mi0zZDM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AlwH3rJj7uZs5g_QV2vs-ehm27aBDeUClx9rGnTjMNM=&emci=2b26d8c4-b935-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=23225f92-3d37-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13784334#!).

name: David and Ian, Never Again PAC
subject: This fight isn't just about our democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
In a moment, we're going to ask you to chip in to help us hit our end-of-month fundraising goal, but first we wanted to explain why our work is so important and share a side to the January 6 attack that we feel isn't talked about enough. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37990986/313495587/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhZGIwN2Y5LTNlMzctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BnH7HPwS1Ri8kh45Fjmux_sVQYUSHaZZEY-f7FoXmHQ=&emci=8bc04638-2e37-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=0adb07f9-3e37-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=16335001) Team,

In a moment, we're going to ask you to **[chip in to help us hit our end-of-month fundraising goal](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37990987/313495588/566294061?refcode=em21_211027_eom1_fnd_gq_act___di_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211027_eom1_fnd_gq_act___di_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhZGIwN2Y5LTNlMzctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BnH7HPwS1Ri8kh45Fjmux_sVQYUSHaZZEY-f7FoXmHQ=)** , but first we wanted to explain why our work is so important and share a side to the January 6 attack that we feel isn't talked about enough.

We all know how devastating Trump's Big Lie and the events of January 6 have been for our nation's democracy, and how ever since, our democracy has remained at risk. But today we want to talk about the people who were in the Capitol during the insurrection and the painful impact it has left on them.

From members of Congress to aides to police officers, hundreds of lives were changed on January 6. Here are a few quotes from the people who were in the Capitol on that day: "I’m always constantly thinking to myself, “What could I have done differently? What could we have done differently?” It’s still a hard question to answer. Until I get a clear answer, **it’s always going to haunt me.** "
\-- Captain Carneysha Mendoza "A lot of the members and senators who voted against certifying the election that I feel are responsible, along with former President Trump, are just getting a pass [...] **There are still remnants of trauma and fear that these people are still allowed to be here. And they could be plotting another one.** "
\-- Remington Belford, communications director for Rep. Yvette Clarke "I felt like I was fighting for my life. My mentality was, “I’ve got to make it home.” I can tell you, legitimately, **I did not think I was going to make it home.** "
\-- Officer James Blassingame This is why we're doing the work. Not only to protect our democracy, but to get justice for those who were injured, killed, or traumatized by the violent attack. We're fighting to hold the parties responsible for January 6 accountable, and ensure the members of Congress who attacked our democracy are voted out of office -- but we need your help.

**[Will you chip in before our end-of-month fundraising deadline on October 31 to join us in the fight for justice and our democracy?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37990988/313495589/566294061?refcode=em21_211027_eom1_fnd_gq_act___di_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211027_eom1_fnd_gq_act___di_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhZGIwN2Y5LTNlMzctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BnH7HPwS1Ri8kh45Fjmux_sVQYUSHaZZEY-f7FoXmHQ=)**

Thanks,

David and Ian
Co-Founders
Never Again PAC Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from the 147 Republican members of Congress who sought to overturn the results of a free and fair election. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37990989/313495590/566294061?refcode=em21_211027_eom1_fnd_gq_act___di_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211027_eom1_fnd_gq_act___di_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhZGIwN2Y5LTNlMzctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BnH7HPwS1Ri8kh45Fjmux_sVQYUSHaZZEY-f7FoXmHQ=)
---

---

PO Box 2153
Purcellville, VA 20134
United States

name: Michael, Finance Director
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona

Hey friend,

I wanted to give you a quick update on how Team Engel's finances are looking. Earlier this month, our third quarter fundraising numbers were released.

**The good news is we've raised more than any other Democrat in the race.** In fact, Kirsten raised more than prolific fundraisers like Congresswoman Kirkpatrick did at this time last cycle. So, again we say thank you!

**The bad news is Republicans have raised even more.** The GOP has placed Gov. Ducey's right-hand man, Juan Ciscomani, on their "Young Guns" list of candidates they're supporting in the most competitive races in the country. Wealthy special interests, super PACs, and ultra conservative donors have noticed, and flooded his campaign with cash.

**We don't have corporate super PACs and the 1% -- we have you! And trust me, Kirsten wouldn't want it any other way. **

But that also means I need to come to you today with a big ask:

[**_Will you join our campaign as a sustaining donor and give $25 per month to help us fight back against this wave of Republican money?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37991417/313496221/41694283?refcode=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-for-arizona-1refcode=X_102721_$25Monthly&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWRiYzczMC0zZjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kp3ovUQHpETtEOE2CTJc5YLsNBtBp1fJByhVabnfuYw=)

You might think $25 isn't much, considering how expensive campaigns have gotten. But I'll let you in on a little secret: we LOVE small dollar donations. In fact 85% of our contributions are $100 or less, and the median donation is $25.

**So how about it? Can we count on you to chip in $25 per month to keep this seat blue?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37991418/313496222/558373307?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=X_102721_$25Monthly&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWRiYzczMC0zZjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kp3ovUQHpETtEOE2CTJc5YLsNBtBp1fJByhVabnfuYw=)

-Michael Toppen,
Finance Director

body:
Have you noticed bare shelves at your favorite stores lately? [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=4f79f1272e3f43968e7d80edfd8962b4&_e=pq4riVTNs6aMBZ2sxbMV9NjMgSxy9T2vDXivCbVicorjPPyw4CtE0xPVcR-ZGqapPGAx9PaNFgYm4ec1_f78hv1kiwM-RQlgIGZrGuY05VsP4nFwClh3b9gfV8t2giNsFJ2Bj_NQdhzuuKOAxsKKBarMPYSS3n586-u7gw2WbUfXlvhM81EeWVHvuajp-hfzod-0Cau-24DWrSZAumm1fpSTBEnwdbxLJSMGXmBeFVn8J1DZ9bX_vBrT_0Ng20XFRLRZQObZ1QHsvzXvsCjzypuKLKsP58o05k8yY5ZokOynGA2PJQV_YvWAB34Wqj5g) Hi Friend, Have you noticed bare shelves at your favorite stores lately? **You can thank Joe Biden for that. ** Across the country small businesses like mine are feeling the crunch as containers sit stacked in ports and ships wait for days at a time to move cargo. **](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=4f79f1272e3f43968e7d80edfd8962b4&_e=pq4riVTNs6aMBZ2sxbMV9NjMgSxy9T2vDXivCbVicorjPPyw4CtE0xPVcR-ZGqapPGAx9PaNFgYm4ec1_f78hv1kiwM-RQlgIGZrGuY05VufqlA9GgJSV6_sSeEwplt5TmA6FJqt-KA6jWpqhX56HQMtVYNGseZq1jrtWcwgAAIgFFFR2FMgCZWjdtMnHVVHzlPGfg2-wfVDappeV_X2wofz_ucn5mW5-zjncY5F6MT5tzHPz7yxL6F1c9CQzmuk3RbfD5SfN3_moQ-3KxCjeCwl5JIl4og3PR2kTR-9cpbswAh-4y0NS-sicpbGP2Jl) Even in the stores that have been able to keep their shelves stocked, customers are facing sticker shock as the price of common goods drastically rises. Bad news if you like steak – meat prices are up 10.5% this year alone, making this **literally** a red-meat issue. Whether you are a business owner or a family trying to keep food on the table, **everyone is feeling the squeeze from Biden’s supply-chain crisis.** I’m ready to go to Washington D.C. and fight for small businesses and families. We need common-sense leaders with common-sense solutions, **not multi-trillion dollar spending sprees. ** [**_Could you please consider generously donating $100, $50, $25, or even $10 to help me get to Washington to_ _FIGHT_** _****for Florida families?****_](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=4f79f1272e3f43968e7d80edfd8962b4&_e=pq4riVTNs6aMBZ2sxbMV9NjMgSxy9T2vDXivCbVicorjPPyw4CtE0xPVcR-ZGqapPGAx9PaNFgYm4ec1_f78hv1kiwM-RQlgIGZrGuY05VtFKtRzajunmjiPQEPevJqO-zhHEG0sursfE027Oz_SDW6_OEXyErVmCwQO_jRCUsJUBNICap18fkCpLMXnQQyoUdH0oUfadstjKsbTcFJwlM9RlIZbCBZDLyHcgqciQWPfTLOJx3PJllYqAWvE0LcVOMOR450MgpAlQP6aWxONmwTbg5sjTyNLZqmXA_ETKph3zzql8ChH8nMvECzanX7L) It’s not too late to turn this economy around, but it will take fighters like you and me to stand up to Joe Biden and his destructive agenda. name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: Investigated for a 5th time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR
body:
they keep coming after me | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2b6c4a459fb7/investigated-for-a-5th-time?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

For a FIFTH time, the Board of Medical practice is being used as a weapon and investigating my medical license. I’m not backing down, and they’re not going to win. And this is why I’m running for Governor — because I want to change government so that what they’re trying to do to me _doesn’t happen to you_. In nearly every respect, government has encroached on our lives and made us less prosperous and less free. Under the guise of "safety" or "preventing misinformation", they continue to target and demonize good people. [I need you now more than ever](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=03b553d613&e=33b11688c1) because this campaign is about standing up for those who are targeted and can't defend themselves!

Please watch my video response by clicking the thumbnail below:
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=a80885dfff&e=33b11688c1)
---
| Sometimes, it's hard to believe I won MN Family Physician of the Year five short years ago. I've since become one of the most investigated doctors in the country. And for what? Because I maintain that medical freedom is one of the most important issues of our time. It is immensely difficult to regain your freedoms once they're taken away. We saw that in Minnesota with Tim Walz's draconian lockdown policies and we continue to see it across the globe!

I will never stop standing for health freedom, supporting our cops, making sure students are the priority, and securing our elections! They can send the mob or they can weaponize government, but we must all fight for a more free Minnesota. [I'm in this no matter the slings and arrows that come. Are you?](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=16a98819f9&e=33b11688c1)

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota
---
| | | | | | | [](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=01c4bd9f58&e=33b11688c1)
---
| | [](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=12c3a94f5b&e=33b11688c1)

| | [](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=c3428c144a&e=33b11688c1)

clean_body: they keep coming after me | | | | | | | Peter, For a FIFTH time, the Board of Medical practice is being used as a weapon and investigating my medical license. I’m not backing down, and they’re not going to win. And this is why I’m running for Governor — because I want to change government so that what they’re trying to do to me doesn’t happen to you. In nearly every respect, government has encroached on our lives and made us less prosperous and less free. Under the guise of "safety" or "preventing misinformation", they continue to target and demonize good people. because this campaign is about standing up for those who are targeted and can't defend themselves! Please watch my video response by clicking the thumbnail below: | | Sometimes, it's hard to believe I won MN Family Physician of the Year five short years ago. I've since become one of the most investigated doctors in the country. And for what? Because I maintain that medical freedom is one of the most important issues of our time. It is immensely difficult to regain your freedoms once they're taken away. We saw that in Minnesota with Tim Walz's draconian lockdown policies and we continue to see it across the globe! I will never stop standing for health freedom, supporting our cops, making sure students are the priority, and securing our elections! They can send the mob or they can weaponize government, but we must all fight for a more free Minnesota. In Freedom, Dr. Scott Jensen Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Dr Scott Jensen for Governor, All rights reserved. PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR. SCOTT JENSEN FOR GOVERNOR.

name: Erik Aadland
subject: Will you hold the Democrats accountable for the border crisis?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AADLAND for Senate
body:
Congressional Republicans, Governors, and grassroots patriots agree. We have a border crisis. Why can’t liberals see that? |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81fa2fc84c4149488d39bcd5f08c8f42&_e=yUGTwr_5oBJw-UQ3zzOy0-TjCByDP3_azlIRqy1_fviugwtY0hLxlMgtMPu1d0v1JbhAislCR5aOU10vc3BDqW6SegbNSENtvarF-ukv4x51tUy8hESKKB3IZNsl0u4aJfCJHVtjezyGBJkXDOKN-KWLfbK1-EY0_ZrkeN4lm4rXqEdixmo7DPJIys8gLYzS7Qfp47aEzhFa4PBrBOD73Q3lrJdW0T7gm0OVK87xBy-o91Hkgf1pw05SzYqYCH2n6rMtigce4b7nUPqYT6pcgExdeOjHejpyj9n7yIzctl_NgDc-5wVJiWdVURqpB3KcLOWw2z1SMalrL5kUTuYf1B5T83fmuDpOmBVCW6J2y3ktHe3mDS_uyuSiCRTyXAaJSw3UEJmH3cwrKzgYazGAuJDESPO2MOPwXMZqvZWUH3Y%3D)

---
Fellow American,

Anybody who cares about the state of our country knows that we have a crisis at the border. We’re seeing historic surges of illegal immigrants migrating to our borders like never before.

Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer don’t care if they have Covid, if they have a criminal history, and they don’t care if their asylum claims are real. They just care about whatever gives Democrats votes and power.

We cannot allow this crisis to continue. [**We need to fight for our border patrol agents being handicapped by Joe Biden, and we need win back the Senate so we can give America real solutions for the Border Crisis.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81fa2fc84c4149488d39bcd5f08c8f42&_e=yUGTwr_5oBJw-UQ3zzOy0-TjCByDP3_azlIRqy1_fviugwtY0hLxlMgtMPu1d0v1JbhAislCR5aOU10vc3BDqW6SegbNSENtvarF-ukv4x51tUy8hESKKB3IZNsl0u4aJfCJHVtjezyGBJkXDOKN-KWLfbK1-EY0_ZrkeN4lm4rXqEdixmo7DPJIys8gLYzS7Qfp47aEzhFa4PBrBOD73dexpsiqyQ6Z6cDSVjhjDnaA9FGPJqMWY6tZbFK7NRzx8qIw1EkTDKESr0vIheHHseX3ICxarmFOodFZzVWqJ7EJtwKOULpXGolTQThMDkDtDI1Md7T93US-CYHqccwbYxiQsuaFhn4hx3Jn-hTXNNnx_R3dmPwdYIoctvA9HwGloMSIv1fL8eBu00eNvzLa0CTyO9RmPG9G1Acieg-eDds%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81fa2fc84c4149488d39bcd5f08c8f42&_e=yUGTwr_5oBJw-UQ3zzOy0-TjCByDP3_azlIRqy1_fviugwtY0hLxlMgtMPu1d0v1JbhAislCR5aOU10vc3BDqW6SegbNSENtvarF-ukv4x51tUy8hESKKB3IZNsl0u4aJfCJHVtjezyGBJkXDOKN-KWLfbK1-EY0_ZrkeN4lm4rXqEdixmo7DPJIys8gLYzS7Qfp47aEzhFa4PBrBOD73RPzmbLAIvGzGuxUZ9QfH41FssjcChNjJKbHBzI3QD2XoKx8-dxzS_u2qUKPBQ5mD5WdtKP4dUKPwEQS-1wljXdc7VUR4s-J6oGVqEZiHaGkjlmd_Gj_VbR1hVXOns7EhvUhTpzTihREVHTnDEwnwdlXe-Wy9x8ZmTRZKppg0uoDf3CNrtYKfOmBQVXzdKb7D1lPTXP1KYXNwolKtSWFGPM%3D)

_**Republicans have solutions.**_ We want to fix the border once and for all. Democrats on the other hand want to ignore the crisis for as long as possible.

[**If you want to see an end to the Border Crisis and real action on illegal immigration, then help me be the reason Republicans win back the Senate. Chip in anything you can - $10, $20, whatever it is, it can be the difference between winning and losing.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81fa2fc84c4149488d39bcd5f08c8f42&_e=yUGTwr_5oBJw-UQ3zzOy0-TjCByDP3_azlIRqy1_fviugwtY0hLxlMgtMPu1d0v1JbhAislCR5aOU10vc3BDqW6SegbNSENtvarF-ukv4x51tUy8hESKKB3IZNsl0u4aJfCJHVtjezyGBJkXDOKN-KWLfbK1-EY0_ZrkeN4lm4rXqEdixmo7DPJIys8gLYzS7Qfp47aEzhFa4PBrBOD73ZZj8Wvl7dJb-vtc9uuQB3WWtx93Q0sKBXOj84986IQf1S8tRG7LiGMWOAjf5831sWJxc2xfjLsNW1YnOuWbEMpL0EhZRKuUJlage78-mKi1PKtsamKwu0LcfhEAw2Yoq7zcidll5u_Puh_2AMH9rvTv8MawAgxiF-zPuOC4_DtDSrbs_eenhGcCGdcSbqHQ_pPnD_l6EdrbsK2E5y4XxKU%3D)

The liberals in power are not going to take action. **All they want to do is send Kamala Harris to the wrong part of the border just for a photo-op.**

[**Join me Fellow American, and be part of the solution**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81fa2fc84c4149488d39bcd5f08c8f42&_e=yUGTwr_5oBJw-UQ3zzOy0-TjCByDP3_azlIRqy1_fviugwtY0hLxlMgtMPu1d0v1JbhAislCR5aOU10vc3BDqW6SegbNSENtvarF-ukv4x51tUy8hESKKB3IZNsl0u4aJfCJHVtjezyGBJkXDOKN-KWLfbK1-EY0_ZrkeN4lm4rXqEdixmo7DPJIys8gLYzS7Qfp47aEzhFa4PBrBOD73fSxv7pDnPkKy6nUSfT0TBDsbeCoEiGjsE2dm8k23KW4gZjrWDCcAbEm6J2qLk8obQRJUCXdOYj-za69hWynM6702dgaPKHa8rYAkPxM7VPm2TCvZHzM9-mz_hCHUWXkpc71aotpAoCkx8znYHGJkqLwvpiEg4i07J4WsGDDuapBziSqekEJ2CCwV4ombi1tZ7wun4ZBUTyiJ9Lg3_MzXQ8%3D), because right now our national security depends on it.

Thank you,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81fa2fc84c4149488d39bcd5f08c8f42&_e=yUGTwr_5oBJw-UQ3zzOy0-TjCByDP3_azlIRqy1_fviugwtY0hLxlMgtMPu1d0v1JbhAislCR5aOU10vc3BDqW6SegbNSENtvarF-ukv4x51tUy8hESKKB3IZNsl0u4aJfCJHVtjezyGBJkXDOKN-KWLfbK1-EY0_ZrkeN4lm4rXqEdixmo7DPJIys8gLYzS7Qfp47aEzhFa4PBrBOD73dCHRFoN4VecRr83HivSChhsM5LwCuQJSzy3Ylry1knwcornT4GpPPq6tVrAkUdrmxC3MI911xVbLdO-kIbR73Wnre9W7v28OF4451N-1oWBXX9-XZw58zxd4om6_bcGH_f6Rj3jg4Zt9cLclxobWQyuTH5Z3oYAoyOlzovqAdqvDVv5ti9TR_U1W9vY4IP-M9SMP5CyD0-EmoijBT0hnnQ%3D)
**Erik Aadland for U.S. Senate**

* * *
Erik Aadland is a father, a West Point graduate, a former Army officer, and steadfast conservative. He served valiantly in combat operations in Iraq and Afghanistan, and now he's running to represent Colorado in the United States Senate. If you believe America deserves less politicians and more public servants, [**please support Erik Aadland for U.S. Senate.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=81fa2fc84c4149488d39bcd5f08c8f42&_e=yUGTwr_5oBJw-UQ3zzOy0-TjCByDP3_azlIRqy1_fviugwtY0hLxlMgtMPu1d0v1JbhAislCR5aOU10vc3BDqW6SegbNSENtvarF-ukv4x51tUy8hESKKB3IZNsl0u4aJfCJHVtjezyGBJkXDOKN-KWLfbK1-EY0_ZrkeN4lm4rXqEdixmo7DPJIys8gLYzS7Qfp47aEzhFa4PBrBOD73bz6sUazOmTyLmJfnR7keLtFjwAa4vrXc9SWrGIM0Ag6hltsGAtYZQ1eL7lVfw-nR3Rzg3EzMJPAUZLq0ea8IbKFJ-7amwt82LfG-rol3gd4RlY4oaXVy_EW8iR4Q41ZNV1R3ok6Z-0OihquZMJM1TxnW7BzqOHRFbFipbB0BtwcFiSBU_DRgA0_0d1WLPoS2VcpjebKf3sOE_gJ1Gn0AME%3D)

subject: You drive = You Pay!
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
---
|
---
|

| Friend
Let's be blunt here, the Biden/Murray spending bill is out of control!
It is completely unaffordable for Washington State. The tax on gas will destroy everyone. Our farmers soon won't be able to work, our truck drivers won't be able to work, those who commute long distances will feel the impact, even a parent driving their child to school will feel the hit in their pocket.
[On top of that, the Democrats want to tax you for every mile you drive. That's crazy!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O6a9zrM_KJd1VL0ukVb250UltkM7pdT4Kws4ZfIn737UKW47JC9-Iys656CW-mTxAFFVD78VMMq0WyQ6TYyIy5DP3--fh5_YMYXspOttRDiMdHpB8NWKSKeKXf7wNv8BwpkSkAiRmqQYYeMmVWY3IWWtmqM5ihxtVJWraczBpUK9FBsJYBI8fnHxxDEFOkVFtgbZRq1M9PE=&c=0DWb4WmYHlcQlbIDAmTVjNp5XR7vwBG5xHL8BlmBRk_qSa3umhi3UQ==&ch=cWNaXKQYcpVezXf35TzJoE72f0WJS2qkKeDdxco6LK7nIwv2N8UdKQ==)

---
| | | [STOP the spending bill, STOP the democrats, STOP Patty Murray](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O6a9zrM_KJd1VL0ukVb250UltkM7pdT4Kws4ZfIn737UKW47JC9-Iys656CW-mTxAFFVD78VMMq0WyQ6TYyIy5DP3--fh5_YMYXspOttRDiMdHpB8NWKSKeKXf7wNv8BwpkSkAiRmqQYYeMmVWY3IWWtmqM5ihxtVJWraczBpUK9FBsJYBI8fnHxxDEFOkVFtgbZRq1M9PE=&c=0DWb4WmYHlcQlbIDAmTVjNp5XR7vwBG5xHL8BlmBRk_qSa3umhi3UQ==&ch=cWNaXKQYcpVezXf35TzJoE72f0WJS2qkKeDdxco6LK7nIwv2N8UdKQ==)
---
| And as if taxing your mileage isn't enough, when asked about the high gas prices, Biden himself [admitted](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O6a9zrM_KJd1VL0ukVb250UltkM7pdT4Kws4ZfIn737UKW47JC9-Iys656CW-mTxxLMfnLAcoaoh5uUquWkT6gry9RQ-wY6QXPDRPiC5z3xwR32Jv15NB05g8h_WrHvMqY3FkWDVy-rDUXCdB0L7wyGHkF-WQd8wVyHgfqgb0Z4p5w27XU_ogo7wmSNtXFlwxaEkJyDP0BHtNrix2SXDZupeVI2kVPtmsLDqaErCH64Mcm-05G7VYZ_YT8ayQDxvzRFDV7IcPk-wDpn9fvvgt1gcuIzN51oUaEVVHECQxDC5tgEf2RMlgj55WklPyIBI&c=0DWb4WmYHlcQlbIDAmTVjNp5XR7vwBG5xHL8BlmBRk_qSa3umhi3UQ==&ch=cWNaXKQYcpVezXf35TzJoE72f0WJS2qkKeDdxco6LK7nIwv2N8UdKQ==):
"I don't have a near-term answer" for high gas prices. He continued with, "My guess is, you'll start to see gas prices come down as we get by and going into the winter - I mean, excuse me, into next year, 2022."
This is completely UNACCEPTABLE! Hard working families in Washington cannot wait until next winter for a solution to high gas prices from Biden. We need meaningful change RIGHT NOW.
[Help elect Tiffany Smiley to represent us in Washington by making a contribution today! >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O6a9zrM_KJd1VL0ukVb250UltkM7pdT4Kws4ZfIn737UKW47JC9-Iys656CW-mTxAFFVD78VMMq0WyQ6TYyIy5DP3--fh5_YMYXspOttRDiMdHpB8NWKSKeKXf7wNv8BwpkSkAiRmqQYYeMmVWY3IWWtmqM5ihxtVJWraczBpUK9FBsJYBI8fnHxxDEFOkVFtgbZRq1M9PE=&c=0DWb4WmYHlcQlbIDAmTVjNp5XR7vwBG5xHL8BlmBRk_qSa3umhi3UQ==&ch=cWNaXKQYcpVezXf35TzJoE72f0WJS2qkKeDdxco6LK7nIwv2N8UdKQ==)

Friend,
The right to FREE SPEECH outlined in the First Amendment of the Constitution **no longer exists**.

That was made clear this past week when conservative Congressman Jim Banks became Twitter’s newest target and silenced him for his _personal_ opinion.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Please take my Trump Poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
We need 2,578 more conservatives to take our trump poll today

|
---

Peter,

Recently my team and I sent you an email asking for you to help us better understand the direction which the Republican Party is headed. More pointedly, **[we asked you to weigh in on whether or not you consider President Trump the leader of the Republican Party.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59043752:W1BV7LHNn:m:1:2247059263:2A69BCA4CF44FA95BB97DFAD7443F1A9:r)**

My team just delivered a preliminary report to me and we're not seeing the results we were hoping for. **We set a goal of finding 50,000 conservatives to vote in our poll - the more votes the more accurate the findings - and we're coming up 2,578 votes short. **

Peter, your name is not on my list as having voted. **[Would you do me a personal favor and cast your vote in my poll before midnight tonight?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59043751:W1BV7LHNn:m:1:2247059263:2A69BCA4CF44FA95BB97DFAD7443F1A9:r)**

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59043751:W1BV7LHNn:m:1:2247059263:2A69BCA4CF44FA95BB97DFAD7443F1A9:r)
You see, the earlier we can determine the direction in which Republican voters want the party to go - and the leaders who voters want to be at the helm -- _**the sooner we can fine-tune our plans to help take back the House majority in next year's midterm elections**_.

We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. **[Will you take a moment to cast yours now?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59043751:W1BV7LHNn:m:1:2247059263:2A69BCA4CF44FA95BB97DFAD7443F1A9:r)**

We need to know whether or not you're going to stand with our Party leadership - **including President Trump** - as we work to take back the house from socialist-sympathizing Democrats next year.

| [**Take My Trump Poll Today ➔**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59043751:W1BV7LHNn:m:1:2247059263:2A69BCA4CF44FA95BB97DFAD7443F1A9:r)
---

For freedom,
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59043751:W1BV7LHNn:m:1:2247059263:2A69BCA4CF44FA95BB97DFAD7443F1A9:r)
Jim Jordan

Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

Delaware, OH 43015

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Here’s why your contribution matters:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, I want to tell you why your support to our campaign – even $3 – matters, especially right now: — Last election, my opponent, aided by allies of President Trump, raised over $4 million to defeat me. – We are expecting another expensive race in the coming months, as Trump once again escalates his attacks. – And we may have an even more challenging race in a brand new district as a result of reapportionment. **We need to prepare right now. And I’m asking you to make a monthly contribution. Why a monthly donation? Because knowing that we have a certain amount coming in each month helps us plan ahead, prepare mail and television in advance, know when we can afford to begin our field operations, and more. Even if it is a small amount each month, your monthly contribution will give us the ability to chart our campaign expenditures all along the way.** | | [MAKE A MONTHLY $3 CONTRIBUTION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37995026/313506054/-1525290910?firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=true&amount=3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_ND_20211027_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzEwZjgzZC00NjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gJJOQFzSPZj_Dvw9oyWvy89IuPRdTBj68-j5yItZ294=)
---
Let me take a step back to tell you why I’m reaching out with this ask of you, and why your support is so imperative. In 2008, California voters passed Prop. 11, which created an independent citizen’s redistricting commission to draw the lines for all congressional districts.
In 2011, it drew new maps for every single district in California. That’s the right policy and something that should be replicated in every single state (and something we’re pushing for).
But it caused some members – particularly in California – to have to run against each other. Others to run in districts composed of voters who didn’t know them. And others to have to spend millions to protect against Republicans determined to make the most of the once-in-a-decade opportunity to beat Democrats.
Already, the Commission is discussing maps that would significantly change almost every single district in California, including mine. My district could be combined with another, split into many pieces, or become a more conservative seat and pit me against another Trump Republican. We just don’t know. But we do know it could be extremely difficult.
We don’t have the luxury to wait until new maps are released in January. [**_We need to prepare right now._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37995027/313506055/-1525290910?recurring=true&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_ND_20211027_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzEwZjgzZC00NjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gJJOQFzSPZj_Dvw9oyWvy89IuPRdTBj68-j5yItZ294=)
Listen, last election cycle, I faced a far-right Trump opponent who raised over $4 million to defeat me. He went on TV and radio with ads attacking my character. He sent vicious attack mailers with false smears. And he spread lies and conspiracy theories about me across the district. Those took a real toll.
And this cycle, I’ll likely have to face numerous opponents only four months after we get the new maps. It could be a perfect storm, and we don’t have the luxury to wait and hope for the best.
That’s where you come in.
Even if you have never donated to our grassroots campaign before, just $3 a month could go a long way. It will allow me to introduce myself to potentially hundreds of thousands of new voters. It will allow us to invest in digital resources to reach new voters. And more.
**Your support has never been more important than right now, and I need your help. Can you chip in a $3 monthly contribution to our grassroots campaign today?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | **[DONATE $3 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37995028/313506056/-1525290910?express_lane=true&amount=3&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=true&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_ND_20211027_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzEwZjgzZC00NjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gJJOQFzSPZj_Dvw9oyWvy89IuPRdTBj68-j5yItZ294=)**

But it caused some members – particularly in California – to have to run against each other. Others to run in districts composed of voters who didn’t know them. And others to have to spend millions to protect against Republicans determined to make the most of the once-in-a-decade opportunity to beat Democrats. Already, the Commission is discussing maps that would significantly change almost every single district in California, including mine. My district could be combined with another, split into many pieces, or become a more conservative seat and pit me against another Trump Republican. We just don’t know. But we do know it could be extremely difficult. We don’t have the luxury to wait until new maps are released in January. = Listen, last election cycle, I faced a far-right Trump opponent who raised over $4 million to defeat me. He went on TV and radio with ads attacking my character. He sent vicious attack mailers with false smears. And he spread lies and conspiracy theories about me across the district. Those took a real toll. And this cycle, I’ll likely have to face numerous opponents only four months after we get the new maps. It could be a perfect storm, and we don’t have the luxury to wait and hope for the best. That’s where you come in. Even if you have never donated to our grassroots campaign before, just $3 a month could go a long way. It will allow me to introduce myself to potentially hundreds of thousands of new voters. It will allow us to invest in digital resources to reach new voters. And more. Your support has never been more important than right now, and I need your help. Can you chip in a $3 monthly contribution to our grassroots campaign today? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** I can’t thank you enough for your support. I feel grateful for it each and every day. — Adam Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress Schiff for Congress 150 E. Olive Ave. Suite 208 Burbank, CA 91502 United States

Hey team,

There’s fresh news out of the depositions in the redistricting lawsuits, and it's nothing short of appalling. Let’s talk about what we’ve learned.

Secretary LaRose's role on the Ohio Redistricting Commission is specifically to help balance out state legislators from drawing maps according to their own self-interests. **But instead, he took his aide's advice that voting against the maps was "probably not worth it."** He had the ability to vote against maps that he knew were unfair. He declined. He knew that the maps were drawn unfairly. He refused to demand bipartisanship.

**Ohioans want and deserve a Secretary of State who works past party politics to defend our democracy, and that’s clearly not the kind of person we have in office right now. Election Day is just one week away, and we need your help.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37995499/313508574/691373675?refcode=EM_FR_211027EDay3_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_TESTB_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjM5NDI0ZC00NzM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uIv9Tj-Z58HOxkncZYRAbADXMWpcW0hJDzbWbR4hGEA=) Team — for almost a decade, I’ve been fighting for Ohioans that have been left behind for too long.

clean_body: Election Day is just one week away, and we need your help. = Team — for almost a decade, I’ve been fighting for Ohioans that have been left behind for too long. At a young age, my mother instilled in me that everyone deserves equal respect and kindness regardless of their differences. Today, the principles and values she taught me are the foundation of my public service. From declaring racism as a public health crisis to expanding Universal Pre-K in Cuyahoga County, everyone deserves a fair shake at life. Now, I’m taking those same principles and values with me to Congress. With only six days until Election Day, we need to raise $2,500 more by Thursday night to invest directly into our Get Out The Vote efforts. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = When I head to Congress, first up on my list of priorities is to secure high-quality, accessible health care for all, create good-paying jobs that invest in their employees, and deliver justice for millions of marginalized Americans. = Alongside President Biden and the Democratic majority in Congress, I’ll work to create strong coalitions to pass legislation to instill the equitable values we need to create a brighter future for us all. = = Let’s finish this, Shontel Brown As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent that last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As the next Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. Will you join her and be the change we need? = Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress PO Box 221232 Beachwood, OH 44122 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: Countdown to Election Day 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| | There isn't much time left, so I'll make this quick.

Virginians have already begun casting their ballots and there are just 6 days left until Election Day.

If Clinton-ally Terry McAuliffe wins this race, there will be dire consequences for Virginia. He's bad on crime, bad for our economy, and bad for our schools.

If I'm elected, on day one I'll cut exploding costs for families, defend our police instead of defunding them, jumpstart job growth, and ban Critical Race Theory.

_**[If you have anything to spare, I'm asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58620648:JhFsvJ2N6:m:1:3253819041:29AD0169C446D49E8D47491D4208DBFE:r "If you have anything to spare, I’m asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.")**_

---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58620648:JhFsvJ2N6:m:1:3253819041:29AD0169C446D49E8D47491D4208DBFE:r)
---

All eyes are on Virginia. The results of this election will be used as a guide map for what could follow in next year's midterms.

If Republicans _win_ , it will be a huge blow to the Democrats' hopes of holding onto their majority. But if Republicans _lose_ , Democrats will leverage our loss for their own gain.

We _can_ win. In fact, the latest polls have me and McAuliffe neck-and-neck.

**This race will come down to the final get-out-the-vote efforts.** Every single dollar could impact how many more doors we can knock, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach.

_**[So, can I please count on you to pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $1?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58620648:JhFsvJ2N6:m:1:3253819041:29AD0169C446D49E8D47491D4208DBFE:r "So, can I please count on you to pitch in anything you’re able ASAP, even if it’s just $1?")**_

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

Sincerely,

Glenn Youngkin
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58620648:JhFsvJ2N6:m:1:3253819041:29AD0169C446D49E8D47491D4208DBFE:r)
---

Image")
---
_**EXCLUSIVE MESSAGE FROM NIKKI HALEY:**_

I'm focused on helping Republicans win the next election and I want YOU to play an important part. This is a great opportunity to support political leaders who believe America is inherently good, and who understand that the Democrats' far-left policies undermine our freedoms and American values.

Please help me fight back against the Democrats and their radical agenda. We can only defeat them if we stand united.

**[Will you join my team today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58620649:JhFsvJ2N6:m:1:3253819041:29AD0169C446D49E8D47491D4208DBFE:r "Will you join
my team today?")**

| | | [JOIN NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58620649:JhFsvJ2N6:m:1:3253819041:29AD0169C446D49E8D47491D4208DBFE:r "JOIN NOW")

Terry’s opponent isn’t just proud to have Donald Trump’s endorsement; he supported Donald Trump’s anti-democratic conspiracy theories about the 2020 election. Friend,

subject: Protect our progress in Washington state
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot.
#
Peter,
I’m always grateful for this team’s support. Together, we turned the U.S. Senate blue in 2020. **Now, I’m asking for your help with another fight: protecting our progress in Washington state.**
The Washington State Democratic Party is leading the efforts to keep Washington state blue. **[Will you join the fight with a $5 contribution to help fund our state party’s mission?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37997362/313517146/-905977104?refcode=pm_em_211027_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWU2NGUwYi00ZjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7xHS71LC1-ACTHm_WkScjXvZ94mf-5dszfSYD3l6zYE=)**
Make no mistake, Republicans will stop at nothing to undo our progress. _**We can’t let them.**_
Our state party is hard at work electing and reelecting Democrats in every race and every place across Washington state in this November’s local elections. And next year, Washington state will have an important role to play in defending our Democratic majorities in Congress. We need to be ready for the fight.
I can always count on this grassroots team to step up when it counts. That’s why I’m asking you to go on the record with your support and invest in a Democratic future for a bluer Washington state.
**[Pitch in $5 or any amount now to support the Washington State Democratic Party.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37997363/313517147/-905977104?refcode=pm_em_211027_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWU2NGUwYi00ZjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7xHS71LC1-ACTHm_WkScjXvZ94mf-5dszfSYD3l6zYE=)**
Thank you,
Patty

name: Team Lamb
subject: Here's what Conor's been up to, team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37997705/313519061/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWU2ZTZiZC00ZjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WFgT22w6pgn3p-i31NN90cRBOf8s_e-aqhWEjLmik6Y=)

Hey, have you been following along with Conor Lamb's Twitter lately?

When he said "we're not going to win this race with catchy tweets and fancy slogans," he meant it -- because we're going to win it by getting out there and showing up for Pennsylvanians in person, on the ground. That's why Conor's been traveling all over the commonwealth lately to talk to the people he wants to serve in the Senate.

**In case you haven't been following along on Twitter (@ConorLambPA), here's what Conor's been up to the past few weeks:**

First, he marched in the Haverford Township Day parade with the Haverford County Democrats.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37997706/313519062/1213738721?refcode=em21_211027_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWU2ZTZiZC00ZjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WFgT22w6pgn3p-i31NN90cRBOf8s_e-aqhWEjLmik6Y=)
---

Then, he stopped by the International Festival in Upper Darby for some Liberian food and conversation with local voters.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37997707/313519063/1213738721?refcode=em21_211027_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWU2ZTZiZC00ZjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WFgT22w6pgn3p-i31NN90cRBOf8s_e-aqhWEjLmik6Y=)
---

Then, Conor's next stop was the Bethel Community Church in Pottstown, where the Rev. Dr. Vernon Ross Jr. was kind enough to have Conor join in worship.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37997708/313519064/1213738721?refcode=em21_211027_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWU2ZTZiZC00ZjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WFgT22w6pgn3p-i31NN90cRBOf8s_e-aqhWEjLmik6Y=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37997709/313519065/1213738721?refcode=em21_211027_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWU2ZTZiZC00ZjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WFgT22w6pgn3p-i31NN90cRBOf8s_e-aqhWEjLmik6Y=)
---

As you can see, Conor's not letting up -- he's _determined_ to get out there and meet people where they are all over Pennsylvania.

This is the _most-watched_ Senate race in the country, so it's critical for Conor to go out and connect with Pennsylvanians as much as he can.

**And _you_ make this all possible, friend.** Here's how: The more money we raise online, the less time Conor has to spend calling donors and the _more_ time he has to travel the state and talk to voters! And who knows? With your support, he just might be visiting your township in the near future.

**[So, can you chip in $5 (or more if you can!) to help power Conor's campaign across Pennsylvania so he can continue connecting with voters and supporting local communities? Your contribution makes a real difference!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37997710/313519066/1213738721?refcode=em21_211027_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWU2ZTZiZC00ZjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WFgT22w6pgn3p-i31NN90cRBOf8s_e-aqhWEjLmik6Y=)**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Special Message for Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter,

Can you believe that our Democrat opponent raised $9.5 million in the last three months?!!

He is THE top Senate fundraiser in the country, but CNN has also called him the most vulnerable Senate Democrat up for reelection.

Democrat donors know that the Senate majority is on the line, and that's why they are sending millions to Georgia!

Please watch this special message we recorded for you:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58627032:64E6HJ2DN:m:1:3253819041:7861D8BAB71B416385C112CBEAB35988:r)
**[Peter, can Team Herschel count on you to step up and offset the millions coming into Georgia to keep this seat blue?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58627032:64E6HJ2DN:m:1:3253819041:7861D8BAB71B416385C112CBEAB35988:r) **

**[With your support, we'll stay in the fight and flip the Senate next year.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58627032:64E6HJ2DN:m:1:3253819041:7861D8BAB71B416385C112CBEAB35988:r)**

Thanks for joining with us!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58627032:64E6HJ2DN:m:1:3253819041:7861D8BAB71B416385C112CBEAB35988:r)
Herschel Walker
Republican Candidate for US Senate

body:
Not only is the Taliban now in control of a country we spent twenty years fighting to free, but they have their hands on billions of dollars of OUR... [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=89331725d6854288b92ea2cd0bc971db&_e=2gsEZWAIE0_eMQzFIQ1WkVmc_wMbfVNwNa8YXr-Jug6RAVou6sb0yrERk8tH_3patYPl_Bb0vMCi_GYj2jb10K2ThKR-WOzIBjhbeX4z5vq3ThIx8NtZDugZniV7e4Ntq96VJYbIt85eRU2bh95auFPVj0sZI-ODh6jAuFzGEaPtE28HZTzIl8MNNouTDeW8H_4-rcdCQTgJ9l7qnIlT8Zl3gz3h2gYlVdkGFGNWgW3Q8GLUsGacg7td_HV8XcTMUKUicOmRDgSqhxx8UjcElPacQSU4OwvpMzoiCLUT-MgppiuL5NAhZqie1Cg-ttnVLRN_KiYSCM1UB1Y-Uqq69yFUkCJpstIKc9nBSqcniE8JlSoFcDCVRK2YNiSAqkBciBMZrPzVN5E1R0TrVIbVvZTRz2-hsBzDd1GvDJ8FfpshAPjjHQIi62VLe9k-rwah) **END OF MONTH DEADLINE ON SUNDAY, OCTOBER 31** [**DONATE NOW >>>**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=89331725d6854288b92ea2cd0bc971db&_e=2gsEZWAIE0_eMQzFIQ1WkVmc_wMbfVNwNa8YXr-Jug6RAVou6sb0yrERk8tH_3patYPl_Bb0vMCi_GYj2jb10K2ThKR-WOzIBjhbeX4z5vq3ThIx8NtZDugZniV7e4Ntq96VJYbIt85eRU2bh95auFPVj0sZI-ODh6jAuFzGEaPtE28HZTzIl8MNNouTDeW8H_4-rcdCQTgJ9l7qnIlT8Zl3gz3h2gYlVdkGFGNWgW0glKufMZqDRXyxFXUdxDSaXGDFCZ_TD-HfK_kWJjiusmYfXMb--ZCxf-7K_9hT8cwjg26L1qjRzFmQZ48ck7JdUdv0OgCByk1FsFwTyz2aE475JRsnYHSFm8TSqr9r4U73smcgaQ3ShrQsFLCrDsQvsGiHvzdVs1FSlljkm90cVRD86s1cl5yHN7NZ_CrGp9RlSYmVEMfPEka8TrwIT9Wa) This Administration’s performance in Afghanistan is truly despicable. Not only is the Taliban now in control of a country we spent twenty years fighting to free, but they have their hands on billions of dollars of OUR military equipment. But the Left has different priorities... They voted AGAINST tracking down our American assets in the hands of the Taliban and then just moved on to the next item on their radical agenda. [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=89331725d6854288b92ea2cd0bc971db&_e=2gsEZWAIE0_eMQzFIQ1WkVmc_wMbfVNwNa8YXr-Jug6RAVou6sb0yrERk8tH_3patYPl_Bb0vMCi_GYj2jb10K2ThKR-WOzIBjhbeX4z5vq3ThIx8NtZDugZniV7e4Ntq96VJYbIt85eRU2bh95auFPVj0sZI-ODh6jAuFzGEaPtE28HZTzIl8MNNouTDeW8H_4-rcdCQTgJ9l7qnIlT8Zl3gz3h2gYlVdkGFGNWgW2QKqrNmNGYihcafph_BEQXlWS6Oq6ECXYVMfIGOudhRsHWkeVcCvxpCAU6YRoXJpzM01bliAUGXARvvCX3-o3HyNtw1XYMywidrxsoU7yh4aTy0cYcCnrrc-lz3RV1cx0s6cUSb9P3RI0W7WeRRS6XGPzaoRllegSRotLRMRS6M3pecX6OccWvVNbN6d4G4mN9ttgMf8xDQ6m0nTepMJ_f) With Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer controlling Congress and REFUSING to hold President Biden accountable, _Afghanistan could just be the beginning._ **That’s why we have to take back the House. name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: I want you to know this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
While we ask for money often, I want you to know this:

**I never take your generous support for granted. With grassroots donations from each and every one of Wisconsin’s 72 counties powering our campaign, I am so grateful for every single donor and every single contribution.**

Families across our state, and all over the country, are struggling to recover from the pandemic and make ends meet. They’re afraid of losing their homes, their health care, or not being able to afford their prescription drugs -- and too often, they’re forced to choose between paying the bills or putting food on the table.

All the while, Ron Johnson and other Republicans in Congress refuse to work with Democrats and won’t lift a finger to help give folks a little breathing room. They ignore the needs of workers and families while bowing down to their wealthy campaign donors and big corporate interests.

**I’ve had enough of it. I first ran for public office because I saw self-serving politicians like Scott Walker put their own interests above Wisconsin workers and families. Now, I’m running for U.S. Senate to take down Ron Johnson for that exact same reason.**

So, when I ask you to make a contribution to my campaign, what I’m really asking for is your investment in the work we’re doing together and a commitment to the critical task ahead of us. We owe it to ourselves and our children to elect leaders who will actually build a better future for our people, lift up our communities, and fight for Wisconsin workers and families who have been left behind.

Just as I fought to hold Scott Walker and his powerful allies accountable to the people of our state, I’ll do the same thing to Ron Johnson and keep up that fight as Wisconsin’s next U.S. Senator. I’ll stand up to anyone who gets in the way of getting things done for you. That’s my promise, and it’s why I’m asking:

[**Can you make a contribution today toward a better future for all of Wisconsin? Each contribution you make, whether it’s $10, $25, or any amount meaningful to you, powers our fight for U.S. Senate. Together, we will flip this seat from red to blue and deliver results for workers and families.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37998552/313522450/-1230885654?refcode=em21_211027_eom6_fndd_gq_act_snglbtn__sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211027_eom6_fndd_gq_act_snglbtn__sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDg0YjM3Ny01MTM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y1m1TmDar3c4oYXJdk49PUnxXTIowu3usK_nmMCMZGI=)

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37998554/313522456/-1230885654?refcode=em21_211027_eom6_fndd_gq_act_snglbtn__sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211027_eom6_fndd_gq_act_snglbtn__sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDg0YjM3Ny01MTM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y1m1TmDar3c4oYXJdk49PUnxXTIowu3usK_nmMCMZGI=)
---

I am not going to spend a minute of this campaign asking corporations for donations. But that means every small-dollar, individual contribution matters. And with just a few days left until we close the books for October, I hope I can count on you to help us hit our goals for the month. In fact, I know I can.

Each time I send you a message just like this one to ask for help, you answer the call. I’m deeply grateful for your support, and I appreciate every single time you step up and pitch in. I also want you to know that I truly believe our campaign can win this election and get things done for the people of Wisconsin. Together, we will.

Thank you,

Sarah Godlewski

Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put hard-working Wisconsin families first. She's the only Democrat in this race who has won statewide twice. With your help, she can defeat Ron Johnson, too. Chip in to join our grassroots campaign: | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37998557/313522458/-1230885654?refcode=em21_211027_eom6_fndd_gq_act_snglbtn__sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211027_eom6_fndd_gq_act_snglbtn__sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDg0YjM3Ny01MTM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y1m1TmDar3c4oYXJdk49PUnxXTIowu3usK_nmMCMZGI=)
