name: Pro Life Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Hillsdale College now offers our full online course “The Second World Wars” as a special DVD box set for your home library o
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq5lheddeiuqdeaqlqo9bo95g7tpnjr1l6l9h560_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cpimep75cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College now offers our full online course **“The Second World Wars” as a special DVD box set** for your home library or to give as a gift. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from renowned military historian Victor Davis Hanson of the Allied and Axis strategies in the air, by water, and on earth that led to the victory of the Allies.[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0r3r94k1fqai8h22491trh85mobkvateije7tog_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cpimep75cph2bs) If you would like to secure a DVD set before they’re no longer available, you can do so by giving a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College and its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. You can give a gift and reserve your DVD box set of **“The Second World Wars”** using this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpti0t3vj4osuooq2gev72u1rmo0n9cnnce7ktco_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cpimep75cph2bs)** Thank you for defending liberty through education with Hillsdale College. Warm regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from renowned military historian Victor Davis Hanson of the Allied and Axis strategies in the air, by water, and on earth that led to the victory of the Allies. If you would like to secure a DVD set before they’re no longer available, you can do so by giving a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College and its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. You can give a gift and reserve your DVD box set of “The Second World Wars” using this secure link: Thank you for defending liberty through education with Hillsdale College. Warm regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty Since 1844 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Maria Nelson
subject: Breast Cancer Awareness Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | This is Maria Nelson, Thomas’ wife and I’m taking over today’s email because this month is Breast Cancer Awareness Month, a time that hits very close to home for me.

I’m a breast cancer survivor and I want to urge women to pay attention to their bodies, see their doctors with any concerns and get mammograms as scheduled.

We, as women, need to give our health the priority it deserves, but it’s hard to do. For some of us, we’re too busy working, driving to piano lessons, cleaning and grocery shopping. But there’s millions of women who neglect their health, not only because of time, but because they simply can’t afford it. I was lucky to have good insurance and great doctors to get me through my cancer treatments. No woman should put off her health because she can’t afford treatment. One of the reasons I'm so proud to support Thomas' campaign for U.S. Senate is because he makes access to health care a priority every day.

I urge women to get their mammograms and [I hope you will consider donating to Peaceful Purpose](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37998924/313523940/755459924?cmd=_s-xclick&hosted_button_id=EV7T6YW52JDGS&source=url&refcode=TN_EM_EN_1MO_211027_1_1&refcode2=29296af4-5237-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTI5NmFmNC01MjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-KECsv_-nx1IPL7nSCLiwsGeFQemDxaKpVWRO3Xoo2k=&emci=77a83232-4237-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=29296af4-5237-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15112925), a wonderful nonprofit that helps women with medical hair loss. They helped me find a wig when I needed it and I hope to help other women as well.

To learn more about Peaceful Purpose, [click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37998925/313523941/1984438181?refcode=TN_EM_EN_1MO_211027_1_1&refcode2=29296af4-5237-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTI5NmFmNC01MjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-KECsv_-nx1IPL7nSCLiwsGeFQemDxaKpVWRO3Xoo2k=&emci=77a83232-4237-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=29296af4-5237-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15112925) If you're able, [click here to make a donation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37998926/313523942/755459924?cmd=_s-xclick&hosted_button_id=EV7T6YW52JDGS&source=url&refcode=TN_EM_EN_1MO_211027_1_1&refcode2=29296af4-5237-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTI5NmFmNC01MjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-KECsv_-nx1IPL7nSCLiwsGeFQemDxaKpVWRO3Xoo2k=&emci=77a83232-4237-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=29296af4-5237-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15112925)

| | Team, My name is Elvis Méndez and I’m the Executive Director of Neighbor to Neighbor Action Fund. We’re a grassroots organization with thousands of members across Massachusetts and today, we’re proud to endorse Sonia to be our next governor. [_**I’ll explain why in just a moment, but can you step up right now and chip in $5 (or whatever you can) to help Sonia get the resources she needs to win? Donate now >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37999000/313524294/99201477?refcode=em_20211027_f_o_n2n&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzg5OWNkMC01MzM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5VYj3zPZU9ELbp5n6yE1qYUsKNMrn7gW1R8RF-Q5Tw4=) Neighbor to Neighbor Massachusetts organizes in local communities across Massachusetts to put people and our planet ahead of profits. And we’ve worked alongside Sonia for years to win generational education funding, criminal justice reform and CORI Reform, and voting rights protections. That’s why we’re proud to endorse her today: because we’ve seen firsthand that she has what it takes to take on Charlie Baker and deliver for working people from Springfield to Boston and all across Massachusetts. clean_body: I’m the Executive Director of Neighbor to Neighbor Action Fund. Today, we’re proud to endorse Sonia to be the next governor of Massachusetts. | | | | | Team, My name is Elvis Méndez and I’m the Executive Director of Neighbor to Neighbor Action Fund. We’re a grassroots organization with thousands of members across Massachusetts and today, we’re proud to endorse Sonia to be our next governor. = Neighbor to Neighbor Massachusetts organizes in local communities across Massachusetts to put people and our planet ahead of profits. And we’ve worked alongside Sonia for years to win generational education funding, criminal justice reform and CORI Reform, and voting rights protections. That’s why we’re proud to endorse her today: because we’ve seen firsthand that she has what it takes to take on Charlie Baker and deliver for working people from Springfield to Boston and all across Massachusetts. = Neighbor to Neighbor is the first statewide organization to make an endorsement in this race, and we’re proud of that. We’re proud to stand behind Sonia early, because her work makes a difference to Massachusetts families every single day. I’m proud to be on Team Sonia, and I hope you’ll join me in supporting her today. Thank you, Elvis Méndez Executive Director, Neighbor to Neighbor Massachusetts | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Derek Marshall
subject: Slow & steady wins the race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
Another day, another successful event canvassing our community and registering new voters! Today I joined Field Team 6 in California’s 8th district talking to folks and meeting them where they’re at. As an organizer, I know the importance of getting out in my community and doing the real work to flip this district blue. **Canvassing is my favorite part of running for Congress, because there’s nothing like those transformational conversations.**

I take my job as a Congressional candidate seriously. I will never skimp on the work out in the field. I’m not above this work just because I’m the one running for Congress. This race isn’t about my ego or my reputation, **it’s about changing hearts and minds and inspiring people to believe that their voices really do matter in politics.** That’s why voter registration is so special to me.

**[If you want to help my campaign get into the field faster so we can change those hearts and minds, a donation goes a long way. Right now we have the winning strategy—now we need the resources to get it done. Every single dollar counts. Can you chip in today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37999031/313524677/-228151212?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGFmYTJlYy01MzM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZEZPbPBeCKBsxXK019TAe1zVDdC-AN7hDzBEnpIpZYY=)**

**In a red district, I don’t take a single voter or conversation for granted.** That’s because I know the Republicans have done a very successful job at convincing their base to turn out. Now we have to do the same thing with thousands of unregistered voters and hundreds of thousands of Democrats who don’t turn out because they’re convinced their vote won’t make a difference.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37999033/313524680/-228151212?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGFmYTJlYy01MzM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZEZPbPBeCKBsxXK019TAe1zVDdC-AN7hDzBEnpIpZYY=)

I know we have our work cut out for us. **But more than anything else in my whole life, I believe deeply that we can win this district.** We can win this district for every young person worried about climate change. Every family trying to make ends meet. Every person trying to find work after being laid off in the pandemic. Our community needs this victory, so we can finally focus on the changes we need to live better lives out here in California’s 8th.

**[If you believe in us too, then please consider donating to our campaign. The money we raise today will help us build the successful field game we need to reach these thousands of folks.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37999035/313524682/-228151212?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGFmYTJlYy01MzM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZEZPbPBeCKBsxXK019TAe1zVDdC-AN7hDzBEnpIpZYY=)**

Together, I know it’s possible. One step at a time.

In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**

Peter,

It's been a little over 7 months since we launched our campaign and we've seen an incredible amount of support -- not just from the people in this district but from all over California and beyond.

People know that CA-25 could be the difference between us maintaining control of the House and handing it over to Republicans.

2,659 people have already donated to this campaign. That's 2,659 people who are ready to say goodbye to Mike Garcia.

Let me show you a map: | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37999087/313524766/-1056200607?refcode=em21_211027_eom1-s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWFmYTJlYy01MzM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HqeUapAN7_-6bU4otPI4bJOkDEOhcWZycmcaEpW_y5U=)
---

Every dot on this map represents someone who is ready to send Mike packing. A person who is sick of Republican obstructionism and is ready to fight for change.

Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable. Don't want to receive our emails? According to the _Military Times_ , in 1973, "nearly **three in every four** members of Congress had some type of military service." In 2021, that number has dropped to **one in every six** members.

Fellow Conservative,

If I know one thing it’s that you are likely on the receiving end of hundreds, if not thousands of emails every day. I appreciate you opening mine. Would you please take a few moments to scan the contents of this email and take my brief survey re: veterans serving in Congress? **I gave up my career in military intelligence to run for public office, so[you’d be doing me a huge favor by sparing 30 seconds or so right now](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=01821f8fea394c2896d934920960eee2&_e=WBOM1iLTPotjpY2W54F6PUQHvCe7L5nf7Yrg12B1XjvJ_wjqX7T_dynfc5xn4E4eUZtGT2267ZOzNNRFarruJth7zGBrLbA7p2MuPPCYNvGFbxAFkmaNob8fy_ekIGzr7NMpS0vsOiDGfTK9FVEUWJhJI0VHQ8RXdZC-VQ0GIScR4Sb-LaDNwUk_3_Cam7ZYlZ3veiIoalZ3c_d8X8hqk1H81ZxFYzrIbcK3Jwjo6-fVQKTh9OtFDiwxMF7PpTFj5aooXxtODV-l0ZbwvP6glMMKFNjVFk5reHrsiMcd7y3vmRLUSdWfz6xz7SwjanXfJAGt9egEzZRvo6yT-gg7JweakdOBB7dL9I47p1FOQmO6BU-O0Joo5zghkkXCorjPfdZq1ho4crgH3b_EVOLtHVn_UtMZ9MDVVYHKQhsL4H86baXN0nUrlSZgujXteulCzFID7J9B_qiSVmE8w-UYh8W6S8UOVLFgWWihcwvGeWz8SpUwh3Gd8d5Vjw-q7j3LRTHhPBKW_YSpY-RNhSkLN-uXlTevz__6x5_VyBXP3EDNlmRH3WWsgM7JgQU__323bc4caGWyT_ddWMbxWHJbAKMrZ3vEcJEzXsH98q9zd1C1tpuzxlaSCK3VxcuxZdJltYlkXpr4_y30FLL8TqG8wg%3D%3D)**.

Whether or not you agree with the overarching mission active-duty military members participate in, I think that we can all agree that **it’s hard to disrespect a member of the military community or a veteran of the United States Armed Forces**.

[](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=01821f8fea394c2896d934920960eee2&_e=WBOM1iLTPotjpY2W54F6PR6rzgwOhSgTohiZ9h3kUnanXA49ilUJLCG8AQS0Tt4iPY5dMvu1o47ZFffHT4pMs_7azeL54vwprSAIpoIkeB3c-DCf-cXxbygoPr-T1X57mUf2bLobNkIvnyywB5zUn5e_RG26S6qr0xaV8y6zJ17egVwcDGWVuvBQw1EXQsb4McDntxcgGFygHEn7qBTiB8DCFfCK7Axh7wXL4mSMBSmtEqsiKOQbW2-d7RbU-ABC9GDspXE5td8kQ7NTqSuScBT5Sa4sx52674KXtVj-WBw6m2zkv9J8Ezf3DxrMcRTIJ8Sc_kw9Byg52kdAa44CON2BjGD4CUl8ii_ICPsVUB6tilFIj9u1H5O2rNV1cpJ1d5IYuxNOA1rzTQCaN0OsgjhRpgLbK3LcY89jVH300x2h4k5elVY3aKnLBmaPSQtFUXqFupDkiSp-zy3siKiAEfGvSCsojnG69uIPsXbamLk%3D)

My name is John Castorani and for 9 years I served within the **Army’s Special Operations Command** , proudly representing the United States at home and around the globe. Perhaps you’ve opened up an email that I’ve sent prior to today. If that’s the case, then you may know that I’ve devoted my life to serving our nation – at home and on foreign battlefields.

| [**IN YOUR OPINION
DO WE NEED MORE VETERANS IN CONGRESS?** **››**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=01821f8fea394c2896d934920960eee2&_e=WBOM1iLTPotjpY2W54F6PUQHvCe7L5nf7Yrg12B1XjvJ_wjqX7T_dynfc5xn4E4eUZtGT2267ZOzNNRFarruJth7zGBrLbA7p2MuPPCYNvGFbxAFkmaNob8fy_ekIGzr7NMpS0vsOiDGfTK9FVEUWJhJI0VHQ8RXdZC-VQ0GIScR4Sb-LaDNwUk_3_Cam7ZYlZ3veiIoalZ3c_d8X8hqk1H81ZxFYzrIbcK3Jwjo6-fVQKTh9OtFDiwxMF7PpTFj5aooXxtODV-l0ZbwvP6glMMKFNjVFk5reHrsiMcd7y3vmRLUSdWfz6xz7SwjanXfJAGt9egEzZRvo6yT-gg7JweakdOBB7dL9I47p1FOQmO6BU-O0Joo5zghkkXCorjPfdZq1ho4crgH3b_EVOLtHVn_UtMZ9MDVVYHKQhsL4H-3FswN-aFE2osVzDv1R6dFl0G9qup3sBkFr4ePoRv65hw-ePjGhcmDJsmvZQHiRqPPNrUASJT6jNK-vY5te7d2AFQovlETSW9iz8--dvJoaNXeowvJpoYoRAYUlpECQXxBqMadg1ZRkvSDUYGNWTXLUWAX69BWesIA1kDxcX9OE7AACmzO09Zp4Qca3A4MpeVg2XYp6NmGKJ0ZBngyMex1PJMQQhtLOb5BLmPkOkp0iQ%3D%3D)
---

**For six years, I hunted the radical Islamic terrorists who attacked our outpost in Benghazi, Libya. Along with fellow Special Operators service members, I helped hold the people who killed an American ambassador accountable**. One could say that we cleaned up the mess Hillary Clinton created when she refused to take the infamous 4 a.m. call on September 11th, 2012.

I know from first-hand experience fighting Islamic State, al Qaeda and other extremist elements that American military personnel are among the most agile and strategic-minded people around. So **why there are only 38 combat veterans currently serving in Congress – the lowest number since WWII?**

I find this alarming. It used to be the case that serving in the military was a prerequisite for those seeking public office.

**I’m curious to know if you share the opinion that Republicans must do more to ensure we’re putting resources behind men and women who have served old glory in the armed forces as they seek election to Congress.**

[**Will you let me know by taking a quick 3 question survey right now?**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=01821f8fea394c2896d934920960eee2&_e=WBOM1iLTPotjpY2W54F6PUQHvCe7L5nf7Yrg12B1XjvJ_wjqX7T_dynfc5xn4E4eUZtGT2267ZOzNNRFarruJth7zGBrLbA7p2MuPPCYNvGFbxAFkmaNob8fy_ekIGzr7NMpS0vsOiDGfTK9FVEUWJhJI0VHQ8RXdZC-VQ0GIScR4Sb-LaDNwUk_3_Cam7ZYlZ3veiIoalZ3c_d8X8hqk1H81ZxFYzrIbcK3Jwjo6-fVQKTh9OtFDiwxMF7PpTFj5aooXxtODV-l0ZbwvP6glMMKFNjVFk5reHrsiMcd7y3vmRLUSdWfz6xz7SwjanXfJAGt9egEzZRvo6yT-gg7JweakdOBB7dL9I47p1FOQmO6BU-O0Joo5zghkkXCorjPfdZq1ho4crgH3b_EVOLtHVn_UtMZ9MDVVYHKQhsL4H8RGwSoC4tdMU6Ude80_FtOrkjQezNVPZ-JhrdvWIF9SaUpd2CaoU38VcnKbO-_x2ob5ROsLGJi6q9zL8gnW9g6efcDZG4lgwXaWxhVJodIczp48LOudGdFXzBqxek_9J_dGdb_NEtEQeyQ1OHus-JTiiRCC38f2255z5COipbJ_aV3o1ucDX9lIOPcWFrRCuybh_IL7yhxKgzZ7EWV-NOQVLoBgEgQUjqVplC2NJpWiw%3D%3D)

[**IN YOUR OPINION
DO WE NEED MORE VETERANS IN CONGRESS** **››**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=01821f8fea394c2896d934920960eee2&_e=WBOM1iLTPotjpY2W54F6PUQHvCe7L5nf7Yrg12B1XjvJ_wjqX7T_dynfc5xn4E4eUZtGT2267ZOzNNRFarruJth7zGBrLbA7p2MuPPCYNvGFbxAFkmaNob8fy_ekIGzr7NMpS0vsOiDGfTK9FVEUWJhJI0VHQ8RXdZC-VQ0GIScR4Sb-LaDNwUk_3_Cam7ZYlZ3veiIoalZ3c_d8X8hqk1H81ZxFYzrIbcK3Jwjo6-fVQKTh9OtFDiwxMF7PpTFj5aooXxtODV-l0ZbwvP6glMMKFNjVFk5reHrsiMcd7y3vmRLUSdWfz6xz7SwjanXfJAGt9egEzZRvo6yT-gg7JweakdOBB7dL9I47p1FOQmO6BU-O0Joo5zghkkXCorjPfdZq1ho4crgH3b_EVOLtHVn_UtMZ9MDVVYHKQhsL4H_sGZLXEquTWi3ovM3kLpISrmsUV_DQJhKA0nc6vGyYfke4i0xMkw5rJB5ua4RqbbKeO4sJ4ygUKu34693NiXBmQxvf-0ebSfjNN2i2SzU87xTAi75D6gpN-jQakHpMNVbU-X_ygnrS0PmSv78ev9UsJk3-iAJVv44mBaZmesC1Zsn581Y79d7YBQYZj1kjVD5Tp9xuKvR4F7K3sLu-qLCNqtT24bOB5HdHlnJO_g7P7Q%3D%3D)
---

**Veterans know how to get things done. Give us a mission and a timeline and we’ll see anything through to the end.**

Veterans make the best members of Congress not only because they’ve served in our armed forces, rather because in the armed forces vets learn that regardless of your creed, ethnicity, race or religion, in the military it’s essential to come together and accomplish the mission... it’s the oath every veteran swore to uphold to our Constitution - in order to form a more perfect union.

[](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=01821f8fea394c2896d934920960eee2&_e=WBOM1iLTPotjpY2W54F6PR6rzgwOhSgTohiZ9h3kUnanXA49ilUJLCG8AQS0Tt4iPY5dMvu1o47ZFffHT4pMs_7azeL54vwprSAIpoIkeB3c-DCf-cXxbygoPr-T1X57mUf2bLobNkIvnyywB5zUn5e_RG26S6qr0xaV8y6zJ17egVwcDGWVuvBQw1EXQsb4McDntxcgGFygHEn7qBTiB8DCFfCK7Axh7wXL4mSMBSmtEqsiKOQbW2-d7RbU-ABC9GDspXE5td8kQ7NTqSuScHhRr0czpzK9xZzru5iU-0p9Uw-d5FmwiJJwC4i15PUJFiCKvIXhWANL4ML_YQNiDugK52bcwI6vArBPCsFt7kmkapuemxF4NZ-vabVKapMj8xS4Xoo6XNEt1LG1nEC1xonlC_Vc8Jk8neBff75yQ3o2ysFzgDbkTfQc9_hXeqwDoksFPAedg9lqUw_t5rXg5Rga3VUGTd9qYXko0sdwc-o%3D)

**Can anyone say that about career politicians?**

When I was assigned to the Special Operations Regional Task Force in North Africa, tasked with hunting down the planners of the Benghazi attack - **it didn't matter what political party you affiliated with, what religion you practiced or the color of your skin** ; we came together and successfully captured those bastards who killed four of our own, including Ambassador Chris Stevens. We secured justice for the victims of the premeditated terror that Hillary Clinton and the Obama administration refused to seek!

If you agree that we need more service-oriented Americans representing our interests in the hallowed halls of Congress, [**please let me know by taking my quick survey today.**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=01821f8fea394c2896d934920960eee2&_e=WBOM1iLTPotjpY2W54F6PUQHvCe7L5nf7Yrg12B1XjvJ_wjqX7T_dynfc5xn4E4eUZtGT2267ZOzNNRFarruJth7zGBrLbA7p2MuPPCYNvGFbxAFkmaNob8fy_ekIGzr7NMpS0vsOiDGfTK9FVEUWJhJI0VHQ8RXdZC-VQ0GIScR4Sb-LaDNwUk_3_Cam7ZYlZ3veiIoalZ3c_d8X8hqk1H81ZxFYzrIbcK3Jwjo6-fVQKTh9OtFDiwxMF7PpTFj5aooXxtODV-l0ZbwvP6glMMKFNjVFk5reHrsiMcd7y3vmRLUSdWfz6xz7SwjanXfJAGt9egEzZRvo6yT-gg7JweakdOBB7dL9I47p1FOQmO6BU-O0Joo5zghkkXCorjPfdZq1ho4crgH3b_EVOLtHVn_UtMZ9MDVVYHKQhsL4H9qZht9V9hpK9bRICXu5za_Gsd_ab85j36pZ62O1eJma7MF0UxdnFXT0-0fP0CsS49ZqteYz6SFTx-Q-bCDoh7IcpEfvflGfbH-XSrJIAsnlC66PMLIwWA2yIRAriUGTbjIyCYb-uThGPkTHXZe57C57bhtXget_uxaUcyszK7kevjddQ0iW9xR5uq5Ta7nT172C75NyS75b4LvdRbWWCkjGM4h4sfU-JYWw8i6wpfPfw%3D%3D)

DO WE NEED MORE VETERANS IN CONGRESS** ›› ](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=01821f8fea394c2896d934920960eee2&_e=WBOM1iLTPotjpY2W54F6PUQHvCe7L5nf7Yrg12B1XjvJ_wjqX7T_dynfc5xn4E4eUZtGT2267ZOzNNRFarruJth7zGBrLbA7p2MuPPCYNvGFbxAFkmaNob8fy_ekIGzr7NMpS0vsOiDGfTK9FVEUWJhJI0VHQ8RXdZC-VQ0GIScR4Sb-LaDNwUk_3_Cam7ZYlZ3veiIoalZ3c_d8X8hqk1H81ZxFYzrIbcK3Jwjo6-fVQKTh9OtFDiwxMF7PpTFj5aooXxtODV-l0ZbwvP6glMMKFNjVFk5reHrsiMcd7y3vmRLUSdWfz6xz7SwjanXfJAGt9egEzZRvo6yT-gg7JweakdOBB7dL9I47p1FOQmO6BU-O0Joo5zghkkXCorjPfdZq1ho4crgH3b_EVOLtHVn_UtMZ9MDVVYHKQhsL4H_E8nHW0F4BLvP-NkWk4oJs17QpGzbPyrVb0AypbU0xUaKV1v4BNfBuwyC6gc4mEEiSvRJSMDMiCa_CWDHoMXcvPoA6DxoGPuLSuvTdZIas5dIBs9jWaa3GzAy9cHL_jjqRMysrTpXbfZdajfKmDduYqzerd63_BQYM1ug_D5lyaGmSrf__oYvX8wS27hFln4BWED6ReRiks1KWwex59cZomOh8Pe1BqUO95XcS50A8wg%3D%3D)

My name is John Castorani and for 9 years I served within the Army’s Special Operations Command , proudly representing the United States at home and around the globe. Perhaps you’ve opened up an email that I’ve sent prior to today. If that’s the case, then you may know that I’ve devoted my life to serving our nation – at home and on foreign battlefields. | For six years, I hunted the radical Islamic terrorists who attacked our outpost in Benghazi, Libya. Along with fellow Special Operators service members, I helped hold the people who killed an American ambassador accountable. One could say that we cleaned up the mess Hillary Clinton created when she refused to take the infamous 4 a.m. call on September 11th, 2012. I know from first-hand experience fighting Islamic State, al Qaeda and other extremist elements that American military personnel are among the most agile and strategic-minded people around. So why there are only 38 combat veterans currently serving in Congress – the lowest number since WWII? I find this alarming. It used to be the case that serving in the military was a prerequisite for those seeking public office. I’m curious to know if you share the opinion that Republicans must do more to ensure we’re putting resources behind men and women who have served old glory in the armed forces as they seek election to Congress. Veterans know how to get things done. Give us a mission and a timeline and we’ll see anything through to the end. Veterans make the best members of Congress not only because they’ve served in our armed forces, rather because in the armed forces vets learn that regardless of your creed, ethnicity, race or religion, in the military it’s essential to come together and accomplish the mission... it’s the oath every veteran swore to uphold to our Constitution - in order to form a more perfect union. Can anyone say that about career politicians? When I was assigned to the Special Operations Regional Task Force in North Africa, tasked with hunting down the planners of the Benghazi attack - it didn't matter what political party you affiliated with, what religion you practiced or the color of your skin ; we came together and successfully captured those bastards who killed four of our own, including Ambassador Chris Stevens. We secured justice for the victims of the premeditated terror that Hillary Clinton and the Obama administration refused to seek! If you agree that we need more service-oriented Americans representing our interests in the hallowed halls of Congress, Very Respectfully, John Castorani | Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia P.O. BOX 390 ORANGE, VA 22960

name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Aadland for U.S. Senate News
body:
Erik on Biden plans to weaponize the IRS
---
| | | | | | Volume 14 | October 27, 2021
---
|
---
| A Word From Erik
---
| | |
---|---
|
The Radical Left is attempting to weaponize the IRS against American citizens through a massive, unjustified invasion of privacy. Within Joe Biden's so-called "Build Back Better" plan is a proposal to allow the IRS to monitor bank accounts for deposits over $10,000 (originally $600) which would put the bank information of almost every American into the hands of the IRS. Carrying out this surveillance operation would be an army of 80,000 IRS agents. And the price tag for this aggressive strong-arming of the American people? --$80 million.

The crux of this plan is not only that the government will forcefully enter itself into your private matters, but it will result in significantly more audits of low to middle-income Americans. It will overburden banks and credit unions at a time when there are labor shortages. And the government not only has a proven track record of failing to protect taxpayers' confidentiality; we now see federal agencies' proven track record of corruption, bypassing due process of law and setting out on witch-hunts against conservatives.

This isn't about fiscal responsibility. It is about control. And it is in complete violation of the 4th Amendment of the Constitution which protects your right to privacy.

I support any means to stop this intrusion of your privacy, including the newly introduced "Prohibiting IRS Financial Surveillance Act" introduced by good men and women in Congress who are standing against this blatant overreach. As your next US Senator, I will join my voice with all those who oppose Biden's plan, and stand against tyranny to protect your rights.

If you are tired of government bureaucrats invading your privacy and infesting every facet of your life, please support my campaign.
|

This isn't about fiscal responsibility. It is about control. And it is in complete violation of the 4th Amendment of the Constitution which protects your right to privacy. I support any means to stop this intrusion of your privacy, including the newly introduced "Prohibiting IRS Financial Surveillance Act" introduced by good men and women in Congress who are standing against this blatant overreach. As your next US Senator, I will join my voice with all those who oppose Biden's plan, and stand against tyranny to protect your rights. If you are tired of government bureaucrats invading your privacy and infesting every facet of your life, please support my campaign. | | | | | | | == | | | | Upcoming Events | | ---|--- | Wednesday, October 27: Erik will speak at the Monthly Conservative "Meet Up" at 6:30 PM in Greenwood Village. The liberal media will never understand why Sheriffs are so important the American way of life, but it's a simple reason they should appreciate.
**First and foremost, we are democratically elected! We represent the people. We are accountable to the people. That's very different from police chiefs who are just appointed by liberal city mayors.**

clean_body: | | | | The liberal media is openly attacking Sheriffs because we are standing up to protect our freedom. Hello Peter Willis - "Whose Law Is He Following?" That's the question the liberal journalist from Politico asks in the title of the article they just wrote about me and our organization. Apparently she's never heard of the Constitution! | The liberal media will never understand why Sheriffs are so important the American way of life, but it's a simple reason they should appreciate. First and foremost, we are democratically elected! We represent the people. We are accountable to the people. That's very different from police chiefs who are just appointed by liberal city mayors. And we take seriously our responsibility and oath to preserve, protect, and defend the Constitution of the United States. Protect America Now is quickly becoming the largest law-enforcement lead political organization in the country. Show your support today to help us keep growing. I am counting on patriots like you. | Thank you for your generous support, Sheriff Mark Lamb Founder | Protect America Now Sheriff Mark Lamb 530 E McDowell Rd #107, Bldg 252, Phoenix, AZ 85004

| | Derek,

I firmly believe that the role _— the duty —_ of the Governor of Virginia is to lift people up. To bring about unity in times of division. And above all, to do the morally right thing, especially when others won’t.

After he failed to condemn Donald Trump and his ‘big lie’ rally, it’s clear Glenn Youngkin doesn’t hold those values.

From day one of his campaign, Youngkin has pushed Donald Trump’s lies about the 2020 election. He’s peddled dangerous conspiracy theories and keeps cozying up to Trump’s most extreme supporters.

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Please join me for a Meet and Greet with my Running Mate!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
This Saturday, October 30, I’m excited to be holding our first-ever Meet and Greet with my running mate, Monique Anderson-Walker. We’ll be speaking at the Oxon Hill Manor in Prince George’s County to share my bold vision for the future of our state, and I hope you will be able to join us!
https://secure.ngpvan.com/niRO4HskGEWvzywg8Fic3Q2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/niRO4HskGEWvzywg8Fic3Q2]We have a historic opportunity to change the way that government does business in 2022. With your help, we’re going to combat climate change by making Maryland the first net zero state in the nation, build a world-class transit system that kickstarts our economy, invest in the next generation of internet connectivity, and so much more. I look forward to speaking with you personally about the future that we’ll build together.
Oxon Hill Manor is located at 6901 Oxon Hill Rd, Oxon Hill. Our event will be from 3:00 PM to 5:00 PM. Click here to RSVP. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/niRO4HskGEWvzywg8Fic3Q2]
I hope to see you there!
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/announcement102721?amount=20.22&refcode=eventem]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Fauci Fired.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene for Congress
body:
Peter --

Fauci lied about helping fund the CCP
bioweapons that has killed MILLIONS.

And now we now know that the highest-paid
federal employee helped fund "studies" that mercilessly tortured
puppies...

My friend, we MUST FIRE Fauci and I need your
help to build up the momentum.

First, I need you to sign your petition to
become a Citizen Cosponsor to help me Fire Fauci and put the
pressure on!

Peter, Fauci LIED about masks.

He LIED about "15 days to slow the spread."

He LIED about herd immunity.

He LIED about vaccines and about funding
gain-of-function research in the Wuhan lab...

Fauci has become the definition of the little
boy who cried wolf.

And it's time for him to join the millions of
Americans that have lost their jobs thanks to his radical
mandates and incompetence.

SIGN YOUR "FIRE FAUCI" PETITION

Fauci's constant fear-mongering has destroyed
ALL of his credibility and has done nothing but help expand the
Left's radical Socialist Agenda.

Fauci has weakened our country to the point
that things many of us never thought would happen are now
happening in the name of a virus.
And over the past TWO YEARS, Fauci has
refused any accountability. That must change!
And with your help, we're going to FIRE
FAUCI.
That's why I need you to sign your "Fire
Fauci" petition to become a Citizen Cosponsor

Please do NOT delay. It will only get worse
the longer we let Fauci hold the reins.
SIGN YOUR "FIRE FAUCI" CITIZEN COSPONSOR
PETITON TODAY
-- Marjorie Taylor Greene

Congresswoman (R-GA)

Paid for by Greene for Congress.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: February 19, 2019. Do you remember it? Today I am writing to ask if you can make a $3 donation to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goals.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Now we have a new mission: re-election. And the same corporate special interests who tried to beat us last time are back.
#

**February 19, 2019.**
That was the day we launched our campaign for Senate. And the truth is, I had no idea what to expect. Gabby and I had a number of friends we knew would be willing to help, but I knew one of the biggest challenges would be raising the kind of money we needed to win.
But because of supporters like you, we ran one of the largest grassroots Senate campaigns ever. And that helped us fend off attacks from corporate special interests throughout the years.
**75,000.**
Now we have a new mission: re-election. And the same corporate special interests who tried to beat us last time are back. But I know that if we all do what we can to hold this seat, we’ll do what we did last campaign.
Win.
It’ll only happen if we’re all in this together, and that starts with reaching our goal of 75,000 donations before October ends to fight back against the attack ads already running in Arizona.
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to our campaign before our end-of-month fundraising deadline comes to an end? I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-oct21?refcode=em211027-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1575_6688874_6Rl3zb&akid=1575%2E6688874%2E6Rl3zb)

name: Rick Scott
subject: Our End-of-Month deadline is approaching.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We cannot surrender control to the Left. | Peter,

Make no mistake, if we allow Democrats to UNDO President Trump’s accomplishments and take us down this dark path, the American people, like YOU, will suffer.

**As the Chairman of the NRSC, I cannot let that happen. As an American citizen, YOU cannot let that happen, Peter.**
We have a **MAJOR End -of-Month deadline** coming up and we could really use your support if we’re going to TAKE BACK Trump’s Majority in 2022.

Hitting our fundraising goal will help us stay on track to _DEFEAT the Democrats in 2022_ and SAVE AMERICA. We can’t do it without you, which is why we activated a _600% -MATCH_ on your next gift when you step up TODAY.

name: Nina Turner
subject: Joe Manchin is blocking paid leave, climate action, and progress.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
We must fight back against anti-democratic influencers.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38000658/313532615/1761773496?refcode=2101025_FR_joemanchin_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWQ1MzVlNS01YjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gaTQucxFY5QTcAPZkU2bba0dqt-EClj4aQ3XkniaiJc=)
---
**Can you believe Joe Manchin actually pretends he cares about working people?**

_Meanwhile, he’s doing everything he can to block President Biden’s agenda to move our country forward._****

**He turned down H.R.1 the _For The People Act,_** which aims to expand voting rights, reduce the influence of money in politics, end gerrymandering, and create new ethics rules for elected officials.

**He refuses to abolish the filibuster,** a procedural relic that has prevented common-sense policies from passing into law — like the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act, the Equality Act, comprehensive immigration reform, and lowering prescription drug prices.

**He has worked against clean energy solutions** — instead, siding with the fossil fuel industry where he has personal financial ties including hundreds of thousands of dollars in stocks.

**Joe Manchin might not call himself a Republican, but he’s no better than the GOP leaders who are prepared to sabotage our fundamental democratic values as long as it continues to benefit them and their powerful, wealthy interests. ****[**But if we are going to build an America that truly prioritizes working people (unlike Joe Manchin), then we must stand together by mobilizing and organizing. Will you join us in this righteous fight by pitching in right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38000659/313532616/1761773496?refcode=2101025_FR_joemanchin_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWQ1MzVlNS01YjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gaTQucxFY5QTcAPZkU2bba0dqt-EClj4aQ3XkniaiJc=)** **______[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38000660/313532617/1761773496?refcode=2101025_FR_joemanchin_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWQ1MzVlNS01YjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gaTQucxFY5QTcAPZkU2bba0dqt-EClj4aQ3XkniaiJc=)** Along with every Republican member of Congress and just one other Democrat (who sold herself out to Big Pharma, but that’s a different story), **Joe Manchin has been a staunch opponent of the Biden-backed _Build Back Better_ plan.**

This comprehensive reconciliation bill invests $350 billion a year for the next decade into addressing the struggles faced by working families. The landmark legislation includes expanding Medicare, lowering prescription drug costs, funding for childcare and education, affordable housing, paid leave, climate action, and much more..._**all while not raising taxes on everyday Americans.**_

It’s clear that Joe Manchin’s motives and interests aren’t with the needs of the working people. Obstructionists like him have no business in Congress making policy decisions that impact the workaday citizens of this great nation, let alone representing our party.

**We deserve leaders who will deliver on their promises and uphold our values through bold action — leaders with the courage to ask for more. clean_body: We must fight back against anti-democratic influencers. | | | = Can you believe Joe Manchin actually pretends he cares about working people? Meanwhile, he’s doing everything he can to block President Biden’s agenda to move our country forward.** He turned down H.R.1 the For The People Act, which aims to expand voting rights, reduce the influence of money in politics, end gerrymandering, and create new ethics rules for elected officials. He refuses to abolish the filibuster, a procedural relic that has prevented common-sense policies from passing into law — like the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act, the Equality Act, comprehensive immigration reform, and lowering prescription drug prices. He has worked against clean energy solutions — instead, siding with the fossil fuel industry where he has personal financial ties including hundreds of thousands of dollars in stocks. Joe Manchin might not call himself a Republican, but he’s no better than the GOP leaders who are prepared to sabotage our fundamental democratic values as long as it continues to benefit them and their powerful, wealthy interests. **= ____= Along with every Republican member of Congress and just one other Democrat (who sold herself out to Big Pharma, but that’s a different story), Joe Manchin has been a staunch opponent of the Biden-backed Build Back Better plan. This comprehensive reconciliation bill invests $350 billion a year for the next decade into addressing the struggles faced by working families. The landmark legislation includes expanding Medicare, lowering prescription drug costs, funding for childcare and education, affordable housing, paid leave, climate action, and much more...all while not raising taxes on everyday Americans. It’s clear that Joe Manchin’s motives and interests aren’t with the needs of the working people. Obstructionists like him have no business in Congress making policy decisions that impact the workaday citizens of this great nation, let alone representing our party. We deserve leaders who will deliver on their promises and uphold our values through bold action — leaders with the courage to ask for more. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ******=**** **** **** | | ******=****** | ******=****** **** **** | | ******=****** | ******=****** **** **** | | ******=****** **** **** Thanks for being a critical part of this fight. **Nina Turner** ************ ********** ****************EXPRESS DONATE to Nina Turner**************** ****************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:**************** ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** ---|---|---|--- Nina Turner is **building a movement to empower working families and mobilize Democrats on key progressive issues that impact everyday Americans who have been left behind. I just looked at the numbers.
Liberal elites are pouring in millions of dollars trying to turn Florida blue. They know our state is a powerhouse for the America First movement and are trying to buy our House seats.
Florida is the last line of defense for Conservatives in America. If the Radical Left is able to take Florida, they will take the whole country. Kat refuses to stand by and let that happen. You sent her to D.C. to fight, and that's what she's doing with your help.
We are behind on our fundraising numbers for October. name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: I know I’m not the typical candidate for U.S. Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Running a competitive campaign for Senate is outrageously expensive.
#

I’m about to ask you to make a $3 contribution to help me go to the U.S. Senate and fight for working families like yours and mine.
But first, I want to explain why, so please keep reading.
I know I’m not the typical candidate for U.S. Senate.
I’m traversing a path that's never been taken, to serve from a place that never envisioned including a person like me — a place that still rarely sees folks like us.
That’s because running a competitive campaign for Senate is outrageously expensive.
It requires the kind of money that, traditionally, only wealthy candidates could afford to put up.
That’s why there are so few working people in Congress in the first place — but we’re going to fix that.
I’m never going to have the kind of wealth to self-fund, and I refuse to take corporate PAC money, so I’m counting on support from folks like you to hit our fundraising goals.
**So, please, I’m politely asking:**
[Can you please pitch in $3 to my campaign for U.S. Senate before midnight? Any donation, no matter the size, puts us that much closer to building a government that works for working people.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38000910/313533758/-360183459?refcode2=17d3faf0-5c37-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211027-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2QzZmFmMC01YzM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tIe5nLXJ5V244c_RaBL2vP-tf1PYYTFZ_H3KECoMJFU=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38000911/313533759/-360183459?refcode2=17d3faf0-5c37-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211027-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2QzZmFmMC01YzM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tIe5nLXJ5V244c_RaBL2vP-tf1PYYTFZ_H3KECoMJFU=)**
Thanks for being a part of this campaign. I'm so grateful for everything you do.
All my best,
Malcolm

Hey there, I have the first ever update on our newly launched Bennet Defense Fund. First off, I want to say a huge THANK YOU to everyone who pitched in on Monday when we announced this new project. Michael and the whole team have been overwhelmed by the support we’ve seen! **Right now, we’ve raised just about $4,500, which means we still have another $16,650 to raise to hit our $21,150 goal by the end of October.** It’s not impossible, but we need your help to get there. Michael is running a grassroots-driven campaign. He doesn’t take donations from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists because he is leading on ending the influence of big money in politics. To win this race and keep Colorado blue, our campaign has to reach and mobilize voters across the state while battling attacks from Michael’s opponents, Mitch McConnell, and dark money groups. It’s expensive work and with the National GOP raking in millions each month, we can’t rest for a moment. **We established the Bennet Defense Fund in order to compete, and that’s what your contribution will help us do. Will you chip in $10 right now so we can hit our goal by Sunday at midnight?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | **[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38000940/313533934/-677291793?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20211027_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmIxMjUxNC01ZDM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lav4H6lFWMyCdDfzr01Q1ZrFf6dbigJLml2ljcQ96Do=)**

clean_body: | = Hey there, I have the first ever update on our newly launched Bennet Defense Fund. First off, I want to say a huge THANK YOU to everyone who pitched in on Monday when we announced this new project. Michael and the whole team have been overwhelmed by the support we’ve seen! Right now, we’ve raised just about $4,500, which means we still have another $16,650 to raise to hit our $21,150 goal by the end of October. It’s not impossible, but we need your help to get there. Michael is running a grassroots-driven campaign. He doesn’t take donations from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists because he is leading on ending the influence of big money in politics. To win this race and keep Colorado blue, our campaign has to reach and mobilize voters across the state while battling attacks from Michael’s opponents, Mitch McConnell, and dark money groups. It’s expensive work and with the National GOP raking in millions each month, we can’t rest for a moment. We established the Bennet Defense Fund in order to compete, and that’s what your contribution will help us do. Will you chip in $10 right now so we can hit our goal by Sunday at midnight? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Let’s remember what we’re fighting for here: the expansion of the Child Tax Credit, increased access to broadband nationwide, protecting our public lands and so much more. All of these things will be laughed off the agenda if Republicans flip even one Senate seat next year. Your support today is critical to this grassroots campaign and continuing progress for Colorado. Thanks, Justin Justin Lamorte Campaign Manager Bennet for Colorado Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Sec. Ryan Zinke
subject: RE: Retake the House
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
What we’re watching the Democrats and their House majority do in Washington is devastating. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7e47a826b67f47caa6cddb4e1e3e49ea&_e=NEIXcwYfSYtEGjaZoWFGkqyg42BVau-qxdzyT6Tvl52yZHztiytfcDn0hkBo6b1qQWZUYp0Kg_1c02ugwhcLmTbPSkeNsEaI3Lr1LsOK1jln-ufs1A2cwzNv4mkdpQ2GzcKkoOsx3aXeim9kBJ7pn5uGY3cYXafv9CB1LxpcwNnE_yMwdK8NTUIbz1AlE9GTYXky6FdziMP0neWEpHFGsGigvPyXZXnMH7CjD0SXUFda8KPtpYYu3siKnYfvv8u2jKRSwiWuUw-OKWML-Vgyg7cybA4uIb217utapi8iX_7kn0-YBg9wF_a9dKjWlL0bhkxWxDjs7ScgmRccm4mzThbGU6t4m_K0kTaZm1AIjsMNIWNsa_XhILJNo2I5FQH7)

---
Fellow American,

I served 23 years as a U.S. Navy SEAL - many of those as a commander at SEAL Team SIX and as deputy commander of Joint Special Forces in Iraq.

Needless to say, I know when action is needed.

What we’re watching the Democrats and their House majority do in Washington is devastating. Opening our borders, defunding our police, spying on our bank accounts, and taking away our Constitutional right to bear arms - this cannot be tolerated.

Fellow American, I’m reaching out to you today because ACTION IS NEEDED. [**I need YOU to join my team as I FIGHT to win this critical Montana Congressional race and help Republicans WIN BACK the House majority.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7e47a826b67f47caa6cddb4e1e3e49ea&_e=NEIXcwYfSYtEGjaZoWFGkqyg42BVau-qxdzyT6Tvl52yZHztiytfcDn0hkBo6b1qQWZUYp0Kg_1c02ugwhcLmTbPSkeNsEaI3Lr1LsOK1jln-ufs1A2cwzNv4mkdpQ2GzcKkoOsx3aXeim9kBJ7pn5uGY3cYXafv9CB1LxpcwNm8pNNM9qdnkwB1eKQhh8DhIXTarKN0BYqIwdFjgSDxrjG2ohgM933B-33oBl02YXLWijwetMhedxv4CcfXQCxnUoJHH-jt93J7SSTnH204ROR1NRPo4CTm8Hvl34NwBedLO1-exjtmYbq3vHrRSDzbONtGm7VTWdK1g1n8cxoc1cMvViVajdGA-tJIiHiJ0gj6rPHZZr9EmcdKywOxVdKj)

[** JOIN MY TEAM ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7e47a826b67f47caa6cddb4e1e3e49ea&_e=NEIXcwYfSYtEGjaZoWFGkqyg42BVau-qxdzyT6Tvl52yZHztiytfcDn0hkBo6b1qQWZUYp0Kg_1c02ugwhcLmTbPSkeNsEaI3Lr1LsOK1jln-ufs1A2cwzNv4mkdpQ2GzcKkoOsx3aXeim9kBJ7pn5uGY3cYXafv9CB1LxpcwNlMFEzqwxCjAJq2auN_PBO1B-OaP3ZvwpBVHr0vRKLtQoFAIs3pShFE1PgePKWnh3c7NuzYuHysdcOfkfqNfuIpF75sL9pF8g4iRadRfqBItF7kklHcMKmmpsD2yq9-zRSPH1zsKDrQerBPP0wU3nEfNT3A2UqvnrxAGBLGhw5o-wgMHwJO_kSHnvy0r4-706Jr2WqSQnnoD9QOeVrv-ZKw)

Fellow American, WE MUST protect our country from the socialists and their radical agenda.

If we don’t take action, our American way of life will be abandoned. The America that you and I grew up with will be abandoned. Any Navy SEAL will tell you - that’s not what we fought for.

[**Will you stand with me today and join my team by donating $5 to my campaign?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7e47a826b67f47caa6cddb4e1e3e49ea&_e=NEIXcwYfSYtEGjaZoWFGkqyg42BVau-qxdzyT6Tvl52yZHztiytfcDn0hkBo6b1qQWZUYp0Kg_1c02ugwhcLmTbPSkeNsEaI3Lr1LsOK1jln-ufs1A2cwzNv4mkdpQ2GzcKkoOsx3aXeim9kBJ7pn5uGY3cYXafv9CB1LxpcwNmDxsGt8uIRNVepgXc02hSn7vMiTxmmOuw_vSnFmlYD-zF0MFUCmGvczceZYNTyQzNo0vfRDbuXoi3HR2UEkhe3NcrfDmSQtyzkVQ4aw1wvapecZd5FIyk6YWZmakbZ7zF3934lmSWHBOIZjIeL0JiQTKUA1jzgXDLwullk9oW5iwSRt9uqqtVZzY4CsA79c9YLD1dEKHfJKNELQwOVORrG)

[**I won’t stop fighting until our conservative way of life is SAFE from the radical left.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7e47a826b67f47caa6cddb4e1e3e49ea&_e=NEIXcwYfSYtEGjaZoWFGkqyg42BVau-qxdzyT6Tvl52yZHztiytfcDn0hkBo6b1qQWZUYp0Kg_1c02ugwhcLmTbPSkeNsEaI3Lr1LsOK1jln-ufs1A2cwzNv4mkdpQ2GzcKkoOsx3aXeim9kBJ7pn5uGY3cYXafv9CB1LxpcwNniSGK2_3lbG0EjYUVbNh87EkhcyNpayBvswVsI92-IXBmxX917fP2jAHiCp2BEkhMKVnCRLhYIK1EJkhX75aKquUbABsXB6XUi0dvhK06XIX0wXcTgw2izZ-g-Mc84Yqubbi840cDH8tYf-fHyBF6UZVmXMzKZKxLP0gCIhZ85lsOXVbWiaLgYaqcLhs6656mSbIcapAluc4F-FM_Zh9bF)

For God and Country,

Secretary Ryan Zinke
U.S. Navy SEAL - Retired

name: Mark Jefferson - Executive Director
subject: Making inroads in every community
body:
| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1025_milwaukee_office_icymi_3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Hi Friend -- Did you hear about our grand reopening last weekend? Last Friday, the Republican Party of Wisconsin hosted a grand reopening event of our Milwaukee Headquarters featuring remarks from Senator Tim Scott: Our Milwaukee Headquarters, located in the Bronzeville neighborhood on the city’s north side, has operated on a year-round basis since February 2020, and its opening was the first outreach effort of its kind for the Republican Party in Wisconsin. **Since the headquarters’ launch, we have been able to engage with voters like never before -- forging relationships and sharing the conservative message directly with the Black community.** [**Friend, your contributions make headquarters like this possible.**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVdiBdowAWIh3820wf_KgGuqaI5zn8tBwcuM-V8LIs_7I&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1025_milwaukee_office_icymi_3&n=2) **** As Senator Tim Scott said at our event, we have to “go where we’re not invited” in order to start a conversation. This reopening was about renewing our commitment to meeting voters where they are and engaging with every community across the state. We are working tirelessly to earn every vote, and unlike the Democrats, we will never take any community for granted. [**Are you willing to chip in $25, $50, or even $100 to help us make inroads with every community?**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVdiBdowAWIh3820wf_KgGuqaI5zn8tBwcuM-V8LIs_7I&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1025_milwaukee_office_icymi_3&n=3) With your help, Friend, we can make sure that headquarters like ours in Milwaukee can stay open year-round to make sure Republicans continue to build on these relationships rather than starting from scratch during an election year. **Contributions support our ability to engage in communities where we haven’t been and ensure that all Wisconsinites can hear the conservative message. Are you able to help?** Sincerely, Mark Jefferson
Executive Director
Republican Party of Wisconsin | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVdiBdowAWIh3820wf_KgGuqaI5zn8tBwcuM-V8LIs_7I&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1025_milwaukee_office_icymi_3&n=4 "CONTRIBUTE") [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVdiBdowAWIh3820wf_KgGuqaI5zn8tBwcuM-V8LIs_7I&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1025_milwaukee_office_icymi_3&n=4)

You can also keep up with Republican Party of Wisconsin on [Twitter](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNIcJvVL3dAKuw8klLyGLeGg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1025_milwaukee_office_icymi_3&n=6) or [Facebook](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iVbepFGB501pMHJjXBPeT95kNZEWPezdnkYYctpRqhH&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1025_milwaukee_office_icymi_3&n=7).

name: Karen Bass
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Friend -- I want to share with you a milestone I'm proud of.

Already this month, we've received **hundreds of grassroots donations** from folks around the community. Behind each dollar is a person who's ready to roll up their sleeves and tackle the once-in-a-generation challenges facing Los Angeles.

I'm grateful for every single person who's invested in our campaign for mayor. Since we launched, it's been my goal to show we have strong support from every single zip code in L.A. We're counting on the people who give from emails like this one to help build our campaign and fight for real change on behalf of every single Angeleno.

**In order to stay on track for our October goal, we need to hit at least 483 more grassroots contributions by our end-of-month fundraising deadline Sunday at midnight.**

**[Friend, will you be one of the 483 people we need to make a contribution to get us to our 1,500 donor goal before Sunday's end-of-month deadline?](https://act.myngp.com/el/gHWojZwBWke1g71GJGfzPDOllc-IAMyJQdauM2CkJbU=/dGLBzgayq1avUB4V1Fla3hPqxlo61chgce9MzFwDTC0=?ms=em21_211027_eom1_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx_alask1&refcode=em21_211027_eom1_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx_alask1&source=em21_211027_eom1_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx_alask1&utm_campaign=em21_211027_eom1_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx_alask1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/gHWojZwBWke1g71GJGfzPDOllc-IAMyJQdauM2CkJbU=/dGLBzgayq1avUB4V1Fla3hPqxlo61chgce9MzFwDTC0=?ms=em21_211027_eom1_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx_albbt1&refcode=em21_211027_eom1_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx_albbt1&source=em21_211027_eom1_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx_albbt1&utm_campaign=em21_211027_eom1_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx_albbt1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)
---

The strength of our movement depends on grassroots support. And this end-of-month deadline is our first chance to prove that momentum is on our side.

From the affordable housing crisis and stagnant wages to climate change and environmental injustice -- it's time to unapologetically address the issues that have been hurting our community since long before the pandemic. We have the vision and the drive, but now I need your help powering this movement forward.

My roots are in community organizing, so when I look at our fundraising numbers it's important I see representation from every single zip code. **[Each donation we receive directly translates into growing our movement. So please- if you're able - will you pitch in any amount to help us reach our donor goal? clean_body: Friend -- I want to share with you a milestone I'm proud of. Already this month, we've received hundreds of grassroots donations from folks around the community. Behind each dollar is a person who's ready to roll up their sleeves and tackle the once-in-a-generation challenges facing Los Angeles. I'm grateful for every single person who's invested in our campaign for mayor. Since we launched, it's been my goal to show we have strong support from every single zip code in L.A. We're counting on the people who give from emails like this one to help build our campaign and fight for real change on behalf of every single Angeleno. In order to stay on track for our October goal, we need to hit at least 483 more grassroots contributions by our end-of-month fundraising deadline Sunday at midnight. The strength of our movement depends on grassroots support. And this end-of-month deadline is our first chance to prove that momentum is on our side. From the affordable housing crisis and stagnant wages to climate change and environmental injustice -- it's time to unapologetically address the issues that have been hurting our community since long before the pandemic. We have the vision and the drive, but now I need your help powering this movement forward. My roots are in community organizing, so when I look at our fundraising numbers it's important I see representation from every single zip code. Grateful to have you on this team, Karen Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A.. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Across the country, we're seeing Republican-led legislatures restrict Americans' access to reproductive health. We need her continued leadership in the Senate, fighting to protect Granite Staters' reproductive rights.

The elites flourished - our jobs were shipped overseas, crime skyrocketed, and drugs have torn our communities apart. I am different. **I am not a Washington, DC insider.** I am one of you. This is why I am running for Congress. With your help, we can bring jobs and prosperity back to Wyoming, and fight against the Radical Democrats who undermine our values, brainwash our children, and seek to dictate what decisions we make. The solutions to our problems are obvious, but the political class in DC knows that ignoring such problems helps them and hinders us. By cutting taxes and regulations and getting the federal government out of the way, American businesses can thrive and our middle class can prosper. By closing the border and building the wall, we can protect our communities from the influx of illegal aliens, illicit drugs, and human traffickers. That is the humane thing to do, and something I will fight for when I am in Congress. The Biden Administration’s border policies are not only just flat wrong, they are cruel and they need to be stopped. **All of this is possible, but I can’t change Washington without you.** [**If you are ready to change Washington, Support Team Hageman Today! >>>**](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=cNjdLOXrNVuGJHRASJfKfsziR8mcAUOfgq0P5zhAedpsZP7lrCAkCuTBVwMnIruPQoGU0WzmfVpsFpH2BFP1kPshACD43eP71oI2KHXbMt4WXqNrmMX1xxzoTlnjCI-2BMRfzL3fPaFG1Lkhv1if8S9ULyBoHWkNS0fuWyfg2Hsvo-3DuJOx_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6D7mLdLlQ88RFAKaKiLXbdgOG9HA59mGnSxygM4XRt1kaxACT0a-2BchlilQaAbpZQ-2FqcA6kgczV3psMFkeBJ36b9CCUxbUPz1431XoGbdhYEaTawfj5Gn9b-2FtR4Gk-2FgS1PQKXJekg8yzs6L3kkrphGaGmjgMRhLazfsUJ3EEE0VIg-2FOzuiDTCRgn-2FVe-2BZIFkk5vBiJsqi-2BJ-2FOPma56MsBr9JjerZBolPhCUCiLtAO7jfUJF9B25-2BDGXQn6WL87H4sx83QcW7pzQEDcVXZG186-2BQU80hoBn-2FTwQgV-2FCBNSGh-2BC3OacTCKzjVvPfRN2qNP7okrUx0J3YSPY015NQuBXVDl2lH3IMdRjsdY697mDXLKZZNYhovSt41wAUdhp4TdNmyqHPST4DfJbuNB0i3W5fNYi5vBVrtj586u7wKE9-2Fvk2pI6a36b5J96-2BBgV1pAXzt99rkCv0i45CG6L0p9WgwgImDTa2Kfb-2FAyT-2F-2FfjZHmFhb9mlhKfF6pP6wPvx8oFSQOWTUVD-2F5cY6Y8LjoAnOEn8upAL3WtluGo1kM8DHRVIm1gNWiQI6goCPPssAPefBlnAZo5gUmuaDLsKdzQaicp5dxLQL8RCdtoVV-2FGApSFyhT2kEqxVHDQsuXpHLh7yj0qbVhLb13xt9GzuBcA-2BOaa7DLVyQUTtb87eohCTfUD27suCaW8vwUkf8YBGiEG1Gcfjxy6XZvQuj9piBiViuMY9KJB-2B3hZI2iQ4znsydsZHuoZmCaw7tcPv1IPefF11hkAIWVJXrS2-2FAVrotlf4vwn-2BxUhMlK66EQ76aj368JKPP6yO9Xo9mOWT5fRNugHcYK) Together, a brighter future awaits and the American dream will be restored. clean_body: | | | | A real outsider Friend, For far too long, a small number of elites in our Nation’s Capital have sought to control essentially every aspect of our lives. The elites flourished - our jobs were shipped overseas, crime skyrocketed, and drugs have torn our communities apart. I am different. I am not a Washington, DC insider. I am one of you. This is why I am running for Congress. With your help, we can bring jobs and prosperity back to Wyoming, and fight against the Radical Democrats who undermine our values, brainwash our children, and seek to dictate what decisions we make. The solutions to our problems are obvious, but the political class in DC knows that ignoring such problems helps them and hinders us. By cutting taxes and regulations and getting the federal government out of the way, American businesses can thrive and our middle class can prosper. By closing the border and building the wall, we can protect our communities from the influx of illegal aliens, illicit drugs, and human traffickers. That is the humane thing to do, and something I will fight for when I am in Congress. The Biden Administration’s border policies are not only just flat wrong, they are cruel and they need to be stopped. All of this is possible, but I can’t change Washington without you. Together, a brighter future awaits and the American dream will be restored. No dream is too big for the United States of America, and together our brightest days are ahead. If you want to read more about why I am running for congress, " click here". For Wyoming, Harriet Hageman | | | |

name: Team Heinrich
subject: Only one seat sits between McConnell and the Senate majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38001783/313539137/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20211027_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzU0YjU5YS02MDM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R3g_W7ZjSNCR5_n2lUDm0RHdxitdnhslRoY8DdI4MPc=&emci=3cd98f90-5737-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4c54b59a-6037-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=252045)
---
**Folks, only one seat is sitting between Mitch McConnell and the Senate majority.** The GOP is threatened by all the work Democrats like Martin are doing to negotiate the Build Back Better package and deliver results on climate, jobs, and voting rights. That’s why Senate Republicans are working overtime to raise huge sums of money to flip the Senate red — _**they’ve already raked in $76.2 million this year.**_ We can’t afford to go backwards. Martin is fighting every day in the U.S. Senate to make life better for New Mexicans. He’s working to defend our majority by helping re-elect Democratic Senators in battleground states, like Mark Kelly, Raphael Warnock, and Maggie Hassan. **But our campaign doesn’t have the backing of huge Republican mega-donors — we’re relying on grassroots supporters like you to power Martin’s work in the Senate and expand our Democratic majority. body:
...since you’ve been with me since the start. Peter, I need you to hear this from me: **_I’m all in!_** I love New Mexico, but politicians -- especially Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham -- have taken our state down the wrong road and it’s time we do something about it. **_That’s why I’m running for Governor! _** **And that’s why I’m reaching out to you first. As someone who has stood with me before, your support means the world to me, and I’m asking you to join this fight with me to take back our great state and win in 2022!** [**STAND WITH MARK**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=3a9d3268ef984800a2eb9d0f6845a7fe&_e=EJ1ea9_SnStfTjjFQYJmE59TED1OC5C2h2IKlaS7nEAhjIgniY8U-65IWe7xA4xCX2zfSvp5PlMsBdmLeHxTZnoNeH6O993b3_JFBmDKrGaHOYYCkKXndnC45kwubAh9VkB55WoFRpQQ5MDmnuqx2_f9Kpch4uxs8w5KuWa40MDhD4n-IP1y4lnZszsIIYfdeT5h46RSMoIijp6M7F5uDRlK87b3E-Retr_W4XCjCPycg7v0GGEx-C88p0FLk5a5qKi8fWO_Z-RwFK7woXWbhvx3e8KVO53FAOV5a46moVytOh1MkTJiRSZMhnq_8gSbMIAIPlyPsMLZDiZTV2qvzgbGwDMUUFaoik9k8aVGHMWwBWrwCEeQlcq773phX7qgXZ2Q8Y4gHDa1kHgh6MI9XVtQzSiakM7fd66WG9NGFEFAVJfQfw9jagslR6_aA3dw_OAlA0nreRGdybLOUgkkv64k-D2Xk3b_-LlRFOEOM2tH7LmwJpvkmlMJHFwGaicOx8K5aTopy-Yseg7gTIXMVg%3D%3D) **Check out our announcement video below:** [](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=3a9d3268ef984800a2eb9d0f6845a7fe&_e=EJ1ea9_SnStfTjjFQYJmE59TED1OC5C2h2IKlaS7nEAhjIgniY8U-65IWe7xA4xCX2zfSvp5PlMsBdmLeHxTZnoNeH6O993b3_JFBmDKrGaHOYYCkKXndnC45kwubAh9VkB55WoFRpQQ5MDmnuqx2_f9Kpch4uxs8w5KuWa40MDhD4n-IP1y4lnZszsIIYfdeT5h46RSMoIijp6M7F5uDRlK87b3E-Retr_W4XCjCPycg7v0GGEx-C88p0FLk5a5qKi8fWO_Z-RwFK7woXWbhvx3e8KVO53FAOV5a46moVytOh1MkTJiRSZMhnq_8gSbfAkXMKzndXplmGp8JlTcObXqESAkhD6D7a8gYDVFOYd2G2tUj6p5mq_j8ugff3m7Q_xJ7hXztBVKzvSeaeC0Vv13f4kFzErv4TYFtK7g-mWZzuQRJ3UTqsOvyNDnl1H_YZ3TMJIOKJ8SA03FAdwWQLBaaWzj7jPXNE4g9mDNd1u5GmL95XX0rp_tNgCPewNflOI9znTnUEKB3Hy9OBms9Q%3D%3D) Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham’s liberal agenda has had disastrous consequences for New Mexico. Violent crime is out of control, our education system is ranked dead last, and the illegal drug trade - thanks to Biden’s Border Crisis - is slowly destroying our state. Simply put: **Governor Lujan Grisham’s current priorities are backwards. ** Peter, you deserve a governor that will empower our small businesses, not one who chases them to other states by ever-increasing taxes... A governor who will secure our border, not encourage illegal immigration by giving stimulus checks to illegal immigrants... And you deserve a governor who will ensure our children get the education they deserve, not one where the politicians who run our school system are more focused on liberal indoctrination than preparing our kids for the jobs of tomorrow. [**Peter, that’s why I’ve decided to take the step to run to be New Mexico’s next governor, and I wanted you to hear it first... And ask you to join me on DAY ONE.**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=3a9d3268ef984800a2eb9d0f6845a7fe&_e=EJ1ea9_SnStfTjjFQYJmE59TED1OC5C2h2IKlaS7nEAhjIgniY8U-65IWe7xA4xCX2zfSvp5PlMsBdmLeHxTZnoNeH6O993b3_JFBmDKrGaHOYYCkKXndnC45kwubAh9VkB55WoFRpQQ5MDmnuqx2_f9Kpch4uxs8w5KuWa40MDhD4n-IP1y4lnZszsIIYfdeT5h46RSMoIijp6M7F5uDRlK87b3E-Retr_W4XCjCPycg7v0GGEx-C88p0FLk5a5qKi8fWO_Z-RwFK7woXWbhvx3e8KVO53FAOV5a46moVytOh1MkTJiRSZMhnq_8gSbWh6sc7rcrWVAwsthh3uEmsjDmqiEFHRqOgFJf6NB0d8_6Q_2JSMxPCQ7gy4w9IWntITjtfh251jyGTBcExA0UDh1hr0ACpb44AyN9eVk_GpAuoqQdJpa8_Ls0ScwqJgQSHEYDAEM-byuR7ieIEEwX7R2hEkuVNp188ES63638UfCwnH-dL_jBImaRW7SsJF3pjJlG74Q9wrcDtjvGikE_Q%3D%3D) [**SUPPORT MARK [**DEFEND OUR CONSERVATIVE VALUES**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=3a9d3268ef984800a2eb9d0f6845a7fe&_e=EJ1ea9_SnStfTjjFQYJmE59TED1OC5C2h2IKlaS7nEAhjIgniY8U-65IWe7xA4xCX2zfSvp5PlMsBdmLeHxTZnoNeH6O993b3_JFBmDKrGaHOYYCkKXndnC45kwubAh9VkB55WoFRpQQ5MDmnuqx2_f9Kpch4uxs8w5KuWa40MDhD4n-IP1y4lnZszsIIYfdeT5h46RSMoIijp6M7F5uDRlK87b3E-Retr_W4XCjCPycg7v0GGEx-C88p0FLk5a5qKi8fWO_Z-RwFK7woXWbhvx3e8KVO53FAOV5a46moVytOh1MkTJiRSZMhnq_8gSbc8Af9ZV1FndwLs5Or8fO4LDTHHaJCYYCWr434Du_m3Kp22mOV__7VAiCRsDEb1vfuu_x1TbIn6ghZH4M6kgdxmzHrc5vaCIDtlysBdVJsUuBWavdhnSrDbH7bDbDKSj4dO_yu9KdOpFEB0zsIRLBvOQodXKLAu6GG-67YYyHcJr1AiZxVKAk5QdSHTvL-UvObkWbLya2Eos_HaXDfW-uaQ%3D%3D) I’m well aware this won’t be an easy road. The Radical Left is going to do everything within their power to spread lies about our conservative agenda and hold onto their power. **_The Governor attacked me before I even decided to run!_** **That’s because she has obviously seen polling that shows I can defeat her next year!** [**I need you to join me, Peter. Today, on this very first day of our fight.**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=3a9d3268ef984800a2eb9d0f6845a7fe&_e=EJ1ea9_SnStfTjjFQYJmE59TED1OC5C2h2IKlaS7nEAhjIgniY8U-65IWe7xA4xCX2zfSvp5PlMsBdmLeHxTZnoNeH6O993b3_JFBmDKrGaHOYYCkKXndnC45kwubAh9VkB55WoFRpQQ5MDmnuqx2_f9Kpch4uxs8w5KuWa40MDhD4n-IP1y4lnZszsIIYfdeT5h46RSMoIijp6M7F5uDRlK87b3E-Retr_W4XCjCPycg7v0GGEx-C88p0FLk5a5qKi8fWO_Z-RwFK7woXWbhvx3e8KVO53FAOV5a46moVytOh1MkTJiRSZMhnq_8gSbnlzwG23zV_zpuwTM_Fo-_ysCJo1xXHum3InRRRCUhi752fFli8XZbjTAZDA4P5Cdjc9tKbdLSkvG2pIr0SbK4cxbwdrXqoKI6AH7SwqmIaQjNjf00SupqFVBwemNTNJtanrwbcNtLEwLONzoPsJVWHqJhTMZC51pSixd8zYItVrzpOPNYPnyF6ZalXGtmmGGrPDeVGMrtYCspbAKfu5k7g%3D%3D) I need you to help me make sure we take our state back from the stronghold of the political elites to finally make **our** voice heard. For the last two years, while our family, friends and neighbors are struggling to make ends meet, our current governor is giving massive pay raises to her political insiders, all while she’s decided to hike taxes on _hard-working New Mexicans._ Peter, I need you to hear this very plainly from me: **Our governor is not on our side,** and it’s time we take our state back! Our state doesn’t belong to political elites. It belongs to you, me, our children, and our children’s children. [**Will you join me in the fight to return our state to the people of New Mexico? Will you help elect me to be your next governor?**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=3a9d3268ef984800a2eb9d0f6845a7fe&_e=EJ1ea9_SnStfTjjFQYJmE59TED1OC5C2h2IKlaS7nEAhjIgniY8U-65IWe7xA4xCX2zfSvp5PlMsBdmLeHxTZnoNeH6O993b3_JFBmDKrGaHOYYCkKXndnC45kwubAh9VkB55WoFRpQQ5MDmnuqx2_f9Kpch4uxs8w5KuWa40MDhD4n-IP1y4lnZszsIIYfdeT5h46RSMoIijp6M7F5uDRlK87b3E-Retr_W4XCjCPycg7v0GGEx-C88p0FLk5a5qKi8fWO_Z-RwFK7woXWbhvx3e8KVO53FAOV5a46moVytOh1MkTJiRSZMhnq_8gSbfWIxF0ViGBOmKAFhltYIAQ6bSLBMCgdMWUoBG-ObgfK95eu-lj_KCsOrldJpVbDJfDgGx-DAr7ESVfo6GC2hTivAIM78_xBB-ry2Ci0VrLK85xBliUV4G-4T-X7UBn3-mwG8u4SdoLB3ErE_v7mgMoiAibT7M-OqUL1rRB_buZue0vjibL8pGmCqUPl4D0GLmn_v4UvGv9HqRXTvw9Pn8A%3D%3D) I’m so very grateful to have your support, Peter. name: Kate Roberts, Powered By People
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

I want to be
transparent and share an important number with you today.

$21.68 — That's our average online donation so far this month. It may not
seem like much, but it's folks like you donating $21.68 — sometimes more,
sometimes less — who support our work to protect our democracy.

Our work is 100% funded by grassroots donations from people like you
because we believe it's people who should be powering change — not
corporations or special interests.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48132?refcode=ema20211027-160037&t=1001&akid=160037%2E444211%2E2csk6q ]If
you're able, could you make a donation of $21.68, or whatever amount makes
sense to you, before our end-of-month fundraising deadline on Sunday?
Every dollar makes a difference in the fight to make the change we want to
see in Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48166?refcode=ema20211027-160037&t=1020&akid=160037%2E444211%2E2csk6q ]Contribute $21.68

$21.68 is more than a dollar amount — it represents the
movement we're building to elect leaders who care about the issues
important to Texans.

$21.68 means clipboards and pens for our volunteers to take when
canvassing their neighborhoods. It means funds to travel to every corner
of the state to register new voters and speak with Texans who feel left
out of our political system. And it means having the resources to go up
against bad actors in Texas.

Here's the truth: It won't be super PACs or mega-donors that save Texas,
it will be everyday folks chipping in $21.68 or whatever they can.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48132?refcode=ema20211027-160037&t=1021&akid=160037%2E444211%2E2csk6q ]So, will you chip in and show your support for Powered by People
today? With the 2022 midterms coming up, we have a lot of work ahead to
register hundreds of thousands of new voters.

Thank you,

Kate Roberts
Powered by People

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48132?refcode=ema20211027-160037&t=1022&akid=160037%2E444211%2E2csk6q ]Donate »

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=160037%2E444211%2E2csk6q

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

Sincerely, Team Jacobs | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions are subject to the limits and prohibitions of the Federal Election Campaign Act. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals or federal government contractors are prohibited. We must use our best efforts to obtain and maintain the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per calendar year. An individual or non-multicandidate PAC may contribute $2,900 for an election. A multicandidate PAC may contribute $5,000 per election. P.O. Box 4723 3435 E. Thousand Oaks Blvd, Thousand Oaks, CA 91359

It’s no wonder so many people and organizations are stepping up to join the Team, Peter. Tom’s spent his career fighting for workers -- from implementing the nation’s first living-wage law as Maryland’s Labor Secretary to fighting employment discrimination and expanding health care for workers in President Obama’s cabinet.

**But here’s the rub: Winning campaigns aren’t built on credentials alone, and the Washington Post says our race could be the most expensive in state’s history, so coming up short could mean losing this race.**

If everyone who receives this email makes a donation (of any amount!), we’ll make up the ground we’ve lost this month and be able to fund our boots-on-the ground campaign efforts.

Tom’s campaign staff

clean_body: Our campaign to flip this state blue starts and ends with you. | Hi folks, I need to be frank with you: This email is going to ask for your contribution, because the only way we can flip Ohio blue is by building a strong ground game starting now. = Look, our campaign is about working Ohioans and their families. And that means connecting with working folks is our top priority. And how do we do that? By meeting voters where they are — in coffee shops and at county fairs, in Cincinnati and Columbus and Cleveland and everywhere in between. But none of it is possible without YOU. Supporters like you are the reason we’re able to travel from one end of this state to the other and connect with the people we hope to serve. So if you believe that we can create an Ohio where our government works for the people, = If you know that climate change is an existential threat that Ohioans can’t afford to ignore, = If you’re ready to rebuild our infrastructure, invest in our public schools and community services, and write a comeback story for our state, = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, John = = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion.
