name: MICHELLE OBAMA ALERT (via DCCC)
subject: Michelle Obama is calling on us >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| We can't believe what we're seeing.

_**Mitch McConnell probably thought** he had crushed our fight to defend voting rights for good.

**He probably thought** Republicans nationwide could get away with their attacks on our democracy.

**And he probably thought** Democrats everywhere would just pack it up, call it a day, and go home._

**But Michelle Obama just showed the world how wrong Mitch McConnell was.**

Because at this make-or-break moment for voting rights nationwide, she's calling us all to action -- **including YOU:**

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/-YK-)

**Michelle is absolutely right.**

Under no circumstances can we allow Mitch McConnell and the Republicans to claim victory in the battle for our democracy.

We MUST rise up like never before to save our voting rights -- _**and that starts with protecting our pro-voting rights Democratic House Majority.**_

**[That's why we're calling for a MASSIVE day of Democratic fundraising -- 3,000 gifts before midnight -- to answer Michelle's call and protect our House Majority. Can we count on you and your $3 straight away to elect pro-voting rights House Democrats?](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/p28-cvKw_)

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45845034&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMjk3NDk4MgS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45845034&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMjk3NDk4MgS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

| Peter -
Dan Crenshaw here. I just received good news about 2022. The latest polling shows Republicans beating Democrats by 3 points in 85 swing districts across the country. This is a major shift - earlier this year three other polls of the same 85 districts had Democrats winning. These are true battleground districts. If Joe and Nancy lose them - they lose their House majority along with any chance of passing their socialist agenda. Why is the tide turning now? Because PATRIOTS LIKE YOU have been relentless in exposing the truth about Democrats' disastrous policies. 1+ million illegal immigrants flooding across our border. Skyrocketing food and energy costs. Critical Race Theory being taught to our children. You won't see the media seriously covering these crises - except to call them made up controversies. The truth is only being exposed to voters because of our hard work.
---
| | | [DONATE. KEEP UP THE FIGHT FOR AMERICA.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RiHFfi-LleycXQlUEyxEe6JsWAX_U8OunHoq9FzX1o2022JcDgfTM6kKcBDcN8JzvCXXQpbhXA_bcdtg8-ipZMMOjodNw-OASMPnKN4u1qtpT_ILVd06UNUU43cpPz5z9eegPiVprjf8CjLT0WK-bG5FZ962VUL1fsQgmsXBURYtlDzhsgPOnAfUYa50Jj0amJA2YE36as8rgWR7kvuVDqG3dMVVzbqYNRtf3TJ_bhOUxDo3i85PkYbjOsCAjzRybXk0De-DYtCdo1u5eiDnIJUggBY75xjyq4_J975gqkYCbyHn_RSuIR2T4zXG50ddbB_YjnsF-K7eHWem_1znjieR-zUEstyVztuqlXbb46c=&c=qtyPEIXjfS8C2SaCdS5dGWGrW9KAm-SJuTsPKgqlxrZ640fZ7AqArg==&ch=U0GdyQcPngYh-FS2bYe-aPWgbzs-KfVQ5NIHeBNK7s2OcVYY47RQ8w==)
---
| Now Democrats are going to do everything they can to kill our momentum. And the next critical test is the October fundraising deadline.
I know - *another* End of Month deadline. Why does this matter? Because Joe and Nancy have hundreds of millions of dollars at their disposal thanks to their Hollywood donors and ActBlue. Any sign of weakness in our fundraising reports is an opportunity for them to pounce and turn the tide in their favor.
I'm not going to let that happen. But I need you to stay in the game with me and show the Swamp Socialists that we aren't slowing down - we are only growing stronger.

subject: The Democrats don’t want you to care about the border.

# **Friend — I’ll keep this brief: Herschel Walker is becoming the Swamp’s choice. The same gang that cost Republicans the U.S. Senate earlier this year is lining up behind him now. **

---
This means he’s going to have unlimited resources to run attack ads. And it means a lot of pressure is about to come our way to bend a knee and get out of this race. **Not happening. As I’ve said before, this race is far too important for an experiment. And it’s far too important to once again trust the same bunch that cost us before. ** **If you agree, then please help us now by rushing a donation. **
---
[**RUSH MY DONATION »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2ef6f6ddd5029206/49ef42f7bfb2644cc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Herschel may have the full support of the Swamp, but I am earning the support of Georgia voters. We have County Coordinators in all 159 counties, the endorsement of more than half of Georgia’s sheriffs, and local leaders across this state. People from Georgia, who live and vote in Georgia — that is where our support comes from, and that is what will earn this victory. **And that includes YOU. ** **If you’ve already given and are able to match your previous donation, please do so right now. ** [**And if you haven’t already, please step up RIGHT NOW and pitch in whatever you can.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2ef6f6ddd5029206/4076171a0e9c9ea8c3d6b838967d376c/37793) I’ve always been a fan of Herschel Walker the football player. But Herschel Walker the candidate cannot win a general election against Raphael Warnock — **because he cannot make this race about Raphael Warnock and Joe Biden’s total failure. ** **I can, and with your help, I will. ** Thank you for standing with us.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2ef6f6ddd5029206/6e91141aaccc6e67c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**RUSH MY DONATION »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2ef6f6ddd5029206/c27e9545de42c781c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | _**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $17 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Trumpism is on the march in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
I’m asking for your help to stop it.
#

I'm going to get to the point because we’re running out time. The Virginia Governor’s race is a must win for Democrats in 2021.
Just this week, a new Emerson College poll showed me TIED with Trump-backed Glenn Youngkin. That’s right, TIED with the guy whose extreme supporters threw a rally where they said the pledge of allegiance to a flag they took from the January 6th insurrection.
We only have days left to stop Trumpism in Virginia. Experts are saying Democrats have lost the momentum, and I’m asking for your help to prove them wrong.
**[If you’re with me, and you want to keep Virginia blue, pitch in right now by making a split donation between my campaign and Cheri Beasley’s race for U.S. Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38003099/313545866/-2021074642?refcode2=a7c76762-6537-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211027-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2M3Njc2Mi02NTM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DeQPuEKM4hT76PbDGZz6LWVxeOdg95EZlK0FROSYLbA=)**
There are just days left before Election Day, and if you’ve been waiting for the best time to donate, it’s right now.
We’re literally counting down the hours until Election Day on Tuesday.
With polls _STILL_ tied, anything can happen -- but here’s the thing, every dollar that we raise this week makes it that much more likely that we’ll turn out the voters we need to win. _And the country is counting on Virginia to stop Trumpism._

clean_body: I’m asking for your help to stop it. I'm going to get to the point because we’re running out time. The Virginia Governor’s race is a must win for Democrats in 2021. Just this week, a new Emerson College poll showed me TIED with Trump-backed Glenn Youngkin. That’s right, TIED with the guy whose extreme supporters threw a rally where they said the pledge of allegiance to a flag they took from the January 6th insurrection. We only have days left to stop Trumpism in Virginia. Experts are saying Democrats have lost the momentum, and I’m asking for your help to prove them wrong. = There are just days left before Election Day, and if you’ve been waiting for the best time to donate, it’s right now. We’re literally counting down the hours until Election Day on Tuesday. With polls STILL tied, anything can happen -- but here’s the thing, every dollar that we raise this week makes it that much more likely that we’ll turn out the voters we need to win. And the country is counting on Virginia to stop Trumpism. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = I’m up against a Trump-loving guy who has promised to go on offense and ban abortion if he’s elected. The only way the stakes could be higher would be if I were up against Donald Trump himself. name: Dr. Mary L Trump
subject: I thought more people would be worried.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
I thought more people would be concerned that my uncle, Donald Trump, could make a comeback in 2024 and win the Presidency again
#
I thought more people would be concerned that my uncle, Donald Trump, could make a comeback in 2024 and win the Presidency again
I thought that after four years of having the most dangerous man in America in the Oval Office, people would do whatever it takes to make sure he doesn’t gain power again.
_**It seems I was wrong.**_
Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate for Governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is currently tied with Terry McAuliffe in the race for governor, and Democrats seem not to notice just how important this race is.
Turnout is low, and Terry tells me that donations have slowed to a trickle. We need more resources, so he can mobilize the voters he needs to win.
**[Will you split a donation between Terry’s campaign and Jacky Rosen right now to help Terry mobilize Virginia voters over the last couple days of this election?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38003255/313546414/1352182562?refcode=jr_em_nd_211027_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDgwMTkyYi02NjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JOWnB3EMaOS3vmFGWIa-nWkpNB0RJVsG1Pm6kAO9rtI=)**
I’m stunned that more people aren’t stepping up.
Are you going to stand by and hand my uncle a victory? Or will you fight back and help Terry keep Virginia blue?
I am counting on you to make sure my uncle can’t claim victory by seeing his hand-picked candidate win in Virginia on Tuesday, November 2.

name: Team Holly
subject: Can we realistically beat Marjorie Taylor Greene?
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Dear Peter,
I'm Holly McCormack and today I'm announcing my candidacy against Marjorie Taylor Greene for Georgia's 14th Congressional District. We are kicking off our campaign today by reaching out to you because we need your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
I am a mother, small businesswoman, and a community activist. I have lived in this District most of my life and the issues our residents are facing are not addressed with conspiracy theories.
Rush a donation today:
$5.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $50.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $10.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $75.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $25.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $100.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY]Northwest Georgia is currently represented by someone who parachuted into the District just before the election because she thought it would be an easy win. She likes to make noise and fuel hate while ignoring the needs of those who actually live in our District. That is not who we are ! We need someone from our community who knows our struggles and who can stand up for us to get things done in Congress.
We need a leader who has values and empathy for everyone in her District, not just those with the loudest voices. Let's cut through the noise and get to work.
Check out our Website [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/] , Twitter [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] , and Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] . We have a tough road ahead of us but with your help we can fire Marjorie. Donate $50 today and help me take Northwest Georgia back. I couldn’t do it without you. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
In solidarity,
Holly McCormack
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] Join the #MackPack [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/ [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/] https://www.hollyforcongress.org [https://www.hollyforcongress.org]

Holly McCormack for Congress
862 Lafayette St

Ringgold, GA 30736
United States

But the fact is, we have to reach out because we rely on you. _You’re_ the reason Roy is our governor, and _you’re_ the reason we’re still fighting to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to deliver for North Carolina. **[Can you chip in to power our fight? name: Team DiSanto
subject: Delina slams Paul Gosar on his child poverty stance - he doesn't care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Delina DiSanto for Congress
body:
Replace him with a member of Congress who will actually prioritize Arizonans.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38004307/313550842/-1070898384?refcode=BLU-DDC-20211027-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDg5NjA5NC02YTM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTcxJc97N70qocuhPG7rpiaJrdB2JsF0XDXODywFiFU=)
---
| Team —

body:
| | I thought more people would be concerned that my uncle, Donald Trump, could make a comeback in 2024 and win the Presidency again. I thought that after four years of having the most dangerous man in America in the Oval Office, people would do whatever it takes to make sure he doesn’t gain power again. _**It seems I was wrong.**_ Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate for Governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is currently tied with Terry McAuliffe in the race for governor, and Democrats seem not to notice just how important this race is. name: John Fetterman
subject: re: something truly historic I need your help with
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I realize you get a lot of requests from my team + me, so I feel like I owe you an explanation.
#
Peter,
I'm coming to you with just four days left in the month to personally ask if you'd be willing to [** _kick in your first $5 to our campaign to flip this Senate seat._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/34703?refcode=em20211027-3231&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3231%2E434096%2EtkPp3I)
I realize you get _a lot_ of requests from me + our team, so I feel like I owe you an explanation.
**Peter, last time this seat was up in Pennsylvania, it wound up being the single *most expensive* Senate race in history at that time.** It set a new record for statewide campaigns in PA — but ultimately we were outspent by the GOP, losing by just over 1% of the vote. 🙄
Now's our chance to finish the job. But in order to pull this off it's clear we'll have to smash some records of our own. That's why I'm incredibly humbled + grateful to share with you that our campaign is closing in on $10 *million* raised since we first announced, **and that we're pushing really hard to get there by our deadline this Sunday, October 31 at 11:59 p.m.**
If we do, we'll be able to expedite our plan to hire enough organizers to reach every one of PA's 67 counties, so I'm asking for your help today:
[**_Will you be among the 31 folks from Cresco we need in order to reach our historic goal of $10 million raised before this Sunday's deadline? My team + I crunched the numbers, and we think we can get there if enough of yinz are willing to help out._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/34703?refcode=em20211027-3231&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3231%2E434096%2EtkPp3I)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/34703?refcode=em20211027-3231&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3231%2E434096%2EtkPp3I)**
It's mind-blowing to me that we're closing in on this historic milestone. The fact that we're even close is honestly surreal — and a true testament to the folks who've chipped in to our campaign in small amounts whenever possible.
It's proof of our undeniable strength in numbers. 💪
I fully realize that $10 million is a staggering amount of money to be spent to flip one Senate seat — but our grassroots fundraising is so critical because **every dollar we raise in this early stage gets put straight towards our organizing program, hiring key staff, and building a movement capable of overcoming the deep-pocketed GOP in the general election.**
[**_Now that you've heard what your support today would mean, would you be able to donate your first-ever $5 before Sunday's deadline at 11:59 p.m.? We're ~98% to our goal, so any amount at all will play a role in reaching this huge benchmark._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/34703?refcode=em20211027-3231&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3231%2E434096%2EtkPp3I)
Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU. 😭
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. It feels surreal to even type it out, Peter, but I'm deeply grateful to share that our team is closing in on $10 *million* raised over the course of our campaign — **and that we think we could get there by Sunday at midnight if around 31 folks from Cresco are able to chip in.****_[Could I count on you to be among them?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/34703?refcode=em20211027-3231&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=3231%2E434096%2EtkPp3I)_**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211027-3231-footer&t=24&refcode2=3231_434096_tkPp3I&akid=3231%2E434096%2EtkPp3I)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=3231%2E434096%2EtkPp3I)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=3231%2E434096%2EtkPp3I)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Donna Imam
subject: Why we need a billionaire tax:
body:
As of yesterday, Elon Musk is worth over a quarter of a trillion dollars. Yet in 2018, he paid $0 in tax. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38004820/313553318/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTQ1OGIxMS02ZDM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JhIxEc2UxoglrnZxHDnnctVBqJXdUMxmC9pMulChupI=)
Friend,

The top 1% in the United States have more wealth than the bottom 90% combined. That’s just illogical. For example, Elon Musk is worth over a quarter of a trillion dollars -- yet he paid $0 in tax in 2018. Meanwhile, working families are struggling with student loan debt and the skyrocketing costs of basics like health and childcare.

President Biden and Democrats are working around the clock to pass the Build Back Better Act, which would make the tax code more fair. Senate Democrats are discussing a plan to tax billionaires -- that's just 700 people.

Many of these billionaires pay little to no taxes because they have no salary while taking loans against their stock portfolio to fund lavish lifestyles. Their wealth grows and is never taxed. That’s unconscionable, especially right now when 1 in 7 children in our country experience food insecurity and don't have enough to eat. We must institute a billionaire wealth tax.

**Now is the time to elect Democrats who don’t just make promises, but actually work to deliver for working families. Texans have an opportunity to lead in Austin for the first time in decades.**

[**Sunday marks our end-of-month fundraising deadline. Will you chip in $3 to make sure a true champion for working families represents us in Austin? We need to raise $8,397 today to stay on track.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38004821/313553319/1898666321?refcode=em-102721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTQ1OGIxMS02ZDM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JhIxEc2UxoglrnZxHDnnctVBqJXdUMxmC9pMulChupI=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38004822/313553320/1898666321?refcode=em-102721-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTQ1OGIxMS02ZDM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JhIxEc2UxoglrnZxHDnnctVBqJXdUMxmC9pMulChupI=)

name: Great America Update
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c428%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=5%2b4Sjwl99BUYRlY5fRt4mQ&sysid=1)
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66456%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oeq44Iqgb88HjLdnQhHK6g&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans--views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66457%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ouCPIjh4qJv8Z36CMsLrnQ&sysid=1)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive--and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66458%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9gg2umhuEOCGy9TKu1%2fNuA&sysid=1)
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

clean_body: Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. | | | | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans--views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive--and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | Warm Regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314 |

I’ve met thousands of Alabamians who feel left behind by Biden’s agenda, but I want to know what YOU think. Thank you, Katie Britt - Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

Friends,
The end of October is our first fundraising deadline. The first few days of this campaign have whooshed by — political calls, donor calls, media availabilities, and meet ‘n greets — made for a hectic yet productive first ten days. We did a lot of ‘firsts.’ My focus now is securing funding to send the campaign in high gear.
**[Now, I'm going to ask you to chip in $10, $15, $100, or whatever you can before Sunday at midnight so we can reach our $125,000 fundraising goal.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xnpPS9ElAtCH4oZLR7595Zq09gnDzcRbJCOrFmiHYHnjglxkrrsFzhU9svWvmQSA0J17fu10DLg5nAEBGC9LQRRTCGmklPJqsh-zaouPS3i9UI1Qt5X5ngwzkPEIwiJygLz1s0RwDZL8TlomNQ79yEZRwQ84fOY0KwXW9NqPWDhRvbc4c9kp9Fm2a-Ta_T_V06LuENx3uJfpzh08iJcGskzHD8yhFWZMAoeqohrRXwTpEJS2ILUYHuU6eGIjF7ThbVk0kBCqYG5wwmgiCYyJITc4-ORUgt2o00-XtesMx_N60fGNRDynOKD_TFacayaM7KX7TFHR2FUTwB3_-8lHeQZPG6OuYLsZENtFoSpMalXHyUG79i2U9HoHafIff_OAjSzblSJGwl8vtwj2VpJ3y0/3gi/b1U9VDufTgSk_nXxLB2QIA/h1/tLJykiCgzOyFQDGrKTulddJ68RFle9tII5yKlvuIsOE)**

**Not ready to chip in yet? I hope you'll allow me to explain why this is fundraising deadline is mission-critical:**
First, campaigns take resources. Without your support, we can't train our volunteers, or outfit our 99 County Commanders. We need to put on events to bring in other donors and to earn a long list of like-minded supporters. We have a message and a resume to garner a broad swath of Iowans.
I truly believe we have a winning message. Job #1 is to strike a blow against the dysfunction in Washington. I know how to get things done across agencies. Action will help hardworking families in the state, expand business opportunities to slow climate change and bring more sustainable ag to our farmers, and bring no nonsense leadership to the US Senate.
Second, one unfortunate but true fact about politics is that everyone puts your fundraising numbers under a microscope. And I do mean everyone, including the press, political insiders here in Iowa, and even Chuck Grassley's campaign. They're all going to pour over our public reports like an ancient manuscript, all in hopes of seeing how strong our campaign is.
Personally, I'd prefer it if we focused on which candidate has the best plans and the best temperament to lead. But since we don't live in that world, I think we ought to send a signal to the political class that our campaign is best positioned to take on Sen. Grassley next fall and win – don't you?
**[This is our only chance to make a first impression to the political insiders, the pundits, and most of all, the voters. So let's make it count.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xnpPS9ElAtCH4oZLR7595Zq09gnDzcRbJCOrFmiHYHnjglxkrrsFzhU9svWvmQSA0J17fu10DLg5nAEBGC9LQRGHbSM-nVgnHe_WDv2r_zdq3bcojKZCHCBqtKyeuRwe-blS2MCyk6lFHosv-uqVXZXO-xzhtvclyxDzhAgg55v1lYr_uKgGaN5Vlh5zhFYMK_Sinw66aQRfKPqCcwt7TWDFNlNMCXeNl_waqU9g61DD6Id2o0PPH8AdgQa1aea-PbvKF3hrvf938-Fnt7q2D4iDuskOjVLd30goM54ZcLTbCQHPO6kSVfb98LrXN0DJJwTx1WjO0aToXKrLxQYdvcyUvxcFa1lCGityK76z0xycDZa4Wu3MaF9zx_E9KHGiOn3B68vUPQGUxJwanRFRSW/3gi/b1U9VDufTgSk_nXxLB2QIA/h3/350EMh8UTklpS1xGlLWym9Yu0z2senP06rHnecR9Auo)**

body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38005006/313553764/-2023814932?refcode=20211027.8_JC_10IG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTQ1OGIxMS02ZDM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A10zhG3ePawSRzRFJ1dBlex_foShEQFsEgiJqBSJg24=)

| | Derek,

I’m emailing you because Terry McAuliffe has less than 12 hours to hit his million dollar goal, and he just called to let me know that he’s behind where he needs to be.

This is the absolute _worst_ time to be losing ground — we’ve got to pull it together.

Glenn Youngkin has the entire National Republican Party (including Donald Trump!) behind him. These guys are gonna pour resources into Virginia because they know how important it is for them to win.

body:

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66451%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fq%2bFE2pGza8DJKQjV4sDsg&sysid=1)
---
Friend,

Terry McAuliffe is officially scared.

**Terry knows he can’t win, so he is bringing in Stacey Abrams, Kamala Harris, Joe Biden, and even Jill Biden to campaign on his behalf.** He needs the help of corrupt career politicians who campaign on stale political ideas...that do not work.

Terry McAuliffe is officially showing how desperate he is. | [**KEEP TERRY SCARED**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66452%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TQ2BJIcfGqFZUjeZ2AYAAw&sysid=1)

I am campaigning across the Commonwealth of Virginia, as a Virginian. I am here to represent you and no one else, and I am going to work for every single Virginian.**Our momentum continues to grow, but I need your help to continue to keep Terry McAuliffe on his toes.**

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Senate Update: Working Overtime to Pass the Build Back Better Agenda
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501155413%2501100559%2b-%2b10-27-2021%2beNewsletter%250115254.29303870.5510700.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501155413%2501100559%2b-%2b10-27-2021%2beNewsletter%250115254.29303870.5510700.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **October 27, 2021** |
---|---|---|---
| | | We are working around the clock to try to finalize and pass the key parts of President Biden's Build Back Better Agenda - including provisions from his American Jobs Plan and his American Families Plan. I was pleased to [join the President](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15254.29303870.5510700.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1451362998929477635&redir_log=384469576344375) last week for his CNN Town Hall in Baltimore to discuss the plan, and we are continuing to pursue a two-track process to get both the [Senate-passed Bipartisan Infrastructure Deal](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15254.29303870.5510700.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-statement-on-senate-passage-of-the-bipartisan-infrastructure-bill&redir_log=277340132695913) and our [Build Back Better Budget](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15254.29303870.5510700.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-statement-on-senate-passage-of-the-build-back-better-budget-resolution&redir_log=609940537367942) reconciliation package to the President's desk - I am committed to getting that done.

Together, these two key pieces of legislation make transformational investments in the success of American families, workers, and communities. This package of bills will help modernize Maryland's roads, bridges, transit systems, and ports; build out broadband across our state; deliver tax cuts for middle-class families with children; provide for universal early education and affordable child care; fight the climate crisis with a transition to a clean energy economy; expand access to affordable in-home care for seniors and disabled individuals; and so much more. And we will pay for these vital initiatives with long-overdue reforms to our tax system to prevent large corporations from hiding profits overseas and ensure that the wealthiest of the wealthy do more to invest in the success of all.

While it is no secret that we have had vigorous debates within our Senate Democratic Caucus over the size and scope of these bills, I am fully committed to getting both pieces of legislation across the finish line. We must stay the course and push forward in service of building a more inclusive economy with more shared prosperity.

But as Senate Democrats have continued to advance negotiations to enact our bold agenda, Senate Republicans have sadly fallen back on their old tactics of obstruction and disruption. Republican Leader Mitch McConnell has made clear that he remains "100 percent" focused on stopping the Biden Administration. That political cynicism has pushed our country to the brink of serious financial peril, just as we're beginning to recover from the economic fallout of the pandemic.

First, Republicans in Congress dragged their feet when it came time to vote on an essential measure to keep the government open - though I'm glad that enough Republican senators finally joined Democrats in a bipartisan vote to provide emergency relief to states harmed by natural disasters and keep the government open to avoid a shameful and unnecessary shutdown. But it should not have taken until the very last minute to build bipartisan consensus around this necessary measure. Now we face another looming government shutdown deadline of December 3rd.

Then, Senate Republicans repeatedly refused to help raise the debt ceiling so America can pay off the debts it already owes - even though the GOP was responsible for ballooning our national debt by passing the 2017 Trump Tax Bill without any plan to pay for it. Over one quarter of the total national debt was accrued during the four years that Donald Trump was in office, and 97% of it is from before Joe Biden was even sworn in as President.

Eleven Senate Republicans finally joined Democrats to end the filibuster that stood in the way of raising the debt ceiling to prevent an economic catastrophe. But this is far from over. Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans only agreed to allow the U.S. to avoid a debt default until early December. They are again threatening to block Democrats from raising the debt ceiling at that time. The U.S. has never defaulted on its debts. To do so would shatter the full faith and credit of the U.S. government and plunge the economy into chaos. Projections from top experts estimate that a prolonged default on the nation's debts would cost the U.S. economy up to six million jobs, wipe out as much as $15 trillion in household wealth, and send the unemployment rate surging to roughly 9%.

We've bought some time, but we will be right back where we started in early December if the Senate GOP refuses to get on board with a long-term plan to keep the government open and allow the government to pay off the debts it has already incurred. It's time for Senate Republicans to either join us in doing the right thing for the country and the economy or [get out of the way](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15254.29303870.5510700.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1441201946614927360&redir_log=27000950934373) and stop filibustering so Democrats can do it themselves.
---
### Defending Every American's Right to Vote
The fight to protect our democracy and ensure that every citizen can exercise their constitutional right to make their voice heard at the ballot box has never been more urgent. Trump's Big Lie is threatening our democracy. First, it took the form of a violent mob attacking the Capitol for the purpose of overturning the last presidential election. When that failed, Republican-controlled state legislatures rushed to erect new barriers to the voting booth. States like Georgia, Florida, and Texas - along with many others - have passed laws expressly designed to make it harder for people of color and younger voters to cast their votes.

We can't let the Big Lie inflict further harm on our democracy and allow Republican state legislatures to continue their full-fledged assault on voters' rights. We have a duty to act - which is why I [rallied](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15254.29303870.5510700.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1437900382445969412&redir_log=996657737882373) with advocates and fellow lawmakers last month as part of our broader effort to pass legislation immediately in the Senate and stop the implementation of these dangerous state bills. I am glad that all 50 members of the Senate Democratic Caucus support the Freedom to Vote Act -- which would establish national standards to protect the right to vote, eliminate secret money in elections, and establish uniform rules to prevent - on a nationwide basis - the partisan gerrymandering of congressional districts. But when we tried to bring that bill up for a vote last week, Senator McConnell and every single Republican senator used the filibuster to [block its consideration](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15254.29303870.5510700.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1450909103644086275&redir_log=548524289823373). It's yet another reminder of why we must immediately end or amend the undemocratic, antiquated filibuster.

I'm glad that earlier this month, we were able to take an important step toward securing the right to vote by [reintroducing our John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15254.29303870.5510700.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1445517453694435328&redir_log=143688974045374) - legislation named in honor of civil rights giant John Lewis that will repair the damage the Supreme Court did to the Voting Rights Act in its infamous 2013 Supreme Court decision _Shelby County v. Holder_. Every Democratic senator favors this bill, and we will seek to bring this bill up for debate and a vote in the next few weeks. However, unless something changes, it appears that Senate Republicans will also use the filibuster to block it. Again, these Republicans are using the filibuster to prevent the Senate from protecting our democracy at this urgent moment. It must go.
### Protecting Reproductive Rights from the Assault on _Roe v. Wade_
On September 1st, the Supreme Court handed down a [devastating ruling](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15254.29303870.5510700.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1433486197461065728&redir_log=297341693883374) that failed to block the patently unconstitutional Texas state law that outlaws abortions after six weeks and empowers vigilante groups to enforce it. The Supreme Court, in _Roe v. Wade_ , long ago determined that a woman's reproductive health care decisions cannot be taken away by Republican state lawmakers in Texas or anywhere else. I stand in solidarity with women in Texas and across our country who are demanding action, and we must fight to protect reproductive rights now. Earlier this month, I joined the [Rally for Abortion Justice in Annapolis](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15254.29303870.5510700.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1444444684290596872&redir_log=760590242771374) to defend _Roe v. Wade_ and stand up for women's rights to determine their own futures. This right is under attack in Mississippi, Texas, and around the country - and we will not rest until it is secured for all.

This constitutional right is under threat in the current Supreme Court that has been stacked by President Trump and Senator McConnell with very, very conservative justices. That's why I also joined colleagues in filing a [bicameral amicus brief](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15254.29303870.5510700.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-cardin-join-amicus-brief-urging-scotus-to-protect-reproductive-rights-by-upholding-roe-and-rejecting-mississippis-blatantly-unconstitutional-law-&redir_log=102322835461483) in the case of _Dobbs v. Jackson Women 's Health Organization_ to urge the Supreme Court to uphold nearly 50 years of precedent in _Roe v. Wade_ and protect the constitutional right to abortion care. The case is scheduled to be heard by the Supreme Court in early December and decided next year.

But we should not be rolling the dice on a positive decision by the current stacked Supreme Court. We must do everything in our power to protect and codify the rights provided under _Roe v. Wade_. That's why the House of Representatives passed the Women's Health Protection Act, which would override state laws like the one in Texas and provide a nationwide insurance policy against the Supreme Court overturning _Roe v. Wade_. Now it's time for the Senate to pass that bill. But, again, Senate Republicans have made clear they will use the filibuster to block the vote.
### Removing Monuments that Honor the Legacy of Slavery
The judiciary has an obligation to deliver equal justice under the law. Yet, for years there has stood outside of the Talbot County Courthouse a symbol that embodies the opposite: injustice and inequality. The Talbot Boys Statue - which was erected over 50 years after the Civil War during the era of Jim Crow when the KKK and white supremacy were on the rise - glorifies soldiers who fought with the Confederacy to protect and preserve the evil institution of slavery. I've repeatedly called for the statue's removal and was [glad to see the Talbot County Council finally vote to remove it](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15254.29303870.5510700.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-statement-on-talbot-county-council-vote-to-remove-talbot-boys-confederate-statue-from-courthouse-grounds&redir_log=340345706671192).

Their decision is not only important to the Talbot County community, it is also vital to upholding the fundamental principles that undergird America's justice system. And our efforts to remove monuments glorifying the confederacy must go hand-in-hand with efforts to erect monuments that celebrate those who have committed their lives to bending the moral arc of the universe toward justice. That's why I reintroduced [legislation to honor Maryland's own Harriet Tubman with a statue](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15254.29303870.5510700.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2f03%2f10%2f2021%2fvan-hollen-cardin-klobuchar-reintroduce-legislation-to-bring-harriet-tubman-statue-to-us-capitol&redir_log=76656749291114) in the United States Capitol, and I have been heartened by the outpouring of support from across our state and our country for this initiative. As we work to take meaningful action to root out the deep systemic racism embedded in our institutions, removing the glorification of those who promoted these policies is also a must.

The success of these efforts - and others - is only possible with the continued partnership of community leaders, activists, advocates, and so many more - and it's the strength of those grassroots efforts that will allow us to move forward, toward brighter days ahead. Democracy is not a spectator sport. Its success relies on the participation of a vigilant and informed citizenry. It's in that spirit that [I hope you will continue to stay engaged.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15254.29303870.5510700.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fcontact&redir_log=475918421268285)

Chris Van Hollen
[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15254.29303870.5510700.7517223&report_id=Facebook&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=328155479639284 "Facebook")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15254.29303870.5510700.7517223&report_id=Twitter&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen&redir_log=957640916473241 "Twitter")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15254.29303870.5510700.7517223&report_id=Instagram&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.instagram.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=389295287187292 "Instagram")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15254.29303870.5510700.7517223&report_id=YouTube&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fuser%2fRepChrisVanHollen&redir_log=463627374976326 "YouTube")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15254.29303870.5510700.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmedium.com%2f%40ChrisVanHollen&redir_log=575666539451239)
|
---
[Please click here to unsubscribe](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//EsurveyForm.aspx?__cid=SenVanHollen&__sid=100007&__crop=15254.29303870.5510700.7517223)

Get the scoop on voter turnout now.

Team, you are receiving this email on behalf of NextGen PAC. We need as many people as possible to help us engage and mobilize young voters, but if you would prefer not to receive emails in the future, please feel free to [unsubscribe](https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/312900da-5637-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/0fb797f6-6f37-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmI3OTdmNi02ZjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sJ4ZAfo__RUc3K49Qt762tqTWf80lgtQNevCdksMnY4=&id=109799863). Team, **Election Day is less than one week away.**

Off-year elections are often overlooked, but turnout in these races is crucial. Unfortunately, older, whiter, wealthier, and more conservative voters are more likely to turn out during the off-year.

_Here at NextGen PAC, we cannot accept that._

We know that you care just as much as we do about getting young voters to the polls, so we need you to partner with us. We’re working hard to back progressive candidates up and down the ballot who will **fight to solve climate change, racial injustice, runaway inequality and save democracy itself — _and we need your help._**

name: Rick Scott
subject: Our End-of-Month deadline is approaching.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Only if you step up. | Friend,

Make no mistake, if we allow Democrats to UNDO President Trump’s accomplishments and take us down this dark path, the American people, like YOU, will suffer.

**As the Chairman of the NRSC, I cannot let that happen. As an American citizen, YOU cannot let that happen, Friend.**
We have a **MAJOR End -of-Month deadline** coming up and we could really use your support if we’re going to TAKE BACK Trump’s Majority in 2022.

Hitting our fundraising goal will help us stay on track to _DEFEAT the Democrats in 2022_ and SAVE AMERICA. We can’t do it without you, which is why we activated a _600% -MATCH_ on your next gift when you step up TODAY.

name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: OFFICIALLY 6 Days until Election Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YOUNGKIN FOR GOVERNOR INC
body:
Coming up short is not an option. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c423%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ELJsJpUutt%2f9JzxD%2fqPjZA&sysid=1)
Coming up short is not an option.

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66466%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ulexEjamMvHo%2fbbYScPE%2fw&sysid=1)
---
Friend,
**We are officially less than 7 days away from Election Day.** ****
I am excited to announce that this is my FINAL weekly fundraising deadline. My team and I MUST reach $75,000 by FRIDAY. **[ALL donations made this week will go directly towards handing out yards signs, staffing last-minute door knockers, and pushing people to the polls to VOTE GLENN.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66467%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qB986dL9M7JEiD5nezjQ%2fw&sysid=1)** | | [**CHIP IN TO REACH MY FINAL WEEKLY GOAL!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66468%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=H2nt5sLnNDbqiRbsyiquhA&sysid=1)
---
This race is a dead tie, and if I don’t reach my final weekly fundraising goal we are going to be in trouble come Election Day.

The clock is ticking, and coming up short is not an option.

_**Can I count on you to help me reach my FINAL weekly goal before it’s too late?**_
**[Yes GLENN! name: Leslie Hubert - Grassroots Director
subject: Find out how to run for local office!
body:
Local Candidate Bootcamp

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_training_1101_3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Hi Friend -- We wanted to make sure that you saw our **virtual candidate training** this upcoming Monday, November 1, 2021\. We will cover how to set up your campaign, working with local stakeholders, how to effectively message and so much more! Senator Ron Johnson said it best, _"We must take back_ _ the level of “government closest to the governed” from those who wish to divide us all and destroy established traditions and values; by doing this we can take back our culture, our children’s education, and our cities, towns, and counties."_ Whether you're considering or committed to running for local office, or perhaps you're helping someone else run, we hope you'll join us from the comfort of your own home, and learn what it takes to run! **Zoom-In:** Monday, November 1st, 7pm - 9:00pm
##### _*When you RSVP, you'll receive the zoom link and course materials._
______ | [](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_11_01?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_training_1101_3&n=2 "RSVP HERE") [RSVP HERE](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_11_01?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_training_1101_3&n=2)
---
|
Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States

You can also keep up with Republican Party of Wisconsin on [Twitter](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNIcJvVL3dAKuw8klLyGLeGg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_training_1101_3&n=4) or [Facebook](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iVbepFGB501pMHJjXBPeT95kNZEWPezdnkYYctpRqhH&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_training_1101_3&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_training_1101_3&n=6), software for leaders.
clean_body: Local Candidate Bootcamp | | | ---|---|--- Hi Friend -- We wanted to make sure that you saw our virtual candidate training this upcoming Monday, November 1, 2021\. We will cover how to set up your campaign, working with local stakeholders, how to effectively message and so much more! Senator Ron Johnson said it best, "We must take back the level of “government closest to the governed” from those who wish to divide us all and destroy established traditions and values; by doing this we can take back our culture, our children’s education, and our cities, towns, and counties." Whether you're considering or committed to running for local office, or perhaps you're helping someone else run, we hope you'll join us from the comfort of your own home, and learn what it takes to run! Zoom-In: Monday, November 1st, 7pm - 9:00pm *When you RSVP, you'll receive the zoom link and course materials. ____ | "RSVP HERE" | Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States

name: Tony Vargas
subject: Let me give you 3 reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
|
---

| | [**_I’m about to ask you to chip in to my become a Founding Member of my campaign. But if you’re in a rush, please pitch in a donation of any amount to support my run for Congress before you go. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38006497/313560464/1129282168?refcode=20211027_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTY2NGQwMC03NTM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F7Ywg1afmF19dw_QQiC3n5pBJhehzsjtU0ivwlDNZCA=) Let me give you 3 reasons why donations from my Founding Members are so critical.
1. I’m running in one of the most competitive races in the country.
2. Don Bacon is one of the most vulnerable members up for reelection and DC Republicans are lining up to support him.

| Let's start with the facts regarding the FDA's recent endorsement of COVID vaccines for children - if you're under the age of 14, the threat of this disease is negligible.
What parent or government in their right mind would want to inject our healthy children with this experimental procedure?! This is what we can expect from the same FDA that unleashed a fatal opioid crisis on its people just 25 years ago!
I'm sounding the alarm bells on this because if I don't, who else will? Too many are content to let Big Pharma and Big Government get away with this scheme - and now our CHILDREN are being caught in the crosshairs!

clean_body: | | | | | | | == | | Peter, | Let's start with the facts regarding the FDA's recent endorsement of COVID vaccines for children - if you're under the age of 14, the threat of this disease is negligible. What parent or government in their right mind would want to inject our healthy children with this experimental procedure?! This is what we can expect from the same FDA that unleashed a fatal opioid crisis on its people just 25 years ago! I'm sounding the alarm bells on this because if I don't, who else will? Too many are content to let Big Pharma and Big Government get away with this scheme - and now our CHILDREN are being caught in the crosshairs! | | | == | Take a look at my comments about this on Fox and Friends: | == | Weak, Establishment Republicans aren't going to get anything done on this issue - they're content to let Big Pharma get away with this money-grab, just like they let them kill off thousands during the opioid crisis. If we're going to finally say no to this insanity, it's going to take real leadership with a backbone - something that I hope to bring to the table here in this PA Senate race. == We don't have time to waste! | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Thanks for standing with me on this, | == | Kathy Barnette | | | | Kathy Barnette for Senate | == | == == == | | | Kathy Barnette for Senate | P.O. I thought more people would be concerned that my uncle, Donald Trump, could make a comeback in 2024 and win the Presidency again.
I thought that after four years of having the most dangerous man in America in the Oval Office, people would do whatever it takes to make sure he doesn’t gain power again.
**_It seems I was wrong._**
Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate for governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is currently tied with Terry McAuliffe in the race for governor, and Democrats seem not to notice just how important this race is.
Turnout is low, and Terry tells me that donations have slowed to a trickle. We need more resources, so he can mobilize the voters he needs to win.

name: Bianca Keaton
subject: This number is one of the truest representations of our movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Today, I want to share with you our average contribution this month:
$20.36.

This number is one of the truest representations of our grassroots,
people-powered movement. It’s proof that something special is happening in
Kentucky.

There’s evidence all around us that there’s incredible enthusiasm for us
to take on Rand Paul and end this chapter of failed leadership in our
Commonwealth. But in order to get there, we need to get mobilized. We need
to organize Kentuckians, from the hood to the holler, to turn out to
volunteer and vote — and we need to do it, starting now.

That’s why my team and I have set an aggressive goal for our end-of-month
fundraising deadline on Sunday, October 31 to fund our grassroots
organizing strategy for the next month. Currently, we’re 19% away — with
just four days to go.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11900?refcode=em20211027-1112&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=1112%2E346206%2EfEHwGe ]It won’t be easy to reach this goal,
Peter, but I believe we can do
it. It’s going to take a team effort to get there, so I have to ask: Will
you please chip in $5 or whatever you can afford right now?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11900?refcode=em20211027-1112&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1112%2E346206%2EfEHwGe ]DONATE NOW →

We have the energy on our side to transform Kentucky,
Peter. There’s no doubt about
that. But the harsh reality we face is this: defeating Rand Paul is going
to take significant resources and funding.

And since we refuse to take a single dime from special interests or
corporations, we’re relying on people like you reading this email right
now — and hitting every goal from now until the election — to help us keep
up with our fundraising and future plans.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11900?refcode=em20211027-1112&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1112%2E346206%2EfEHwGe ]So what do you say,
Peter? Will you help us out
before the end-of-the-month fundraising deadline in four days? Donate
whatever you can to our campaign right now and we’ll be that much closer
to reaching our goal.

Thanks for all that you do,

Bianca
Campaign Manager, Booker for Kentucky

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211027-1112-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1112_346206_fEHwGe&akid=1112%2E346206%2EfEHwGe

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1112%2E346206%2EfEHwGe

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Terry McAuliffe has made it clear not once, not twice, but SEVEN times on tape that he won't let parents have a say in their child's education.

_That 's only what's on tape, there's no telling what kind of radical policies he's planning behind closed doors..._

Here's what we do know. Terry plans to:

**-> Kick parents out of their kids' classrooms
-> Defund hard working law enforcement
-> Let the unions have complete control
-> Bring the federal government's unconstitutional mandates to Virginia**

Can you imagine if that happened to your state Friend?

We've already seen what happens when Democrats go unchecked -- look at California and New York! Terry McAuliffe wants to recycle failed liberal policies and cross his fingers and hope they work.

That's not how our states thrive. We need conservative leaders to get our country back on track. It starts in Virginia Friend. **[I hope I can count on your help to flip Virginia RED and restore conservative policies.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=bfe1caabf696428992a21ca01c02f701&_e=JA123bk6lth6Wt5KiG1OQiUAuxhnuJc8sTT0DpF--gW1-KEP4WcBPDCPNPinrthMm2PLafxCEjUjegqADn3saa3Ds2Do9-5vKLUu6_Kq7HkszFC0kpDd-VfZKhBIqKDV2I3CWkjTn7cnAtdPxP1EAnX0F3CztkI4o5N1e_L3ONSwp1v0SifiMiWSwhROL7tifHnkJaSgaQRNf9mB3q5vo-jOu8LwL09n_t-uLJizYI6be4BdHJD5Nq0pOHBpWLZ_2A7lp-rzDyDMmL9VG0R4NCpuKNG4VUWSoDuORffO9ALZS5C9oBWj3eq3fxaEWt9zTaOzfi6xq0fUmsAXJdwTCA9lYUXGv2wAj8tnXNkv3z-fp3gYbLLZ8lJhV59KdAe-et2wM4DhJkSKew4tjhN8n4S477IA5sOaAlwpSdOoBDJfbz7jjUHXyp0GMmXROZDpVkHN3lZyTx6UEYtJo2akKdnZDl5ZprgppCc7oHklLbFP6BqPxbShsqEsIL7ysdPEG2cpqfqHgoCkildOUYNtyA%3D%3D "I hope I can count on your help to flip Virginia RED and restore conservative policies.")**

body:
The US Senate is the last line of defense!

| [](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=d361e26ed6a4456a866338ce1b0aae41&_e=7ohAYGkyQDYvYgINrtqW8UifplMrch_QDq_jnWPSSZobzPm3kdXO6jyxRycDxQ85KDLTN0gtnXZaho7WuISPyIlqiWp-f1lnSYg81cayBm0xkos6yJH4CkGjbe95Wzdo27_JRzHy_EaQ-mh6SQYWlXUtCBxu4mwOQ8nbrA3kLoq4wZWMeJmdMakcZRpgL6_jPlYY7m9eD4mCXBGdpilNAdhJF19S2M9xsWSTljkLBTafVaUHVuPhluU1eidCPnnWQ3G07SrA5ts0fJKeClMumewqjJeYWBp_hNtfwArJXgmFPmjPeKPamn65_-MNxA_VRKcWANB9r_EIp5cUoarFmRLtXwaUDCV0L1RFvW1LTLPzB8oPZGr30rP3ZJbOWMxKbELS47QmGiaC9wFA6JNYijtKUhAOqIdfX7ufJhQEAv4EGVjuLoWQsIhNdz-2L1-JcGrDjH_vRkFaBYL8UFpZckUAT9VAqabI6wiX99OVk6Q%3D) TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA
* * *
---
Fellow Patriot,

**_I am calling on you today!_**

body:
Build Back Better plans to pay for itself by having corporations pay their fair share of taxes. But these Dems are against it >>

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38007287/313563252/1300596418?refcode=211027_FR_sheniseattacks-RS_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY3MWM4NmY5LTc3MzctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dFqv9Otm2AcoFpxO4FLAAIgdgy7lHfoTjW3UTVNLO-8=)
---
Our endorsed candidate, Shenise Turner-Sloss, a __Democrat and front-runner__ for Dayton City Commission in Ohio, is under attack for speaking truth to power on police violence that has gone unchecked in her community -- __by FELLOW Democrats.__

**Although we are disgusted, we are not surprised. At Barrier To Entry PAC, we know that even when the establishment gets it wrong, the PEOPLE can get it right.**

Here is the mailer they had the audacity to send out: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38007288/313563253/1300596418?refcode=211027_FR_sheniseattacks-RS_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY3MWM4NmY5LTc3MzctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dFqv9Otm2AcoFpxO4FLAAIgdgy7lHfoTjW3UTVNLO-8=) We have no choice but to call this out.

**These are Republican fear mongering tactics, and it’s complete bullshit.**

The Dayton establishment is accusing a Black mother for not caring about safety in her community— an obvious “dog whistle.” And in today’s world, not only is that unacceptable, it is downright dangerous.

**Shenise said it best herself: “I grew up working poor in Dayton’s West Side and am now a mother proudly raising three young children here in Dayton. I absolutely want to make our neighborhoods as safe as possible for all residents, and evidence shows that the best way to do this is to improve educational opportunities and reduce poverty.”**

Luckily, respected progressives like Sen. Nina Turner, are building a coalition and using their voices to put power behind Shenise where others have tried to tear her down.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38007289/313563254/1300596418?refcode=211027_FR_sheniseattacks-RS_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY3MWM4NmY5LTc3MzctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dFqv9Otm2AcoFpxO4FLAAIgdgy7lHfoTjW3UTVNLO-8=) Supporting progressive organizing work in our cities that can excite and engage new voters is critical to flipping Ohio blue and implementing just policies, and it can only happen from the ground up. **[Will you help Barrier To Entry PAC provide essential resources and financial support to low-income, working-class Democrats? CHIP IN NOW>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38007290/313563255/-2038882143?refcode=211027_FR_sheniseattacks-RS_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY3MWM4NmY5LTc3MzctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dFqv9Otm2AcoFpxO4FLAAIgdgy7lHfoTjW3UTVNLO-8=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ********[**$10 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38007291/313563256/1300596418?refcode=211027_FR_sheniseattacks-RS_EL10&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode2=EL10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY3MWM4NmY5LTc3MzctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dFqv9Otm2AcoFpxO4FLAAIgdgy7lHfoTjW3UTVNLO-8=)********

clean_body: Build Back Better plans to pay for itself by having corporations pay their fair share of taxes. But these Dems are against it >> | | | = Our endorsed candidate, Shenise Turner-Sloss, a Democrat and front-runner for Dayton City Commission in Ohio, is under attack for speaking truth to power on police violence that has gone unchecked in her community -- by FELLOW Democrats. Although we are disgusted, we are not surprised. At Barrier To Entry PAC, we know that even when the establishment gets it wrong, the PEOPLE can get it right. Here is the mailer they had the audacity to send out: = We have no choice but to call this out. These are Republican fear mongering tactics, and it’s complete bullshit. The Dayton establishment is accusing a Black mother for not caring about safety in her community— an obvious “dog whistle.” And in today’s world, not only is that unacceptable, it is downright dangerous. Shenise said it best herself: “I grew up working poor in Dayton’s West Side and am now a mother proudly raising three young children here in Dayton. I absolutely want to make our neighborhoods as safe as possible for all residents, and evidence shows that the best way to do this is to improve educational opportunities and reduce poverty.” Luckily, respected progressives like Sen. Nina Turner, are building a coalition and using their voices to put power behind Shenise where others have tried to tear her down. = Supporting progressive organizing work in our cities that can excite and engage new voters is critical to flipping Ohio blue and implementing just policies, and it can only happen from the ground up. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ******=**** **** **** | | ******=****** | ******=****** **** **** | | ******=****** | ******=****** **** **** | | ******=****** In solidarity, Eden Founder, Barrier To Entry PAC **************** ************** ********************EXPRESS DONATE to Barrier to Entry PAC******************** ********************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:******************** ********************= ""******************** | ********************= ""******************** | ********************= ""******************** | ********************= ""******************** ---|---|---|--- BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. As Governor of Virginia, I was proud to expand the right to vote to more than 170,000 Virginians — more than any other governor in history.

My reasoning is simple: expanding voting rights is good for our democracy, and it’s good for the people in this Commonwealth.

But now, I’m running against a Trump acolyte who has made Trump’s “election integrity” conspiracies a key issue in his campaign. That’s why _The Washington Post_ called Glenn Youngkin “unfit” to be Governor, citing his disgusting efforts to align himself with Trump’s attacks on our democracy.

**He’s even welcomed support from right-wing extremists who supported the January 6 insurrection.**

This race is the most important in the country because it’s about defending our democracy and stopping Youngkin from ushering in four years of Trumpist extremism in our progressive Commonwealth. _And remember, if a ‘big lie’ Trump supporter like Youngkin can win in Virginia, he can win anywhere._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janice=20McGeachin=20for=20Idaho=20Governor?=
subject: The Legislature Reconvenes Nov. 15!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Janice for Idaho, Machele Hamilton Treasurer [unsubscribe](https://janicemcgeachin
body:
The Legislature will reconvene on November 15, but the passage of meaningful legislation is far from guaranteed. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/janicemcgeachin/campaign-update-10-27-21?e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=290f1628e6&e=823fa8e224)
---
| |
## The Legislature Reconvenes
---
| Dear Friends,
---
| Since July, I have been calling on Legislative leadership to reconvene the Legislature and prohibit vaccine mandates in Idaho. The Legislature WILL reconvene on November 15, but the passage of meaningful legislation is far from guaranteed. As I have said many times before, vaccine mandates have no place in a free society, and no Idahoan should ever face discrimination, denial of service, or loss of employment due to their personal medical decisions. As we contemplate the best way to enact such protection, it is worth considering some of the various ideas that may be proposed. When the Legislature's Interim Committee on Federalism met in late September and early October, they reviewed a number of [draft proposals](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=f5a679b03d&e=823fa8e224) related to vaccine mandates. Five proposals were heard by that committee, four of which took some action to prohibit vaccine mandates to some extent. Only one, though, ([RS29011](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=cca539d36e&e=823fa8e224) from Rep. Tammy Nichols) would consistently protect the medical privacy of Idahoans by preventing both employers and government entities from even inquiring about a person's vaccination status. The Legislature must act to protect the individual liberty of all Idahoans. I encourage you to contact your legislators today and tell them that Idaho must ban vaccine mandates of any kind. Accept nothing less from your representatives. This will be a short session, lasting probably just three days, so it is important to have a consistent turnout of committed patriots at the Capitol from November 15-17. Mark your calendars now, and plan to make your face seen and your voice heard.
---
|
---
|
## Campaign Update
---
| On Monday, Charlie Kirk was at Boise State University for his "Exposing Critical Racism Tour." I was happy to be there with the amazing parents and students who understand the danger of indoctrinating our young people with the fallacies of Critical Race Theory. Students organizing to fight back against these harmful teachings gives me hope for our youth!
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| On Tuesday, Charlie Kirk was at Capitol Church in Meridian, where I offered a prayer for our state and our nation.
---
|
---
| This Thursday, October 28, I will be in Nampa for the Canyon County Conservative Town Hall at the Nampa Public Library from 6-8 pm. This event is open to the public, so please feel free to attend.
---
|
---
|
## Stand Strong!
---
| With the Legislature coming back to town, we will once again see how many of our elected leaders are out of step with the views of their voters. Sadly, not all Republicans are conservatives, and some are even willing to embrace and tolerate tyranny rather than take a stand against it. Put simply, if you want a free Idaho, it is not enough to elect Republicans, you must elect true conservatives. I'm running for Idaho Governor as a consistent, principled conservative because I want to **_Make Idaho Free Again!_** We must restore the principles of individual liberty, state sovereignty, and traditional conservative values. I strongly believe in these foundational principles and I know that you believe in them too. Will you stand strong and help us in this effort to replace those who tolerate tyranny with true conservatives who are willing to do whatever it takes to protect our Liberty?
---
| [Stand Strong!](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=d014932d49&e=823fa8e224 "Stand Strong!")
---
| Please [**DONATE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=80faedaea6&e=823fa8e224) if you are able, [**VISIT OUR CAMPAIGN STORE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=c834ae8a73&e=823fa8e224) to see our unique merchandise, [**LIKE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=a6b9837d38&e=823fa8e224) and [**FOLLOW**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=857406d678&e=823fa8e224) us on social media, and [**VISIT OUR WEBSITE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=b96bcd0785&e=823fa8e224) to learn about some of the other ways you can get involved with the Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor Campaign.
---
| Sincerely,
Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor
---
| | | | | | [](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=a02c9a4aa1&e=823fa8e224)
---

---

But my opponent is one of the most extreme Republicans running for Congress anywhere in the country. That’s why Donald Trump endorsed him. And he raised over $1 million last quarter. Unlike him, I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you to power my campaign. Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is only 4 days away, and we still need to raise $5,713 more. If we are going to start to close the gap between his campaign and ours, we can’t fall short. = | = = = = = = The truth of the matter is that Derrick Van Orden is dangerous. He believes in lies -- including that the 2020 election was stolen -- and was on the grounds of the Capitol on January 6. But he’s a major threat -- he came within a few votes of winning last time he ran for Congress. So that’s why I need your help. I know with supporters like you by my side, I can defeat him and represent western Wisconsin with the dignity and respect it deserves. But we need to make sure we can compete with Derrick Van Orden’s resources. = Thanks for your help, Brad | | Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Pfaff for Congress PO Box 3606 La Crosse, WI 54602 United States If you would like to receive only our most important emails, If you no longer wish to receive emails please .
