Peter,

I served 23 years as a U.S. Navy SEAL - many of those as a commander at SEAL Team SIX and as deputy commander of Joint Special Forces in Iraq.

Needless to say, I know when action is needed.

What we’re watching the Democrats and their House majority do in Washington is devastating. Opening our borders, defunding our police, spying on our bank accounts, and taking away our Constitutional right to bear arms - this cannot be tolerated.

Peter, I’m reaching out to you today because ACTION IS NEEDED. [**I need YOU to join my team as I FIGHT to win this critical Montana Congressional race and help Republicans WIN BACK the House majority.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2b0c1a46fe5c408fbde35a97f65bf7d2&_e=88_S6vLRem0I-QTJkj09ck_g7XGUl_slje3R9Fn14Zvw5Hd3wT2BRTKAvAGsdtwcm78Bgakc-3RlOuMWHbai3XAyPKDlJtJq9uuzrLpokV7TwoeSCxKNWhX1eJ6m4NfPYoe0MFf-B3dGFc7u57Vsf7XepbEY66cozR1oiu8X1e3_-69N67dOTyxpzzGl1FcCY0eFBiOkkNoqWuJtP36oyhpguXc3BKtPbJ8xei-Qq8qOnea5FmJGEr_J8ACjBaUZFfYEZ1tq2CJQogEwoPRIl1GdHK-ogQii9idzUHBGJ-365W_6wJd-EJ5I-ZA5uBI1Z_-yO86Mj41L3YQRpJFN9OZ5yLEIZHWUSnVsbE63yRQgw31ctXV6qq5CTfRKZtn-3AA3X5_gg2MUdc4E5o0O0A%3D%3D)

[** JOIN MY TEAM ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2b0c1a46fe5c408fbde35a97f65bf7d2&_e=88_S6vLRem0I-QTJkj09ck_g7XGUl_slje3R9Fn14Zvw5Hd3wT2BRTKAvAGsdtwcm78Bgakc-3RlOuMWHbai3XAyPKDlJtJq9uuzrLpokV7TwoeSCxKNWhX1eJ6m4NfPYoe0MFf-B3dGFc7u57Vsf7XepbEY66cozR1oiu8X1e3_-69N67dOTyxpzzGl1FcCdnfv61w4FtGD7lwkYW_Ho1Fbj7zaKsGQKsUTeJCZq5gCchEuXm9PRJbOIFuMa0aI54lVcbDH67LNQG7sJdXsRrsYbFvG-uJ07dewjJd7IY6WO6X6xIV3fIV8KRvY7DaE8deGtcJQ4LPjtssRmOT0zwyuVYyoYZ50dxXeAjnz2dp47tvzAo0OCHoPGCNiKFMKgDtbWLpZmzQwXDM8iXq9MQ%3D%3D)

Peter, WE MUST protect our country from the socialists and their radical agenda.

If we don’t take action, our American way of life will be abandoned. The America that you and I grew up with will be abandoned. Any Navy SEAL will tell you - that’s not what we fought for.

clean_body: What we’re watching the Democrats and their House majority do in Washington is devastating. | Peter, I served 23 years as a U.S. Navy SEAL - many of those as a commander at SEAL Team SIX and as deputy commander of Joint Special Forces in Iraq. Needless to say, I know when action is needed. What we’re watching the Democrats and their House majority do in Washington is devastating. Opening our borders, defunding our police, spying on our bank accounts, and taking away our Constitutional right to bear arms - this cannot be tolerated. Peter, I’m reaching out to you today because ACTION IS NEEDED. Peter, WE MUST protect our country from the socialists and their radical agenda. If we don’t take action, our American way of life will be abandoned. The America that you and I grew up with will be abandoned. Any Navy SEAL will tell you - that’s not what we fought for. For God and Country, Secretary Ryan Zinke U.S. Navy SEAL - Retired | | PAID FOR BY ZINKE FOR CONGRESS Zinke for Congress P.O. body:
I thought more people would be worried. | | |
---
| | I thought more people would be concerned that my uncle, Donald Trump, could make a comeback in 2024 and win the Presidency again. I thought that after four years of having the most dangerous man in America in the Oval Office, people would do whatever it takes to make sure he doesn’t gain power again. **_It seems I was wrong._** Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate for Governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is currently tied with Terry McAuliffe in the race for governor, and Democrats seem not to notice just how important this race is. Turnout is low, and Terry tells me that donations have slowed to a trickle. We need more resources, so he can mobilize the voters he needs to win. **_[Will you split a donation between Terry’s campaign and Steve Sisolak's campaign right now to help Terry mobilize Virginia voters over the last couple days of this election?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRt3F-WWEfzKFepdMRtcNPEIDs91HnclHd6Q3uYfQquF6YjTOyjDMnHD3qQkHgNCCuGSPHN7ufiFxxXCGmXOtEsdqrvgSelFFJ1hOW3mvFrhBxWXhUgag71vj2BQEpJ2t-W3dbxfEUAiLPXxeNwxifrmst1TGoEkzVStZL8iEU0xxd3RAaZ6v2R4-xIMnS-WyPRiJ1kvnHSzEJ9Wlv2ZfLsRBTh8JL9stHZ_u5FcE4Fz2a2DTWMte52lnFoW3gDHK3cuabV2UULdzzXAwErHKzmFU-cVHHx6NdxBgvwTUnR4Njy8xAVHY3T4Pz3yMSMVARQIKr15tkWIQK_Youta-Dz_w/3gi/RXfExw3HR_OerMJ33XNLjg/h0/2mVHxBiODQEStyO79Oleou51alw89dsLCLYOfGTLz50)_** | | | [Chip in $25 >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRt3F-WWEfzKFepdMRtcNPEIDs91HnclHd6Q3uYfQquF6YjTOyjDMnHD3qQkHgNCCuGSPHN7ufiFxxXCGmXOtEsdqrvgSelFFJ1hOW3mvFrhBxJN_-6IIQi7B2iNOftTE9pkWanbdRg6gsHbWV06uRGkf8yqLU6ArCxF3kkeBu6vu3-nUz9JvFrZFYOMUKJapz-ft01wbJQeyYZHbgsRL5KjH5hrtqbSvyahBQYqCXe4Q9Xs2zZOwdik0glTya63F8LZf2zC6L3Fk45eAkW4v7-38mDQmWYyCOgVbJPgyXlyuZg_i2BCNC4Z9Ohq0YxLaxFpoRXDYK45RkJSqU13SH_Fw/3gi/RXfExw3HR_OerMJ33XNLjg/h1/yfMghkYl2YKZ_8LjbaBxjSDFfM9uVpiOLa9skzJRptg)

body:
Once you read a little about them, we hope you'll decide that they are worthy of your support today | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38008083/313566549/2064336442?refcode=email_fr_20211027-sbprofiles_E3_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUwNDdhMTQyLTdkMzctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jJC4ALgCSFq23ITlarelnZ37flpHP0KDgZKKhyRUh8I=)
---
Friend, Kara Crowley is elementary school teacher. Amber Clark and Eileen Washburn are high school teachers. Dan Heintz teaches history and Mario Clopton-Zymler teaches music. Beth Wernery and Kathleen Purdy are retired elementary school teachers, and Rose Gaiffe has been a special education teacher, guidance counselor, and principal. Today, each of them is 6 days away from their critical school board election. And like teachers everywhere, they are working overtime to help their community. Now it's our turn to be there for them.
### **_[They need our help today to win on Tuesday — Your donation will fuel our public education campaign for them.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38008084/313566550/2064336442?refcode=email_fr_20211027-sbprofiles_E3_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUwNDdhMTQyLTdkMzctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jJC4ALgCSFq23ITlarelnZ37flpHP0KDgZKKhyRUh8I=)_**
| **[Donate NOW ➞](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38008085/313566551/2064336442?refcode=email_fr_20211027-sbprofiles_E3_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUwNDdhMTQyLTdkMzctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jJC4ALgCSFq23ITlarelnZ37flpHP0KDgZKKhyRUh8I=)**
---
These teachers are running despite the ongoing bullying, intimidation, and threats facing school board members right now. Their commitment to service, to doing what's right for students, is unwavering in the face of bullying, being followed in the parking lot, violent and anti-semantic threats, and even threats of rape against school board members and their family members.
We can't stop the radical, conspiracy theory-filled, right-wing extremists from losing their heads over life-saving masks and vaccines, or factually accurate history.
[But we can help good-hearted, experienced educators win their elections.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38008086/313566552/2064336442?refcode=email_fr_20211027-sbprofiles_E3_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUwNDdhMTQyLTdkMzctZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jJC4ALgCSFq23ITlarelnZ37flpHP0KDgZKKhyRUh8I=) Once you read a little about them, we hope you'll decide that they are worthy of your support today:

**Kara Crowley** has been an elementary school teacher for 15 years, creating a robotics program, leading a student mentorship program and organizing community events and assistance for needy families. She's been recognized countless times for her volunteerism and was named one of the 2020 Outstanding Educators of the Year in her district.
**Amber Clark** is a special education teacher and the special education department leader in her school. She is the only woman and only member with professional education experience on her school board.
**Eileen Washburn** had a challenging childhood, but the teachers who spent the time getting to know her and make her feel welcomed changed her life and inspired a 17 year (and counting!) career as a High School Teacher.
**Dan Heintz** has taught American History since 2004, and when he's not teaching, he's testifying before the Ohio Legislature against an unending list of ways they've tried to defund local schools.
**Mario Clopton-Zymler** 's whole life has been about service to others. Before starting his teaching career, he was a field organizer for Barack Obama. As a vocal music teacher for 11 years, Mario teaches students how to find and use their voices.
**Beth Wernery,** inspired by her mother, taught elementary school for 31 years. When she retired and won a seat on the school board, she was the first educator on the board in years.
**Kathleen Purdy** was a member of the Future Teachers of America Club, and 31 years later, after a career as an elementary school teacher and multiple awards, she's still a life-long learner, taking classes at a local university.
**Rose Gaiffe** has served students for over 40 years, as a teacher, counselor, principal, and Director of Disability Services. She was recognized in 2008 as the Sylvania Schools Teacher of the Year.

| Elect Educators Everywhere is designed to help elect teachers, school counselors, college faculty, and all types of public educators to office from coast to coast. With your help, we can ensure that educators have a seat at the table when it comes to making policy decisions in this country.
---

clean_body: Once you read a little about them, we hope you'll decide that they are worthy of your support today | = Friend, Kara Crowley is elementary school teacher. Amber Clark and Eileen Washburn are high school teachers. Dan Heintz teaches history and Mario Clopton-Zymler teaches music. Beth Wernery and Kathleen Purdy are retired elementary school teachers, and Rose Gaiffe has been a special education teacher, guidance counselor, and principal. Today, each of them is 6 days away from their critical school board election. And like teachers everywhere, they are working overtime to help their community. Now it's our turn to be there for them. = | = These teachers are running despite the ongoing bullying, intimidation, and threats facing school board members right now. Their commitment to service, to doing what's right for students, is unwavering in the face of bullying, being followed in the parking lot, violent and anti-semantic threats, and even threats of rape against school board members and their family members. We can't stop the radical, conspiracy theory-filled, right-wing extremists from losing their heads over life-saving masks and vaccines, or factually accurate history. = Once you read a little about them, we hope you'll decide that they are worthy of your support today: Kara Crowley has been an elementary school teacher for 15 years, creating a robotics program, leading a student mentorship program and organizing community events and assistance for needy families. She's been recognized countless times for her volunteerism and was named one of the 2020 Outstanding Educators of the Year in her district. Amber Clark is a special education teacher and the special education department leader in her school. She is the only woman and only member with professional education experience on her school board. Eileen Washburn had a challenging childhood, but the teachers who spent the time getting to know her and make her feel welcomed changed her life and inspired a 17 year (and counting!) career as a High School Teacher. Dan Heintz has taught American History since 2004, and when he's not teaching, he's testifying before the Ohio Legislature against an unending list of ways they've tried to defund local schools. Mario Clopton-Zymler 's whole life has been about service to others. Before starting his teaching career, he was a field organizer for Barack Obama. As a vocal music teacher for 11 years, Mario teaches students how to find and use their voices. Beth Wernery, inspired by her mother, taught elementary school for 31 years. When she retired and won a seat on the school board, she was the first educator on the board in years. Kathleen Purdy was a member of the Future Teachers of America Club, and 31 years later, after a career as an elementary school teacher and multiple awards, she's still a life-long learner, taking classes at a local university. Rose Gaiffe has served students for over 40 years, as a teacher, counselor, principal, and Director of Disability Services. She was recognized in 2008 as the Sylvania Schools Teacher of the Year. | Elect Educators Everywhere is designed to help elect teachers, school counselors, college faculty, and all types of public educators to office from coast to coast. With your help, we can ensure that educators have a seat at the table when it comes to making policy decisions in this country. | = | Paid for by Elect Educators Everywhere PAC Contributions or gifts to Elect Educators Everywhere are not tax deductible. name: Jim Jordan
subject: Please take our Trump Poll TODAY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
We need 2,578 more conservatives to take our trump poll BEFORE MIDNIGHT. We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. Will you take a moment to cast yours now?

|
---

Peter,

Recently my team and I sent you an email asking for you to help us better understand the direction which the Republican Party is headed. More pointedly, **[we asked you to weigh in on whether or not you consider President Trump the leader of the Republican Party.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7ce2615e92a044e68f2d06bd9db0bd54&_e=YWePLuCsw2wxFQhiBWa7oLd9B49LQdkPLa9EU7w9RyS7M81Udp5kGiZP7xEYV22lA8aWk_LmmPobWMLPQQlKEqduAdc3q0jjd5G4ITMw2tDvhkSUBSuex0eahg74yUdngqI0Tkb6S3Zv1wYNQ18AbIsTr4XScWMKQSVRfFbBWHHk1F1Fmtltkb3Fr51tN1EgtcvEngcQ_14_eZ07BYghyKPsBCl8EtlBgNGUl_wuZAB4Ma9D1ZB8Xf82TE1JFPXw_G-BWkd8LhBpTTeftIjApqYlPUGnT7GSfWDV8aKv1Xw4h67a4vBwEk3KcbdXbSBktcyGILugK-E5NtCffdQTldq3Qh2nt8HQZBGVY7RxP01yur2atJuAIGgZQd5HnsQfkq4PBJ1bXo7RqcjmPDvS2PrSwP2t9b024lDhYX-z33UxHC2Mwi4HViEV9HPxxgBHiduuWz6XgSx7Y0UuMQWhMExN_TXXei1Otjn-umOdeMuNfPAwS6cEyfrF98QdvaAMrvz3CKUZNgqrOdcnclHMpw%3D%3D)**

My team just delivered a preliminary report to me and we’re not seeing the results we were hoping for. **We set a goal of finding 50,000 conservatives to vote in our poll - the more votes the more accurate the findings - and we’re coming up 2,578 votes short. **

Peter, your name is not on my list as having voted. **[Would you do me a personal favor and cast your vote in my poll before midnight tonight?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7ce2615e92a044e68f2d06bd9db0bd54&_e=YWePLuCsw2wxFQhiBWa7oLd9B49LQdkPLa9EU7w9RyS7M81Udp5kGiZP7xEYV22lA8aWk_LmmPobWMLPQQlKEqduAdc3q0jjd5G4ITMw2tDvhkSUBSuex0eahg74yUdngqI0Tkb6S3Zv1wYNQ18AbIsTr4XScWMKQSVRfFbBWHHk1F1Fmtltkb3Fr51tN1EgtcvEngcQ_14_eZ07BYghyKPsBCl8EtlBgNGUl_wuZAB4Ma9D1ZB8Xf82TE1JFPXw_G-BWkd8LhBpTTeftIjApqYlPUGnT7GSfWDV8aKv1Xw4h67a4vBwEk3KcbdXbSBksq9f-V9j5gO4nngNN2D55ciX5i-Ma77L7cOi5gW-H9WCGkdEYHeL-d3S5LCHnJ_ASQs13ASQA4wP_MTizxBGK7AuqQur5H7bHUJMBJGCMY2JHKgEx2EmYN4nGN5mZtLGczlJZB3G2OPIb663GXrMbM0Lw95ZE2FpBoJHlETwYzUlvOl0t3e5BlAf1AmUSTaZ2O7bUXfiuQLBKdaSI6pbuw%3D%3D)**

[ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7ce2615e92a044e68f2d06bd9db0bd54&_e=YWePLuCsw2wxFQhiBWa7oLd9B49LQdkPLa9EU7w9RyS7M81Udp5kGiZP7xEYV22lA8aWk_LmmPobWMLPQQlKEqduAdc3q0jjd5G4ITMw2tDvhkSUBSuex0eahg74yUdngqI0Tkb6S3Zv1wYNQ18AbIsTr4XScWMKQSVRfFbBWHHk1F1Fmtltkb3Fr51tN1EgtcvEngcQ_14_eZ07BYghyKPsBCl8EtlBgNGUl_wuZAB4Ma9D1ZB8Xf82TE1JFPXw_G-BWkd8LhBpTTeftIjApqYlPUGnT7GSfWDV8aKv1Xw4h67a4vBwEk3KcbdXbSBk2dzD9BK0M6U3dHaPyUohstruCN1XvpkbbUUx5wR8lhS7lDqShtiw3yvXLj48iDRZDbJnDpVmpXJF5Af8GebSYZegZcnbodyn_1iHAeSvVhvaT5cc_hL5OeC1Jw71CD_pswBeW9_3wgBlbvAEkvPgt71cOBijZz4ncMgEwRbzRQ2VjjVOtsaJJvOVqu6o_w-rSK-MLbMRjtF1mbx-2l_rig%3D%3D)
You see, the earlier we can determine the direction in which Republican voters want the party to go – and the leaders who voters want to be at the helm -- _**the sooner we can fine-tune our plans to help take back the House majority in next year’s midterm elections**_.

We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. **[Will you take a moment to cast yours now?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7ce2615e92a044e68f2d06bd9db0bd54&_e=YWePLuCsw2wxFQhiBWa7oLd9B49LQdkPLa9EU7w9RyS7M81Udp5kGiZP7xEYV22lA8aWk_LmmPobWMLPQQlKEqduAdc3q0jjd5G4ITMw2tDvhkSUBSuex0eahg74yUdngqI0Tkb6S3Zv1wYNQ18AbIsTr4XScWMKQSVRfFbBWHHk1F1Fmtltkb3Fr51tN1EgtcvEngcQ_14_eZ07BYghyKPsBCl8EtlBgNGUl_wuZAB4Ma9D1ZB8Xf82TE1JFPXw_G-BWkd8LhBpTTeftIjApqYlPUGnT7GSfWDV8aKv1Xw4h67a4vBwEk3KcbdXbSBksN793YLA4intSKB0dANWzksmFE2jegDrFaTZ4KWkI1u37PRxay2CNJz8R7wBE5t_4DiD6_PC8CupcxS8EoywiiPtZWe7dV7ETzRWb5mq5LjRgcbHg1oA_sruzmMmHaSI0IOgSoOGhhFpxMFrzIshC6ka32twSfZeDbQiBGHRQUiOUrnoy5yerQmcDpEwxflwUXmsP2TvaQltBJ1IovDCMA%3D%3D)**

We need to know whether or not you’re going to stand with our Party leadership - **including President Trump** - as we work to take back the house from socialist-sympathizing Democrats next year.

| [**Take My Trump Poll Today ➔**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7ce2615e92a044e68f2d06bd9db0bd54&_e=YWePLuCsw2wxFQhiBWa7oLd9B49LQdkPLa9EU7w9RyS7M81Udp5kGiZP7xEYV22lA8aWk_LmmPobWMLPQQlKEqduAdc3q0jjd5G4ITMw2tDvhkSUBSuex0eahg74yUdngqI0Tkb6S3Zv1wYNQ18AbIsTr4XScWMKQSVRfFbBWHHk1F1Fmtltkb3Fr51tN1EgtcvEngcQ_14_eZ07BYghyKPsBCl8EtlBgNGUl_wuZAB4Ma9D1ZB8Xf82TE1JFPXw_G-BWkd8LhBpTTeftIjApqYlPUGnT7GSfWDV8aKv1Xw4h67a4vBwEk3KcbdXbSBkYo483o6Dckc_6ruKxhfnxkirJ5VLFgRJz1ePq4K6lBZAyVeUZolUYjVH1ZV688bu5-L192ivyCFU1wSGfjHRDHiug85JsZs0gxrV7Yy1BdazrvxcwTI_XNc1TDjyVcO_ZgyGIt4dD-Qvh4-51qzOGUn_yg0GqGbLUETY56p6adMCoMA1ojrHkc-ufmIcnNn2o1wqrEEb31KFP-hdjr82Lw%3D%3D)

name: Nina Turner
subject: Will you support Erica Smith for U.S. Senate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Erica is a bold, progressive, moral leader who brings the heart and vision necessary to uplift the working people of North Carolina.
#
Today, I am PROUD to announce my official endorsement of Erica Smith running for U.S. Senate in North Carolina.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/23978?refcode=em20211027-586&%3Bamp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=586%2E3698%2E-Gu0Cn)
**Erica is a bold, progressive, moral leader who brings the heart and vision necessary to uplift the working people of North Carolina.** Erica is up against big money, and she can’t win alone. But with the grassroots support of the people behind her, she’ll be unstoppable.
[**We need Erica Smith in the U.S. Senate. Will you make a $5 contribution to Erica’s campaign today?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/23978?refcode=em20211027-586&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=586%2E3698%2E-Gu0Cn)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/23978?refcode=em20211027-586&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=586%2E3698%2E-Gu0Cn)**
Erica doesn't come from wealth — she comes from hard work. She grew up picking corn and cucumbers on her family’s farm in rural North Carolina, and she’s lived the struggles so many politicians just talk about.
As a minister, teacher, and three-term state senator, Erica dedicated her career to fighting for working people.
Now, Erica is running on a bold, progressive agenda to lift up communities in North Carolina and across the country who have been left unseen and unheard for far too long.
And with our help, Erica will help pave the way for transformative policies like Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, a $15 minimum wage, criminal justice reform, and so much more.
**I’m proud to endorse Erica. But if we’re going to expand our progressive power in the U.S. Senate, we have to outwork the establishment and the corporate status quo aiming to defeat her.**
[**Erica Smith’s primary election is just a few months away, and a $5 contribution from you will go a long way towards ensuring she has the resources to win the Democratic nomination for U.S. Senate in North Carolina. Can she count on your $5 contribution today?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/23978?refcode=em20211027-586&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=586%2E3698%2E-Gu0Cn)
Thank you in advance for supporting Erica’s campaign.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211027-586-footer&t=23&refcode2=586_3698_-Gu0Cn&akid=586%2E3698%2E-Gu0Cn)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=586%2E3698%2E-Gu0Cn)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=586%2E3698%2E-Gu0Cn)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: Virginians are facing a choice

Derek,

Democratic leadership has changed Virginia – for the better. Expanding health care, passing gun violence prevention policies, making it easier to vote and protecting a woman's right to choose – these are just some examples of what Democrats have achieved in the Commonwealth in recent years.

**Now, Virginians face a choice.** Will they stay on this path to progress and keep passing legislation that improves people's lives? Or will they go backward?

I'll tell you what I think: I think Virginia will choose to keep working for progress by electing Terry McAuliffe this November. But this isn't a sure thing – polling shows the governor's race is close – so I'm asking for your help.

name: Max Steiner
subject: Re: Dixie fire.
body:
While we may have won this battle, our fight continues. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38008220/313567158/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWE2YzkyYy03ZTM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SrQjPBGP5WqKrgtnfi1NRtLgTv8mYrBEj1LPzybfyEY=)
Finally, friend.

After the heavy rains from the storm earlier this week, the Dixie Fire is fully contained. All in all, it burned 963,309 acres -- more than 1,505 square miles. It was the second largest wildfire in California's history.

Containing the fire was a monumental task, and I want to make sure to start by recognizing all the firefighters and other first responders who were involved, not to mention families who lost their homes.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38008221/313567159/-209993060?refcode=em-102721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWE2YzkyYy03ZTM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SrQjPBGP5WqKrgtnfi1NRtLgTv8mYrBEj1LPzybfyEY=)
Photo credit: Cal Fire
**While we may have won this battle, our fight continues.**

We must admit the impact our climate crisis is having on our environment, especially in creating extreme weather, and work quickly to solve it. We need to elect leaders who 1) take this threat seriously and 2) will get to work solving these problems.

It's clear that my opponent Doug LaMalfa has proven unwilling. In fact, he'd rather spend his time questioning the 2020 election or whether we have evidence of the Moon landing.

**With my experience on issues like water management and wildfires, I'm ready to put in the work for CA-01, but I'll need your support to get to Washington so I can make a difference. That's why I'm asking:**

**[Will you chip in $3 to elect someone who takes climate change seriously and will work to solve it? We need to raise $6,199 today in order to stay on track to meet our end-of-month goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38008222/313567160/-209993060?refcode=em-102721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWE2YzkyYy03ZTM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SrQjPBGP5WqKrgtnfi1NRtLgTv8mYrBEj1LPzybfyEY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38008223/313567161/-209993060?refcode=em-102721-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWE2YzkyYy03ZTM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SrQjPBGP5WqKrgtnfi1NRtLgTv8mYrBEj1LPzybfyEY=)

It's worth taking a moment to pause and think about what the planet might look like if we _don't_ solve this problem. I'm sorry to put those dark thoughts in your head, but our children, and grandchildren are depending on us.

The stakes are so high, and we can't wait any longer.

clean_body: While we may have won this battle, our fight continues. | = Finally, friend. After the heavy rains from the storm earlier this week, the Dixie Fire is fully contained. All in all, it burned 963,309 acres -- more than 1,505 square miles. It was the second largest wildfire in California's history. Containing the fire was a monumental task, and I want to make sure to start by recognizing all the firefighters and other first responders who were involved, not to mention families who lost their homes. = Photo credit: Cal Fire While we may have won this battle, our fight continues. We must admit the impact our climate crisis is having on our environment, especially in creating extreme weather, and work quickly to solve it. We need to elect leaders who 1) take this threat seriously and 2) will get to work solving these problems. It's clear that my opponent Doug LaMalfa has proven unwilling. In fact, he'd rather spend his time questioning the 2020 election or whether we have evidence of the Moon landing. With my experience on issues like water management and wildfires, I'm ready to put in the work for CA-01, but I'll need your support to get to Washington so I can make a difference. That's why I'm asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = It's worth taking a moment to pause and think about what the planet might look like if we don't solve this problem. I'm sorry to put those dark thoughts in your head, but our children, and grandchildren are depending on us. | | I’ll be blunt, Derek. Recent polling out of Monmouth University and Emerson College (two top-rated _FiveThirtyEight_ pollsters) is showing a dead heat in this race, and _**I’m stunned that more members of our grassroots team aren’t stepping up and donating right now.**_

At this point, we have just 6 DAYS until Election Day. **_[Can you make a matched contribution before midnight and help me stop Donald Trump and Glenn Youngkin from winning in Virginia? We need to hit our million dollar fundraising goal tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38008266/313567262/-2023814932?refcode=20211027.10_TM_10II&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTc0MTdkOC03ZDM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mSXsGvPU8aUUNp1laRV3-22qXJW3qAV7dudd5vPjq9c=)_**

My opponent Glenn Youngkin said he is running to be Virginia’s governor because of Donald Trump. Despite everything Donald Trump has done to our Democracy, his support for the Jan. 6 insurrection, and Trump's "big lie," **Youngkin endorsed another FOUR YEARS of Trump as president.**

And, with _Roe v. Wade_ hanging on by a thread, Glenn Youngkin could bring a Texas-style abortion ban to Virginia.

Look, early voting is almost over, and right now, Donald Trump’s handpicked guy has a real shot to win.

Don’t let it happen.

clean_body: | | | = | | I’ll be blunt, Derek. Recent polling out of Monmouth University and Emerson College (two top-rated FiveThirtyEight pollsters) is showing a dead heat in this race, and I’m stunned that more members of our grassroots team aren’t stepping up and donating right now. At this point, we have just 6 DAYS until Election Day. = I mean, think about it: My opponent Glenn Youngkin said he is running to be Virginia’s governor because of Donald Trump. Despite everything Donald Trump has done to our Democracy, his support for the Jan. 6 insurrection, and Trump's "big lie," Youngkin endorsed another FOUR YEARS of Trump as president. And, with Roe v. Wade hanging on by a thread, Glenn Youngkin could bring a Texas-style abortion ban to Virginia. Look, early voting is almost over, and right now, Donald Trump’s handpicked guy has a real shot to win. Don’t let it happen. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Terry =** Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. name: Marisa Wood (personal)
subject: A more competitive district.
body:
Every moment McCarthy spends fighting off our campaign in his backyard is one less minute he has to help the Republicans retake the House. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38008302/313567430/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTA4MzFkOC03ZTM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RXR1ZrTqoL0m42M9fzBZjzO9Ajx1LPeC0h62441nFuI=)
I'll be blunt, friend.

**[I need you to make a $3 donation toward our end-of-month fundraising goal to defeat career politician and GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. Only five seats stand between him and the House majority. If you want to 1) give him the toughest fight of his career, and 2) stop him from taking the Speaker's gavel, please chip in today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38008303/313567431/-787496292?refcode=em-102721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTA4MzFkOC03ZTM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RXR1ZrTqoL0m42M9fzBZjzO9Ajx1LPeC0h62441nFuI=)**
| **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38008304/313567432/-787496292?refcode=em-102721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTA4MzFkOC03ZTM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RXR1ZrTqoL0m42M9fzBZjzO9Ajx1LPeC0h62441nFuI=)**
---

**This Sunday marks our end-of-month fundraising deadline.** In many ways, it's our most important one yet. It's the first since we found out that California's 23rd Congressional District grew by over 10% in the latest Census count. We'll almost certainly see a shift in the district boundaries, bringing new voters into the fold.

**This is a huge opportunity.** We might be looking at a more competitive district, and it's the first time California will mail every registered voter a ballot. We have a chance to reach new, undecided, and irregular voters before Kevin McCarthy does.

**We have a big advantage.** McCarthy's completely out of touch with the needs of our community. Instead of supporting working families in our district, he's protecting Trump and the furthest right-wing members of his caucus.

With final district lines nearly in place, this might be _our best opportunity in years_ to give him the toughest fight of his career. Plus, every moment he spends fighting off our campaign in his backyard is one less minute he has to help the Republicans retake the House. That alone is worth asking:

**[Will you chip in $3 today to help us lay the groundwork for our voter contact effort? It's simple: The more we raise, the more voters we reach. We're coming up $7,991 short of our daily goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38008305/313567433/-787496292?refcode=em-102721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTA4MzFkOC03ZTM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RXR1ZrTqoL0m42M9fzBZjzO9Ajx1LPeC0h62441nFuI=)**

Thank you,

Marisa Wood
Teacher and Democrat for Congress

Fellow Conservative,

My parents taught me that I should always be ready to fight for my values.

It’s a lesson I took with me as an Infantry Officer leading Soldiers to the mountains of Afghanistan, rooting out terrorists as part of Operation Enduring Freedom.

But now we’re facing a different fight. The radical Left in Congress is threatening to steamroll our American values and undermine the very freedoms that made America great! _**As a Veteran, a devoted family man and as a small businessowner, it’s a fight I won’t ignore.**_

The good news is that we have a chance to stop them in Nevada by flipping one of the most vulnerable Democrat Senate seats in the Country.

Fellow Conservative, every Soldier knows they’re only as strong as the squad supporting them. [**That’s why I need to know I have your endorsement for my campaign to turn Nevada red and take back the Republican Senate Majority.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e3adc0bea6ef40fc81f8f06f944ee406&_e=fmTdpPhiyMPXLZ94zgrauHlYIZN_Atmk-CYOWsz1TVEQAa_i35HvxIIZcL7mjE5ggGCC-gZNbjctCpUuSeQikXAu9EJi0wq8tThOM-PS3ZQkvs4khbo8FUT7TtBsGtUYadeW-wp-fL2tyvhBr_0Cjpw9dXI5xDwjcIRPyj95FaR26CNXvjM1yM5Ezkme8g4gEB1ryKPnyjP91LqD7_0-HKBkOs2s7Xsn1GZnc0SbRymx-09Rx-ANpbZeToAiKXMXodI8iuhYTfiT5C3YPdWmFfHyoK8957S3zrg0m_JknjlBfiinBebmQ_Qu-6MZewugM_9xCBb9aIaEorz-viCcwJUYtMIgajgGemfGx_8zIv89uDz59tLTc3sKhlA1h_6oYh09KvA_6a2Sp2ZxA96OIBNIl5-urGQR-YZezXqJh8030AM6bG_S-b3HbKf2_VO6EL4JDaj7PE_hlHpb8k2pZO5Uq0tHFv5XH6dnnyEAaau8WvYF4l5n4zPPyw-3WacIPN3-zt1I4ygdX2oHZCJKY8w1wwusM9Q1cTYI_bx-GRvX_oTLPY4E9N49IdnhgU2lyai_EN_fhfWmoPO_LzYCeetk2cS4Tbk105uc7A5IIV8%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: I've Seen the Border. Biden & Soto Haven't!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Elect me. Close the border! |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=380d7827e7&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

This week, I did a thing- a thing Joe Biden hasn't.

I went to our Southern Border to see the humanitarian catastrophe first hand. And I have some stories to tell you.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to take back Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=afe26f99b8&e=afa21b7626), in the Orlando area. It's currently held by Darren Soto- an open-borders Dem who is a Biden sycophant!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=6c194bc2ed&e=afa21b7626)
---
| I visited Del Rio, TX, where the migrants were under the bridge a couple weeks ago- over 20,000 of them.

Well, I have visited the Southern border exactly “1” more time THAN “President of the United States” Joe Biden, or his sycophant incumbent Congressman Darren Soto has! What a disgrace!

It’s over 1300 miles from Orlando to Del Rio. The President travels in the lap of luxury on Air Force One. I traveled in my Ford Escape Hybrid with my wife as my copilot!👍🏻

ON MY OWN DIME!

_**Unfortunately, because Joe Biden, with the enthusiastic agreement of congressman Darren Soto, has dismantled President Trump’s border plan, many of the 20,000 are now walking the streets across America- untested and unvaccinated.**_

NBC News also reports that, because the incompetent Biden regime rolled out the welcome mat for these unvaccinated, untested illegals, that even MORE are now on their way!

_U.S. officials are tracking large groups of Haitians in Latin America, including more than 20,000 in Colombia, who like the thousands now massed on the Texas border may soon try to reach the U.S., according to an internal document obtained by NBC News.

In addition to the 20,000 Haitians gathered in northern Colombia, DHS is also monitoring groups of about 1,500 in Panama and 3,000 in Peru, the document said. A senior DHS official said it remains to be seen when and whether those migrants will come to the U.S., but they have begun “staging” in the various countries, potentially signaling they are planning to travel in large numbers._

_Biden has screwed this up SO bad. Almost a million illegals, unvaccinated and untested, have been let in by this psycho this year._

**The only explanation I can come up with, is that he hates America. No one who loves America would try to destroy it like this. **
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=5c4aa924f0&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=6f4989f0c1&e=afa21b7626)
---
| _Biden is a mess. He's being forced now to reinstitute Trump's successful border policies!_

_“When the Supreme Court effectively revived a cornerstone of Trump-era migration policy late last month, it looked like a major defeat for President Biden,” The New York Times reported, referencing the Trump administration’s Remain in Mexico policy. “But among some Biden officials, the Supreme Court’s order was quietly greeted with something other than dismay, current and former officials said: It brought some measure of relief.”

The report noted that Biden’s steps to loosen “the reins on migration” was “quickly followed by a surge of people heading north, overwhelming the southwest border of the United States.” Every month, the number of illegal aliens apprehended at the border under Biden has increased to a higher number than the month before.

“In fact, some Biden officials were already talking about reviving Mr. Trump’s policy in a limited way to deter migration, said the officials, who have worked on immigration policy but were not authorized to speak publicly about the administration’s internal debates on the issue,” the report added. “Then the Supreme Court order came, providing the Biden administration with the political cover to adopt the policy in some form without provoking as much ire from Democrats who reviled Mr. Trump’s border policies.”_

**Biden may be forced to revert to Trump's policies, but he's doing an AWFUL job.

I have a better idea. Why don't we impeach Biden, and bring back President Trump?**

[I will force Biden to close our border. Will you join me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=3ad5bda6e6&e=afa21b7626)

[I will get this truth out to the voters, with YOUR help!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=4e4e979501&e=afa21b7626)

_I will stand up for America against Biden and his Yes Men in Congress- like Darren Soto. They are anti-American and they gotta go!_

Help me bring America First policies to Congress! [Help me get elected and put a check on Biden!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=04ca0dd43e&e=afa21b7626)

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=bedc1cb3ef&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=9bc5b9325d&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1d8fa03e00&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. [Will you contribute before the end of this month to help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=326b003b11&e=afa21b7626)
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542
[Add us to your address book](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=214f71e4c3) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=214f71e4c3).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Cyber Ninjas Tell All about Maricopa Cover Up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Find out inside |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d58121e343&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
_My name is Mark Finchem. I am the proud Patriot leading the vanguard of Election Integrity in the critical state of Arizona._

As you know, I pushed long and hard to get Maricopa County audited, and I used my Six Sigma process engineering background to make sure that it was as thorough and unimpeachable as possible. Then, after damning results were found which showed that there was fraud beyond a shadow of a doubt, Maricopa County had the Audacity to claim there was no fraud.

**This is yet another lie in a long list of manipulations. But Cyber Ninjas, the third party firm which was hired to provide an impartial audit process has now spoken out:**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3e65545c4c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Maricopa County looked at the damning evidence and hid it from the public, intentionally lying and misleading Arizonans and Americans about the results of the Audit.

Their reply begins with the following:

_Maricopa County continues to purposely mislead Arizonans and the American public about the nature of audit findings, and the impact they had on the 2020 General Election. Their response renames and redefines audit findings so the claim can be made that the findings are false, includes logical sounding arguments that simply don’t add up, and is completely devoid of any supporting evidence. The following response to their review continues to refute their baseless claims with evidence and citations._

**One of the common lies parroted by Maricopa County and the Fake News Media was that it is “totally reasonable” that there would be over ten thousand votes with no corresponding address.**

_They explain that it is legal to change your address and then to vote._

**_But as Cyber Ninjas point out, this is extremely misleading and hides the real problem._**

_Furthermore, the County’s claim that voters can legally change their addresses after the voter registration period and still legally vote is an extremely misleading statement. Our report was primarily1 based on the November 7th VM34 voter roll file, and therefore any address changes should have been reflected in that version of the file. In addition, this is only possibly applicable for individuals who move within Maricopa County (15,035) and would not apply to individuals who moved outside of the County (12,772) and would therefore be required to re-register to vote. It would also be expected_
_that the County would be able to state exactly how many of the 15,035 changed their address, rather than making a blanket statement and implying that it fully explains the finding. The fact the County chose not to do this raises more questions._

**To be more pointed, there is no reason that changes of addresses should not be reflected by the county, and the fact that their answer was misleading to the point of being actually incorrect only goes to show the veracity of the underlying accusation.**

As a second example, regarding the illegal removal of election records by Maricopa officials, what you will hear the media tell you is this:

It is totally normal and procedural to eliminate election data.

Regarding this point, Cyber Ninjas responds:

_The Results Tallying and Reporting (RTR) logs clearly show that all database data as well as files in the NAS directory were purged and deleted on February 1st. The action was started at 5:14:47 pm and finished at 5:20:00 pm. If any backups or archives were conducted on February 2nd, the data was already deleted. If it was normal to purge data as can be seen in the finding in the audit report, it would be expected that this would be true for every other election on the EMS Server. However, as can be seen in the screenshots below the data is still present for other past elections._

_Since the drive had more than 2 terabytes of free space available there was no technical reason to delete the data before the two audits hired by Maricopa County. In fact, it begs to question what the auditors had to audit if there were no election results when ProV &V arrived on Feb 2nd._

_Furthermore, the standard way to “archive” Dominion software is to run a backup from Election Event Designer. This method of backup is found with every past election, and it’s the only way to create a zip archive with all of the database details and all of the items within the NAS directory. This operation does NOT delete any data. The last time a package file was created was on November 13th as can be seen in the screenshot of the RTR logs. This is inconsistent with the County’s statement an archive was created on Feb 2 nd._

**In other words, Maricopa County cannot claim that they routinely delete election data when this is the only election in which data was deleted! Do they think we are blind?**

_This is the problem with the Fake News. They believe that if they keep bombarding us with false information all day every day, they will drown out the truth._

**_[And that is why this movement is so absolutely critical. We need to make sure that those responsible for the fraud perpetrated in Maricopa are arrested. We must fight against the disinformation.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=01f9852fab&e=44b8c466b0)_**

**_We must push on to Pima!_**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7a167a0928&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Our campaign right now is at a critical point. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2296caab7f&e=44b8c466b0) We are gathering tremendous momentum as the Trump-endorsed candidate for Secretary of State of Arizona. I have been so busy with pushing for an Audit of Pima and a nationwide audit while exploring technological solutions to protect our elections that I’m not sure the last time I got a full night’s sleep.

**But when the media lies and covers up for the corrupt Maricopa County election officials, then who can I expect to fight for Election Integrity if not myself?**

I need your help to get me across the finish line. Every time we turn up the heat on Election Integrity, the Fake News Media gets louder and more malicious. _[But with a generous donation today, our campaign will have the firepower to push forward to Pima and beyond and leave the Fake News Media in the dust.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3c28b5b8d3&e=44b8c466b0)_

clean_body: Find out inside | | | | | Dear , My name is Mark Finchem. I am the proud Patriot leading the vanguard of Election Integrity in the critical state of Arizona. As you know, I pushed long and hard to get Maricopa County audited, and I used my Six Sigma process engineering background to make sure that it was as thorough and unimpeachable as possible. Then, after damning results were found which showed that there was fraud beyond a shadow of a doubt, Maricopa County had the Audacity to claim there was no fraud. This is yet another lie in a long list of manipulations. But Cyber Ninjas, the third party firm which was hired to provide an impartial audit process has now spoken out: | | Maricopa County looked at the damning evidence and hid it from the public, intentionally lying and misleading Arizonans and Americans about the results of the Audit. Their reply begins with the following: Maricopa County continues to purposely mislead Arizonans and the American public about the nature of audit findings, and the impact they had on the 2020 General Election. Their response renames and redefines audit findings so the claim can be made that the findings are false, includes logical sounding arguments that simply don’t add up, and is completely devoid of any supporting evidence. The following response to their review continues to refute their baseless claims with evidence and citations. One of the common lies parroted by Maricopa County and the Fake News Media was that it is “totally reasonable” that there would be over ten thousand votes with no corresponding address. They explain that it is legal to change your address and then to vote. But as Cyber Ninjas point out, this is extremely misleading and hides the real problem. Furthermore, the County’s claim that voters can legally change their addresses after the voter registration period and still legally vote is an extremely misleading statement. Our report was primarily1 based on the November 7th VM34 voter roll file, and therefore any address changes should have been reflected in that version of the file. In addition, this is only possibly applicable for individuals who move within Maricopa County (15,035) and would not apply to individuals who moved outside of the County (12,772) and would therefore be required to re-register to vote. It would also be expected that the County would be able to state exactly how many of the 15,035 changed their address, rather than making a blanket statement and implying that it fully explains the finding. The fact the County chose not to do this raises more questions. To be more pointed, there is no reason that changes of addresses should not be reflected by the county, and the fact that their answer was misleading to the point of being actually incorrect only goes to show the veracity of the underlying accusation. As a second example, regarding the illegal removal of election records by Maricopa officials, what you will hear the media tell you is this: It is totally normal and procedural to eliminate election data. Regarding this point, Cyber Ninjas responds: The Results Tallying and Reporting (RTR) logs clearly show that all database data as well as files in the NAS directory were purged and deleted on February 1st. The action was started at 5:14:47 pm and finished at 5:20:00 pm. If any backups or archives were conducted on February 2nd, the data was already deleted. If it was normal to purge data as can be seen in the finding in the audit report, it would be expected that this would be true for every other election on the EMS Server. However, as can be seen in the screenshots below the data is still present for other past elections. Since the drive had more than 2 terabytes of free space available there was no technical reason to delete the data before the two audits hired by Maricopa County. In fact, it begs to question what the auditors had to audit if there were no election results when ProV &V arrived on Feb 2nd. Furthermore, the standard way to “archive” Dominion software is to run a backup from Election Event Designer. This method of backup is found with every past election, and it’s the only way to create a zip archive with all of the database details and all of the items within the NAS directory. This operation does NOT delete any data. The last time a package file was created was on November 13th as can be seen in the screenshot of the RTR logs. This is inconsistent with the County’s statement an archive was created on Feb 2 nd. In other words, Maricopa County cannot claim that they routinely delete election data when this is the only election in which data was deleted! Do they think we are blind? This is the problem with the Fake News. They believe that if they keep bombarding us with false information all day every day, they will drown out the truth. We must push on to Pima! | | We are gathering tremendous momentum as the Trump-endorsed candidate for Secretary of State of Arizona. I have been so busy with pushing for an Audit of Pima and a nationwide audit while exploring technological solutions to protect our elections that I’m not sure the last time I got a full night’s sleep. But when the media lies and covers up for the corrupt Maricopa County election officials, then who can I expect to fight for Election Integrity if not myself? I need your help to get me across the finish line. Every time we turn up the heat on Election Integrity, the Fake News Media gets louder and more malicious. | God Bless You, | | Mark Finchem Arizona House of Representatives – District 11 Republican for Arizona Secretary of State Conservative Election Integrity Patriot P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, . PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE | | | Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved. Friend,

AG Mark Herring has failed Virginia’s kids. And as disturbing news of covered up sexual assaults surface from Loudoun County, Herring has remained totally silent, **even as Virginians demand an investigation.**

_It’s unacceptable to me, but it isn’t surprising. This is the hard truth: Mark Herring’s “progressive” policies enabled these vicious crimes in our schools. _

_**But when I’m elected Attorney General, I’ll do the job Herring refuses to do... I’ll launch a FULL investigation into those linked to the Loudoun County cover-ups.**_

And I will hold them accountable. Because that’s what Virginia’s kids and families deserve.

But over the past few months, we’ve heard Herring’s friend Terry McAuliffe repeatedly state that he doesn’t want parents to have a say in schools.

name: Lauren Lalonde, PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Wanted to share this number with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
At a time when so much is at stake in our fight for President Biden’s entire Build Back Better agenda, we simply can’t afford to lose any ground in hitting our goals.
#
Peter, as we approach the end of the month (already, I know), I wanted to give you a sneak peek into our October fundraising:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211027?refcode=em20211027-752&t=1&refcode2=752_420207_1fF1L_&akid=752%2E420207%2E1fF1L_)
That’s one of the first things I see when I log in to Pramila’s ActBlue account, and we’re incredibly proud of that number. With just a $25.33 average online contribution, we’ve built a powerful, small-dollar grassroots movement for bold and transformative change.
**But on Sunday, we’re facing our first end-of-month deadline in the final fundraising quarter of 2021, and we’ve set a goal of $25,000 to show everyone that our movement isn’t going anywhere.** At a time when so much is at stake in our fight for President Biden’s entire Build Back Better agenda that invests in working families and our environment, we simply can’t afford to lose any ground. We can’t fall short of hitting our goals.
[**Peter, a $25.33 contribution from you today would ensure we can hit our October goal. Can we count on you to chip in $25.33 — or whatever you can afford — right now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211027?refcode=em20211027-752&t=2&refcode2=752_420207_1fF1L_&akid=752%2E420207%2E1fF1L_)
**[Chip in $25.33 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211027?refcode=em20211027-752&t=21&refcode2=752_420207_1fF1L_&akid=752%2E420207%2E1fF1L_)**
No one in Congress is fighting harder to pass the popular Build Back Better Act than Pramila. As the lead progressive negotiator at the table, her leadership on behalf of working families is unparalleled as she fights to pass this urgent, necessary, and transformational investment in our communities.
As the fight continues, we can't allow corporate influence to drive public policy — that's the people's job. That’s why I’m asking: [**Can you chip in $25.33 — our average online contribution in October — or any amount to help us hit our end-of-month goal and support Pramila’s fearless advocacy for the entire Build Back Better agenda?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211027?refcode=em20211027-752&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=752_420207_1fF1L_&akid=752%2E420207%2E1fF1L_)
Remember, Pramila doesn't take a dime of corporate PAC money because she has always believed in the power of the grassroots and the power of the people to enact real, lasting change. **That starts with contributions from people like you in response to emails like this one.**
So grateful for your support,
Lauren Lalonde, Finance Director
Pramila for Congress
**[Chip in $25.33 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211027?refcode=em20211027-752&t=23&refcode2=752_420207_1fF1L_&akid=752%2E420207%2E1fF1L_)**

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211027-752-footer&t=24&refcode2=752_420207_1fF1L_&akid=752%2E420207%2E1fF1L_)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=25&akid=752%2E420207%2E1fF1L_)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=752%2E420207%2E1fF1L_)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Rod Dorilas
subject: Do you know how many black Republicans there are in Congress?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
body:
I'm a former Trump official. First generation American. Republican congressional hopeful asking you for a few minutes of time to tell you my story tod |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_s=1d36b2a9458c451a806d7fe0ea29c77f&_t=Wu-45J-Bqjs3B-D-taS8VGDvjbV835LoQYTBhopE86hP4DDjQOvVY_kyv86wvjAb2J5lVUsGBSnqesEfTghC-zqYpALz5Cx5OQTU0CsOKSq8usUqx7DNZDxVnqA_NRgouFfmrKH1YtyGwjHxd9p3NqtdA-emKWRD7gH_xMtLMVo%3D).

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1d36b2a9458c451a806d7fe0ea29c77f&_e=nMXD5LzTvvo4krihiQTUfsQHWK7UKUlTHvc6y8hQtxlXo7OxH4aw8nPbhNgEaucm_llZj3gAvVdf6iFdy7tFHowTtWMmOTdp3L0FEfLtGcRxLxdh4eOfaeA8a7Hw-Z37ra8YDe_oIG0XpROeyiB5yrGm-THYARFEM_2Y3OT7V55y8vS8Pbw_PQII7JofdjgI_RQ5czBNoAWtt7acWFoEA_HNGsUf5uGF8mRqbO3JGKLbYKw-QTlOAK4yeGYqnQIcwNy5ulZSrax9ymtPJ18lGVVPtGEpwIdHiD-QvqMe9bAe_dpWrbBrurPf4oyH4nREvWcIBxutuV3s0stQErEtaVJjjHZS58IkriSG45OmzsblrNfy4cWBttyvqjZ6pi1pA83f8W8jeSrkLIxaBUw96BSBsv0fm9hST7QXVAEe69Rqkp8JzhE_1UjRG_6OeF7_GthqfLVon4KL2EH_l55j7JUZmvO-JQbHMqbC2-AvNBI%3D)

---
Peter,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1d36b2a9458c451a806d7fe0ea29c77f&_e=nMXD5LzTvvo4krihiQTUfsQHWK7UKUlTHvc6y8hQtxlXo7OxH4aw8nPbhNgEaucm_llZj3gAvVdf6iFdy7tFHowTtWMmOTdp3L0FEfLtGcRxLxdh4eOfaeA8a7Hw-Z37ra8YDe_oIG0XpROeyiB5yrGm-THYARFEM_2Y3OT7V55y8vS8Pbw_PQII7JofdjgI_RQ5czBNoAWtt7acWFoEA_HNGsUf5uGF8mRqbO3JGKLbYKw-QTlOAK4yeGYqnQIcwNy5ulZSrax9ymtPJ18lGa69NJOaaru-vcgGqGriuhKSR3gbf0vk1OZvxC1ndDQ_42gN5ATtQSUb_jtmxA0m07Y1D7ZndhUXlpfVQ4gBVqSbTVJBNFph2QsCajjJF1IDXhjPYTKVIVvQhVtUhAsToRihNiKf5UQbFZ2A0BE9-txxJ1VzoDonHtLJWGccq7SFmRkujRhkUsr2mLIGd85bpIjQ_1A0rKQbqRILDK2yZ2U%3D)
My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today.
* I’m a military veteran (**I joined at 17**),
* I’m a lawyer (**I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school**)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ _**freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction**_.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1d36b2a9458c451a806d7fe0ea29c77f&_e=nMXD5LzTvvo4krihiQTUfsQHWK7UKUlTHvc6y8hQtxlXo7OxH4aw8nPbhNgEaucm_llZj3gAvVdf6iFdy7tFHowTtWMmOTdp3L0FEfLtGcRxLxdh4eOfaeA8a7Hw-Z37ra8YDe_oIG0XpROeyiB5yrGm-THYARFEM_2Y3OT7V55y8vS8Pbw_PQII7JofdjgI_RQ5czBNoAWtt7acWFoEA_HNGsUf5uGF8mRqbO3JGKLbYKw-QTlOAK4yeGYqnQIcwNy5ulZSrax9ymtPJ18lGdZkLUssaRp09Ls8b5_KLJ26Abf2YgLk_xrgr2iyLt-N244JZiBFXubW8ik1y3ctCLcyP1Gjz_uFpuy34iGZKdWCqc7dccdHkt2rSZWPEivZAZWADVKA8iH3Brzh_D64ZlXoOvDCUtgSmbUgOw7K9UxaMlezCN7XN6lbqTE5gFm-V7u7FteczavFYmIrLoGZwW6EdYN-njYz_C9KuviYmxY%3D)
I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, **[please consider chipping in whatever you can spare to my campaign today](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1d36b2a9458c451a806d7fe0ea29c77f&_e=nMXD5LzTvvo4krihiQTUfsQHWK7UKUlTHvc6y8hQtxlXo7OxH4aw8nPbhNgEaucm_llZj3gAvVdf6iFdy7tFHowTtWMmOTdp3L0FEfLtGcRxLxdh4eOfaeA8a7Hw-Z37ra8YDe_oIG0XpROeyiB5yrGm-THYARFEM_2Y3OT7V55y8vS8Pbw_PQII7JofdjgI_RQ5czBNoAWtt7acWFoEA_HNGsUf5uGF8mRqbO3JGKLbYKw-QTlOAK4yeGYqnQIcwNy5ulZSrax9ymtPJ18lGaHmbnOK5245qWdOzribx9iXRmHafNZbZqq_AATY5WyQie2k1G5Ia0zJ7-0wqnWFu8_OXBzdl3agrd8b96g-Q1Sxlua84DE0MLBZ2P0DLLL3DzuJ9GoSAgiJLrL_8a4M2bc7SAunH6H72ENok3X5MCuA5IJ8omjlCENXeYrhiXgJmBKGtSIH_RtwoYikOFBCoSPW68JlfNNh5jKDgO8AG3c%3D)**. I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for.

[** Send a 1st Generation American to Congress >>**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1d36b2a9458c451a806d7fe0ea29c77f&_e=nMXD5LzTvvo4krihiQTUfsQHWK7UKUlTHvc6y8hQtxlXo7OxH4aw8nPbhNgEaucm_llZj3gAvVdf6iFdy7tFHowTtWMmOTdp3L0FEfLtGcRxLxdh4eOfaeA8a7Hw-Z37ra8YDe_oIG0XpROeyiB5yrGm-THYARFEM_2Y3OT7V55y8vS8Pbw_PQII7JofdjgI_RQ5czBNoAWtt7acWFoEA_HNGsUf5uGF8mRqbO3JGKLbYKw-QTlOAK4yeGYqnQIcwNy5ulZSrax9ymtPJ18lGafrZHCH9JTfeSstYcq80dv1zsFu5FNh6w5H4qbHE3UaCUnbpjy_YqptxxbUkj8PnrI-V6THOqLuEt_tXwbd9aUS5ykUrdB27cVQ9Rt7S0zQlkda99xcYtEKjkmRfxhIN-LvwPl_K_gHtUpgD2X8VWfdKM5Ggk5SAbVsyP3PgxVT087EFne1sam_lkmFC1LMr46qUQtVweRYDKrFv7X3NHI%3D)
Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts.

I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. **I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice**. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1d36b2a9458c451a806d7fe0ea29c77f&_e=nMXD5LzTvvo4krihiQTUfsQHWK7UKUlTHvc6y8hQtxlXo7OxH4aw8nPbhNgEaucm_llZj3gAvVdf6iFdy7tFHowTtWMmOTdp3L0FEfLtGcRxLxdh4eOfaeA8a7Hw-Z37ra8YDe_oIG0XpROeyiB5yrGm-THYARFEM_2Y3OT7V55y8vS8Pbw_PQII7JofdjgI_RQ5czBNoAWtt7acWFoEA_HNGsUf5uGF8mRqbO3JGKLbYKw-QTlOAK4yeGYqnQIcwNy5ulZSrax9ymtPJ18lGUxpB2Yv8GlMr820V_Ztod1Z50lf2clMYiIAwgIvPR9KXtHvbMwpy8NaEhMD26lRk8z9UEKrHOvkaW7EuUmxHC7EkMUtZsxHYRVkmDrrXojKaafyS_b0JNcOvZl0fDIjSFKT4NudiF7BHkVq6o1i1_2FghNxCJXpY1SciKwhlDev1v3wOnlVVxcvbb3c2PDRK8gn7yBQGWNVCID-xNmXVVI%3D)
**I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. **

Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but _**what is worth having in life that is easy?**_ I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts.

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

clean_body: I'm a former Trump official. First generation American. Republican congressional hopeful asking you for a few minutes of time to tell you my story tod | No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may . Peter, Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans. I’m speaking with authority on the matter: I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative. My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today. I’m a military veteran (I joined at 17), I’m a lawyer (I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school) I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office. The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success. In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is. I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, . I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for. Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts. I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today. I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but what is worth having in life that is easy? I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts. If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress. Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration. name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: Countdown to Election Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| | | There isn't much time left, so I'll make this quick.

Virginians have already begun casting their ballots and there are just 6 days left until Election Day.

If Clinton-ally Terry McAuliffe wins this race, there will be dire consequences for Virginia. He's bad on crime, bad for our economy, and bad for our schools.

If I'm elected, on day one I'll cut exploding costs for families, defend our police instead of defunding them, jumpstart job growth, and ban Critical Race Theory.

_**[If you have anything to spare, I'm asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=55fedfe62137477c8f2d28e1e6c6d558&_e=nljyJB2kpYzwICv8G7h1CuK2fTYLr8Li_0TJdZkcMLO9_CPCWxhIH6xoTKuGJLB85ZJ5manj0-zPmMD3dfHKd2zYIPynlR9tIlmpbLrw0Wy-ytxbkzS_LiH8GJZ1sJS2REPWXGVcHczoM8QpD-IOylTyGtAGwwSM8X6Op761Fgi6dVDFzgcuLnevm7CZz7swA0db4QikE4Kfqj6LQZlwp0xg0yZnpq22OL5yVchNi8JHzjl84CxHGAiAWxtgouvo0pLo1bz1qqM15vNlxQOGe4WA6vR2WITiqrWjBRvklbV5Nw8J9WgArkgxORFCCapMsKpS3EDaucT4AxDU8U8tSPfjN9CfB091oUVcNRi_3aHtrYSoyBhmhfIdk11mokjtoghnTOEs9yVYM_2M6oewYBj1Iv6FEhGr5LU8FqCcbjPY6Os8aZLVl88Vby1Q8EzcNrKlIickPjTW43JaiN2eNw7a3hvXB3P7UA9C7vjLw3DZ3rdFFPnE1sVY67C3gucetbB0mT8XCqyTb3B9P5zczBQ3864K8gpo4c1MZlybKUc%3D "If you have anything to spare, I’m asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.")**_

---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=55fedfe62137477c8f2d28e1e6c6d558&_e=nljyJB2kpYzwICv8G7h1CuK2fTYLr8Li_0TJdZkcMLO9_CPCWxhIH6xoTKuGJLB85ZJ5manj0-zPmMD3dfHKd2zYIPynlR9tIlmpbLrw0Wy-ytxbkzS_LiH8GJZ1sJS2REPWXGVcHczoM8QpD-IOylTyGtAGwwSM8X6Op761Fgi6dVDFzgcuLnevm7CZz7swA0db4QikE4Kfqj6LQZlwp0xg0yZnpq22OL5yVchNi8JHzjl84CxHGAiAWxtgouvo0pLo1bz1qqM15vNlxQOGe4WA6vR2WITiqrWjBRvklbV5Nw8J9WgArkgxORFCCapMsKpS3EDaucT4AxDU8U8tSL0BllJd1ZoJnIeFuoe9Bsk1-JZ4_ufyT-e-G6-lLwOiMb3Vw2Uzt6H4RB0FK2NO4oAlmHHH6np2MOOQeRUsM-1LzE6xncVZ4U_HzDH13ggkzL2qfvlbThLDjzwLMB9tI6pZ9fR2Ig_o5keEx4NFZTZkoD1II8bjXICvJC2FdRtsH0BfF5lVmSv4tx3cJOWWLqllHxpsJscrIIKGRz7XI2U%3D)
---

All eyes are on Virginia. The results of this election will be used as a guide map for what could follow in next year's midterms.

If Republicans _win_ , it will be a huge blow to the Democrats' hopes of holding onto their majority. But if Republicans _lose_ , Democrats will leverage our loss for their own gain.

We _can_ win. In fact, the latest polls have me and McAuliffe neck-and-neck.

**This race will come down to the final get-out-the-vote efforts.** Every single dollar could impact how many more doors we can knock, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach.

_**[So, can I please count on you to pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $1?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=55fedfe62137477c8f2d28e1e6c6d558&_e=nljyJB2kpYzwICv8G7h1CuK2fTYLr8Li_0TJdZkcMLO9_CPCWxhIH6xoTKuGJLB85ZJ5manj0-zPmMD3dfHKd2zYIPynlR9tIlmpbLrw0Wy-ytxbkzS_LiH8GJZ1sJS2REPWXGVcHczoM8QpD-IOylTyGtAGwwSM8X6Op761Fgi6dVDFzgcuLnevm7CZz7swA0db4QikE4Kfqj6LQZlwp0xg0yZnpq22OL5yVchNi8JHzjl84CxHGAiAWxtgouvo0pLo1bz1qqM15vNlxQOGe4WA6vR2WITiqrWjBRvklbV5Nw8J9WgArkgxORFCCapMsKpS3EDaucT4AxDU8U8tSDa1kHU5shbkhjof_Aakak-6QimAOEDJe4XKlIsBfP3p1rFmmGq7hmrzSHJ8VAMjj7cKV_vQsiQA0CcvPAZtSA-BnfFL6jStvjEwxfKXEy3RucFW1twx3AN8LFU3FzemkW5Dt7sv55pq5y_aZJdytzJmc3nzsOYUPAhtdnj_4ovp8UcHrmFPiSsQi7ic3C-RFjGsW-4kFL0MZLB-pwBPJc8%3D "So, can I please count on you to pitch in anything you’re able ASAP, even if it’s just $1?")**_

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

Sincerely,

Glenn Youngkin

_**EXCLUSIVE MESSAGE FROM NIKKI HALEY:**_

I'm focused on helping Republicans win the next election and I want YOU to play an important part. This is a great opportunity to support political leaders who believe America is inherently good, and who understand that the Democrats' far-left policies undermine our freedoms and American values.

Please help me fight back against the Democrats and their radical agenda. We can only defeat them if we stand united.

**[Will you join my team today?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=55fedfe62137477c8f2d28e1e6c6d558&_e=nljyJB2kpYzwICv8G7h1CuK2fTYLr8Li_0TJdZkcMLNgi6ZAVUt5ABcwr6Zu5vOYItNN9yUlPKzXfArqiEEoMMYpRaFsLw_bCxNZeli4wmOMkkUrbp28OtEE0DQf5a9orng_pxWOJp03hCiO07fgli-yhkCUUuyO6b4ns2RqpnFwPqtf0jhWRZ-f-CnfY5_fZfJf265dc4uiqe-RWFZEbed631vyjI7H-AlvslfqHEtYvsQ-rv48PsXtCyjWCe-StaI_bg88ugf_GL1mim-V8o0vFEPhyV_NcRPHoF8EcAeZ-zVbQHLZhHR8qeH19kXSJUFRytakM6yP48Ei1HvzyTq85-XELItFRNeyYNNA0FdwaiXn74_sKE-_uZAR0CCGIusVJq1N9LAzJqIK6FVQbD0RWLJ1-6yhWCk0Tdl4yawb-cpuW2tEKJqQKDEky9tkBXEOrTsnJzL12Ptkg5AR0jaWxaKObYY1xLb7gcQrjzk-1LmakYcS52Idq_G1U1mzBkrxCNVw8E8sNMwPeifae1VNRKvwTRHkUD68KLosiy4%3D "Will you join my team today?")**
