name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: A huge milestone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We’re coming up on a huge milestone.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211027-2609-header&t=1&akid=2609%2E2526796%2E124gdB)
We’re coming up on a huge milestone.
Next week marks exactly one year until Alexandria’s name will be on the ballot for re-election.
We know from past experience that campaigning is going to ramp up early next year, and we must raise resources right now so we can fully fund our organizing and advertising programs, execute a strong campaign, and be prepared for whatever gets thrown our way.
So we’re launching a goal to raise $174,249 before the end of this month. That's what we'll need to raise in order to carry out the strongest campaign for Alexandria’s 2022 re-election next year.**It’s an ambitious goal, but a strong response from supporters like you today will make a huge difference.**
[Any amount you can give right now would help set Alexandria’s 2022 campaign to a strong start. If you’re able to – can you please pitch in $3 or anything you can to help us prepare for the election year ahead?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211027-1?refcode=em20211027-2609-P_FND_EOM_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2609_2526796_124gdB&akid=2609%2E2526796%2E124gdB)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211027-1?refcode=em20211027-2609-P_FND_EOM_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2609_2526796_124gdB&akid=2609%2E2526796%2E124gdB)**
On a grassroots, small-dollar campaign like ours, we track our fundraising progress on a daily basis, because falling short of even one daily target could have a major impact on our campaign plans and ability to stay competitive against our opponents.
We know that in the next year, the GOP will throw the full force of their corporate donors and disinformation machine against us.
[You can help us be as prepared as possible going into this upcoming election year by making a $3 contribution today. It would mean a lot to have your support right now. ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211027-1?refcode=em20211027-2609-P_FND_EOM_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2609_2526796_124gdB&akid=2609%2E2526796%2E124gdB)
With thanks,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211027-1?refcode=em20211027-2609-P_FND_EOM_GOL&t=23&refcode2=2609_2526796_124gdB&akid=2609%2E2526796%2E124gdB)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211027-2609-P_FND_EOM_GOL&t=24&akid=2609%2E2526796%2E124gdB)**

| Peter, I’m coming to you with urgent news:

The Hill just reported **Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy has raised nearly $60 MILLION to date** \-- _and he’s ready to unleash every cent of that money to steal our House Majority from us._

**[To stop McCarthy and the GOP, we need to rush 10,000 grassroots donations to the frontlines in 4 short days. We must fight back. | Peter, I’m coming to you with urgent news: The Hill just reported Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy has raised nearly $60 MILLION to date \-- and he’s ready to unleash every cent of that money to steal our House Majority from us. = | = From passing gross voter suppression laws to funneling millions to target the most vulnerable House Democrats, Republicans will stop at nothing to flip states and consolidate power. We can’t afford to get complacent now. McCarthy is already frantically fundraising to steal back our Majority. I’m preparing for one of the most expensive midterm elections in history, Peter -- and I need you to gear up for the long haul. Because without sustained financial support from my best grassroots Democrats, I’m afraid we won’t be able to compete. name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Newsom is Leaving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [In Newsom's Absence](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziopkzjeEArRPtKlROvAdVBkcSTfkU3XhxIu6V8kVvj1Sjg&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_27_final&n=1) Gavin Newsom is bound for Scotland to attend the UN Climate Change conference. In the absence of our jet-setting Governor, we’re fighting on several fronts: **__Port Crisis__** : I’m calling for a Special Session of the Legislature to address a crisis that threatens the whole country. Newsom refuses to take simple steps like reverse AB 5 to free up truckers and suspend senseless regulations that worsen bottlenecks. **__EDD_ _Debacle__** : On Monday we finally had an oversight hearing. [I asked](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Trwmtk_uyVQ0nz6QZoJharMTg-p5M21fZzcMIR-5ZAj1S47bX-B5vcjg4XdTcMzF_A&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_27_final&n=2) Newsom’s handpicked Director why California has the nation’s worst unemployment. Incredibly, she had no idea, saying she’ll have a “research team” look into it. **__K-12 Mandate__** : Yesterday hundreds of parents came to our town hall in Lincoln about fighting Newsom’s radical mandate. Another citizen-led rally at the Capitol is planned for November 15 at 10 AM. **__School Conditions__** : The American Academy of Pediatrics has declared a children’s mental health emergency. I’m calling for a hearing into inhumane conditions at California schools like forcing kids to chew their lunch with masks on. By the way, 15 Legislators are joining Newsom in Glasgow. If we don’t fight for California, no one will. [Join our team of Citizen Supporters](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv_IPFMzzv9WmdPghwMBSwX0JHWSzI75LyWvC6h1sivRLtVVWDof7SVZORZZbP1UPz4&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_27_final&n=3) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAxjdPlPdkHLhfki5LkPeTZDGo1UPGpnf6FH2RiE1ZxoEA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_27_final&n=4) Kevin Kiley
[](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_27_final&n=5)California Legislator

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_27_final&n=6).

name: Michael Bennet
subject: re: monthly Child Tax Credit payments
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38009324/313580648/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODdhMjM2Yi04NjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qaa1GeI4w_J1FOz4C38VYe46MhnU_Bcmr6IBeo6XEhM=)
Folks, before I served Colorado as senator, I served Denver’s students as school superintendent. I began to notice a pattern from one high schooler. Morning after morning, one student was falling asleep in class. It was clear he was exhausted and when I asked what was going on, he revealed that he’d been working the midnight shift at McDonald’s so his family had enough money to get by. I spent years fighting for the Child Tax Credit because of stories like his and the fact that this is commonplace in our country. The monthly payments have helped one million Colorado kids and are on track to cut childhood poverty nearly in half this year alone. So, when I’m negotiating a further extension of the Child Tax Credit, I’m thinking of the countless kids nationwide that won’t have to work the midnight shift because of the CTC. I think of the kids whose parents could help with homework after school because they didn’t have to pick up an extra shift. This is why I’m working hard to extend the CTC beyond its December expiration date, folks. I’ve seen firsthand how income inequality affects our kids, so this is personal. I’m running to meetings, making calls, and negotiating with the next generation in mind so I haven’t had time to focus on my re-election efforts despite all that’s at stake. My team tells me that we’re coming up short of our fundraising goal this month but I know grassroots supporters like you have stepped up before. I appreciate every hard-earned dollar pitched into my campaign and hope you can donate before this month’s deadline. **If you can, please pitch in $10 — or what works for your budget — to my re-election campaign. I’m fighting so our economy works for everyone, rather than a few at the top, and your support makes that possible.** **_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_** **** | | | ****[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38009325/313580649/-699711448?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20211027_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODdhMjM2Yi04NjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qaa1GeI4w_J1FOz4C38VYe46MhnU_Bcmr6IBeo6XEhM=)****

clean_body: | = Folks, before I served Colorado as senator, I served Denver’s students as school superintendent. I began to notice a pattern from one high schooler. Morning after morning, one student was falling asleep in class. It was clear he was exhausted and when I asked what was going on, he revealed that he’d been working the midnight shift at McDonald’s so his family had enough money to get by. I spent years fighting for the Child Tax Credit because of stories like his and the fact that this is commonplace in our country. The monthly payments have helped one million Colorado kids and are on track to cut childhood poverty nearly in half this year alone. So, when I’m negotiating a further extension of the Child Tax Credit, I’m thinking of the countless kids nationwide that won’t have to work the midnight shift because of the CTC. I think of the kids whose parents could help with homework after school because they didn’t have to pick up an extra shift. This is why I’m working hard to extend the CTC beyond its December expiration date, folks. I’ve seen firsthand how income inequality affects our kids, so this is personal. I’m running to meetings, making calls, and negotiating with the next generation in mind so I haven’t had time to focus on my re-election efforts despite all that’s at stake. My team tells me that we’re coming up short of our fundraising goal this month but I know grassroots supporters like you have stepped up before. I appreciate every hard-earned dollar pitched into my campaign and hope you can donate before this month’s deadline. If you can, please pitch in $10 — or what works for your budget — to my re-election campaign. I’m fighting so our economy works for everyone, rather than a few at the top, and your support makes that possible. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= Thank you, Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

| | | **MSNBC BREAKING:
DeJoy's Post Office slowdowns could tie up mail ballots in Virginia race**

---
We have horrifying news.

New reports reveal that Donald Trump's hand-picked Postmaster General has made such EXTREME cuts to the Post Office that some Virginia mail-in ballots might not arrive in time to be counted.

Democratic HQ is committed to fighting back against Republican schemes -- and we want to know that our best grassroots supporters are behind us.

[**Quickly -- do you CONDEMN Louis DeJoy 's attacks on our Post Office? ******](https://links.e.dccc.)

NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Petition Signature: [SIGN ON >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_8wc6D-)
| [Sign Your Name >> ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/j~)

We're only SIX days away from Election Day in Virginia, and we just received horrifying news:

**Donald Trump 's hand-picked Postmaster General has made such EXTREME cuts to the Post Office that some mail-in ballots might not arrive in time to be counted. **

_**EXCUSE US?!**_

Please understand: Virginia's election is one of the most important races on the map this year.

And it's clear that after HISTORIC voter turnout last year delivered our Democratic Trifecta, **Republicans are committed to doing whatever it takes to BLOCK our Democrats from winning ever again:**

_\-- They 've proposed over 400+ voter suppression laws nationwide.

\-- They've GERRYMANDERED Democrats out of their own districts.

**\-- And they 've launched VICIOUS attacks on the Post Office, which could prevent Virginia's mail-in ballots from arriving on time! **_

Democratic HQ is committed to fighting back against Republican attacks -- but we need to know that our best grassroots supporters are behind us.

So, we're calling on Democrats nationwide _\-- including 11 from your state --_ to let us know where they stand.

---
[Let us know before midnight: Do you CONDEMN Louis DeJoy's attacks on our Post Office? ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-)
---

The outcome of Virginia's critical election hangs in the balance.
Thanks,

DCCC

clean_body: | | | | We need to end this Friend, Every day on the campaign trail we get asked “How can we stop Joe Biden?” Alaskans want to know how to fix the border crisis, how to stop rising inflation, and how to bring back resource jobs that Biden and Murkowski dismantled and destroyed. The answer is simple, we need to elect Kelly Tshibaka as the next U.S. Senator from Alaska! Every time we outraise, out campaign, and outwork Liberal Lisa Murkowski and Joe Biden , we are one step closer to defeating their Extreme Far-Left agenda once and for all. Kelly is our only chance at putting an end to the border crisis and reviving our jobs! Thanks, Team Kelly | | | | ==

name: John Castorani
subject: Destroying the bastards was my mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
Benghazi. Benghazi. Benghazi. For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountabl Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_s=70191038b8cd4a59846aadd5613ba026&_t=JV21RVIUhmGBuaw5waWwk7z5QOyDBrOcFiCqUseeNBF3XIbxDz4QNzVNEOOssk5cK8U0FF645_QD_9_vvy9sr6xdBQrXL02dtg9vRjd8B0wRhOC04Q5rVpvA16Td8ne4i_wbdLBs0QyfG12uwtv4Hai7FFMBScO6kjhbCHlFEuI%3D) | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=70191038b8cd4a59846aadd5613ba026&_e=YMLEWyXhuTLBclYDO506sSYqAmdbOI3H_ZFGJCMVVcbgIZ3fUdyrK7gI3rxSOg-PMh-OCEK9xbVNybFLCwROXeJgFwUaSgIU_kf8aZlKFKgItsFuDQBR35zIpq5VYti6gIR0WcvKZcwkgH6eiSV2Dlgn3iauAkWQh9GkZar4UNUFURFBDiNUC2AqQ9Mf6PJ0ckaddHxRP53Xjp_08PdDQ7G71CI9EOck2S_3HmClh4lcush8adst6o1HHYBJfXJsSPtoGVU1WS3AqT0tklgNZJqjh94ky-ISUstv-PXluwYTQNPXAlJP3-Ik9P6fIOWCB3-6YRaxlz7B4MMo_ZUZ-PaCrd36Xho3r_ZQVAw3SqhUr1jFZxWXMT9qqRTGGnY2mYNAsRG6MJcjgIzn2ZPn_GvSmycKrfb5CYA6C0g3UPzS_4m7TXiyvOYFLXaq89idSQAAPk_nHG7NZo0MxmuUhIEqJhPEcIwkdAK2xXMcxEQ%3D)
---

Peter,

My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox **I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today.**

I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.**I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own**.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=70191038b8cd4a59846aadd5613ba026&_e=YMLEWyXhuTLBclYDO506sSYqAmdbOI3H_ZFGJCMVVcbgIZ3fUdyrK7gI3rxSOg-PMh-OCEK9xbVNybFLCwROXeJgFwUaSgIU_kf8aZlKFKgItsFuDQBR35zIpq5VYti6gIR0WcvKZcwkgH6eiSV2Dlgn3iauAkWQh9GkZar4UNUFURFBDiNUC2AqQ9Mf6PJ0ckaddHxRP53Xjp_08PdDQ7G71CI9EOck2S_3HmClh4lcush8adst6o1HHYBJfXJsSPtoGVU1WS3AqT0tklgNZBlrg1u5mrA4VPk5MQ-q0JGIjkuo_PwxpXl_MC7Vvr9tz1xhM1tR_r3d_gpnr9SGZ3Ec6ic6JtKAt1S42FchX6DAlXiKom281PoenIdErMJrg4Nflaz3oRGV4X3ytR42Qy7EdOx0qZfnSKD1eXMtNsfA568QVgyBFLQ3aOs-nv-AwsO54AC6k5mHg5S7X53OOhwNwi_dDZSM8OcZfu-YQCw%3D)

Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency **[I gave up my career in the intelligence service- along with my security clearance - to run for Congress](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=70191038b8cd4a59846aadd5613ba026&_e=YMLEWyXhuTLBclYDO506sSYqAmdbOI3H_ZFGJCMVVcbgIZ3fUdyrK7gI3rxSOg-PMh-OCEK9xbVNybFLCwROXeJgFwUaSgIU_kf8aZlKFKgItsFuDQBR35zIpq5VYti6gIR0WcvKZcwkgH6eiSV2Dlgn3iauAkWQh9GkZar4UNUFURFBDiNUC2AqQ9Mf6PJ0ckaddHxRP53Xjp_08PdDQ7G71CI9EOck2S_3HmClh4lcush8adst6o1HHYBJfXJsSPtoGVU1WS3AqT0tklgNZOS12Vj5pxna11bWxwcY_LtL1AfR8-aka8Wnuqii6xbo-ns0biYCao8Jsr20jIMqLDUOb6KkXj3BWAJFpDbst4xlObD3cDxZA8XnWgIlTzIQo7WHu2FHhecAAXvI386i9FbVp2hiCuPCfBounIYLtjS5skoJ2h3GKSW8vq-OgPL2o7ohCZ3GQEbUUeFuVFN5jbWP_fX6zhYhjq8vZj8Eqso%3D)**. I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price.

If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.**As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable** , and in a moment, [**I’m going to humbly ask for your financial assistance regarding my campaign.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=70191038b8cd4a59846aadd5613ba026&_e=YMLEWyXhuTLBclYDO506sSYqAmdbOI3H_ZFGJCMVVcbgIZ3fUdyrK7gI3rxSOg-PMh-OCEK9xbVNybFLCwROXeJgFwUaSgIU_kf8aZlKFKgItsFuDQBR35zIpq5VYti6gIR0WcvKZcwkgH6eiSV2Dlgn3iauAkWQh9GkZar4UNUFURFBDiNUC2AqQ9Mf6PJ0ckaddHxRP53Xjp_08PdDQ7G71CI9EOck2S_3HmClh4lcush8adst6o1HHYBJfXJsSPtoGVU1WS3AqT0tklgNZKQoplrt8wMEixPn_6TtdOFeLUdfaBglXeO_WCgVvuvfejkfKKOxJ0jQIxmeHkQ8XZZCJxgd7bQclVC9ecg_9CBsje8I6Jbun8WLMhDafS_EDKfIsPa9STC1Y0KUfGHLi0z3xGUPqwQ66dXJ0rrUrH2nnIY3XYZPcJaITWjZvyQDNX7jZChyO_onjiOo5rG8D-ZMnnybqpMus4peoaBKo1o%3D)

You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, _**who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades**_ - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel.

**This political assassination made my blood boil**. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. _**We have to fight for it**_.

| [**HELP ME FIGHT FOR _YOU_
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=70191038b8cd4a59846aadd5613ba026&_e=YMLEWyXhuTLBclYDO506sSYqAmdbOI3H_ZFGJCMVVcbgIZ3fUdyrK7gI3rxSOg-PMh-OCEK9xbVNybFLCwROXeJgFwUaSgIU_kf8aZlKFKgItsFuDQBR35zIpq5VYti6gIR0WcvKZcwkgH6eiSV2Dlgn3iauAkWQh9GkZar4UNUFURFBDiNUC2AqQ9Mf6PJ0ckaddHxRP53Xjp_08PdDQ7G71CI9EOck2S_3HmClh4lcush8adst6o1HHYBJfXJsSPtoGVU1WS3AqT0tklgNZD2271GAL3x3eWjsqq4goe65-aN2TQRFWO5_NAkPcDGFpkrMY2FEPWkX1nQ0BjlQwhMCAiKA70W4rlbiHiy-Yowx-rJ8sFcJwU9TaDyS-xt_3Z2LY7-HllzHoqEen_1C_wnGusA_m0NsQaG57vkz6FmwZN_WBU2pyvh_a0vp2x_yr6f1yJjwhhXWetexqeePPOaV7WDTuSz5C07-QDw5IbU%3D)
---

Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=70191038b8cd4a59846aadd5613ba026&_e=YMLEWyXhuTLBclYDO506sSYqAmdbOI3H_ZFGJCMVVcbgIZ3fUdyrK7gI3rxSOg-PMh-OCEK9xbVNybFLCwROXeJgFwUaSgIU_kf8aZlKFKgItsFuDQBR35zIpq5VYti6gIR0WcvKZcwkgH6eiSV2Dlgn3iauAkWQh9GkZar4UNUFURFBDiNUC2AqQ9Mf6PJ0ckaddHxRP53Xjp_08PdDQ7G71CI9EOck2S_3HmClh4lcush8adst6o1HHYBJfXJsSPtoGVU1WS3AqT0tklgNZB05Tqc7GGVlXg92dJfgATy0bjvs2YqVcPwxRb6kvKetdAfS9ZQLoSWIZE09psIbA8qQ7D-xecbZeHYuECtl1si35LjqkM23Fi9IwPDpKPo7zAZznx0keoElMcS9PAwF-tHDHyXHF1WWqHC9Pyg7xvSXxE-BHzJTg0CizscaYE328LBos2p9Bx1mOkTJLhiJx9Kv5rIBGBAtaye3_EXEJXg%3D)
At the time of the Benghazi attacks, **Hillary Clinton** knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She **knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable**. I’m running to hold these bureaucrats accountable and I hope you’ll help put some wind in my sails by donating $5, $10 or even $50 today](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=70191038b8cd4a59846aadd5613ba026&_e=YMLEWyXhuTLBclYDO506sSYqAmdbOI3H_ZFGJCMVVcbgIZ3fUdyrK7gI3rxSOg-PMh-OCEK9xbVNybFLCwROXeJgFwUaSgIU_kf8aZlKFKgItsFuDQBR35zIpq5VYti6gIR0WcvKZcwkgH6eiSV2Dlgn3iauAkWQh9GkZar4UNUFURFBDiNUC2AqQ9Mf6PJ0ckaddHxRP53Xjp_08PdDQ7G71CI9EOck2S_3HmClh4lcush8adst6o1HHYBJfXJsSPtoGVU1WS3AqT0tklgNZAVVdlaRDPc1b1sAlPUHhESJfibL29zcRwSIiRFHuFNio8M8q5dIwxBOraPGfnnX8H6e80SgeOp-1fpomMVBhYsRD3Kd77_p3bTK59YLnTOu4Xje1Z5dsgk_cN8g19xktARSaKDCD9tSAK8o_vHAPe8hRRNxXf_9GTzBpQe679rtn-Zw_Hwp6m2F5z3NBNNw5TVJQVwKh0tVRiMBS3FN5bo%3D)**.

I'm a former Trump official. First generation American. Republican congressional hopeful asking you for a few minutes of time to tell you my story tod |

Peter,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f58088fc61eb4c03bea185130ba6e5ab&_e=x-aCZ2Zd-tr0Lwc84kF8CFfHLEirLdEzpKba1AonSxO-4JYgQtXrcX2PD3Yw6wmQswUcsJ3OHChhMNghxZcmqCMp4rPZcYapRhYToVYAuLpFjGrTTvDuhmWGEGLdxW4ObUbQ_JiYOYNl9qlxrJ0dE-0ItUXCLB0vKbjdEe4GURy5qTAWgoEptzWkp5ryEDaDDU96xh2juKBuOUR6lGNYHJ6kd2HyPgDZ0GYyPV6igPsLVt5d7Ij8wttnFa5Z48m650KHROQHvhrElGpYbm8Z3Li8YUIdFrg4FTwq-YJAavoyV6Dh2NIFp2Z62CMKOsYdvsDAZGK4DdiXXkNT76SL1LL9UKPcJKe354lpOXFwq46pAqkulP50T_RVOo93-_SaWm8pwPyxKsbuwSawCqgnY8WKbQs-TRVqqhqajk3EqP0Nu9iZ885ZuBigwyh36cVeSoBix-3_BfW-3IygxPVNGe33whw3Lxvn7UNqSnjFALSqPkhR-UBsTwovChSTvDsK)
My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today.
* I’m a military veteran (**I joined at 17**),
* I’m a lawyer (**I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school**)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ _**freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction**_.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f58088fc61eb4c03bea185130ba6e5ab&_e=x-aCZ2Zd-tr0Lwc84kF8CFfHLEirLdEzpKba1AonSxO-4JYgQtXrcX2PD3Yw6wmQswUcsJ3OHChhMNghxZcmqCMp4rPZcYapRhYToVYAuLpFjGrTTvDuhmWGEGLdxW4ObUbQ_JiYOYNl9qlxrJ0dE-0ItUXCLB0vKbjdEe4GURy5qTAWgoEptzWkp5ryEDaDDU96xh2juKBuOUR6lGNYHJ6kd2HyPgDZ0GYyPV6igPsLVt5d7Ij8wttnFa5Z48m650KHROQHvhrElGpYbm8Z3Li8YUIdFrg4FTwq-YJAavoJ5Zj21XBuaFp1tm-DWrMYRlE4ynNORNSdGbRFl0zJ9DPRtlXgXdrOrPwoZJRyPE6xpx-yKOsDN6Tn8VXkYtydnQDqgkkqMtBrTtUqkHN_DokXE0qZHnrH_pH_WVdC49l8_R5WDoZg6zPrdqz_5K-sAlSzR9AQRjnys5-Y3xO03Iy0__kEbHgKbk-PG70OBPeuQAotywxQRZ6dsU3t-xAc)
I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, **[please consider chipping in whatever you can spare to my campaign today](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f58088fc61eb4c03bea185130ba6e5ab&_e=x-aCZ2Zd-tr0Lwc84kF8CFfHLEirLdEzpKba1AonSxO-4JYgQtXrcX2PD3Yw6wmQswUcsJ3OHChhMNghxZcmqCMp4rPZcYapRhYToVYAuLpFjGrTTvDuhmWGEGLdxW4ObUbQ_JiYOYNl9qlxrJ0dE-0ItUXCLB0vKbjdEe4GURy5qTAWgoEptzWkp5ryEDaDDU96xh2juKBuOUR6lGNYHJ6kd2HyPgDZ0GYyPV6igPsLVt5d7Ij8wttnFa5Z48m650KHROQHvhrElGpYbm8Z3Li8YUIdFrg4FTwq-YJAavqBDhqR7P5IgFmzyizmhDtIrIFbAYZOp5w_NEyASABBmjVtVFNwBKRWOgSYo56zXU_5NhMWSuAeQWFXkrCrLg618VY12FXYadnup38MqUKx37P9HvX7ugKz0fvsn-bNffOFBw-vAKfh9Ue8EVlDxeNj0_md1xfv0I5078myGfyBPfGL5__MMc-RaMBl9YisW_p3qYiU5QEhq6ZveCmD44eM)**. I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for.

[** Send a 1st Generation American to Congress >>**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f58088fc61eb4c03bea185130ba6e5ab&_e=x-aCZ2Zd-tr0Lwc84kF8CFfHLEirLdEzpKba1AonSxO-4JYgQtXrcX2PD3Yw6wmQswUcsJ3OHChhMNghxZcmqCMp4rPZcYapRhYToVYAuLpFjGrTTvDuhmWGEGLdxW4ObUbQ_JiYOYNl9qlxrJ0dE-0ItUXCLB0vKbjdEe4GURy5qTAWgoEptzWkp5ryEDaDDU96xh2juKBuOUR6lGNYHJ6kd2HyPgDZ0GYyPV6igPsLVt5d7Ij8wttnFa5Z48m650KHROQHvhrElGpYbm8Z3Li8YUIdFrg4FTwq-YJAavq_3qjcQsNq-Yhlh27Z0XnMZVxW3Z1RsfwpGoceKCCcsAYoAXTeZSAiurz18kqfC7RoEFOUfnKlYLpxlGaxEeftbGaWGNHjppNERg3IarlDkNjF5gSoj-YuiJVWwvloektilLv1SYbORYj08hIJgABH2SngC2u3RxVh1e5culmvzcVvuDd9mgMLlgYom6iDXyHYQmm9S9KDGzGytAexIyeW)
Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts.

I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. **I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice**. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f58088fc61eb4c03bea185130ba6e5ab&_e=x-aCZ2Zd-tr0Lwc84kF8CFfHLEirLdEzpKba1AonSxO-4JYgQtXrcX2PD3Yw6wmQswUcsJ3OHChhMNghxZcmqCMp4rPZcYapRhYToVYAuLpFjGrTTvDuhmWGEGLdxW4ObUbQ_JiYOYNl9qlxrJ0dE-0ItUXCLB0vKbjdEe4GURy5qTAWgoEptzWkp5ryEDaDDU96xh2juKBuOUR6lGNYHJ6kd2HyPgDZ0GYyPV6igPsLVt5d7Ij8wttnFa5Z48m650KHROQHvhrElGpYbm8Z3Li8YUIdFrg4FTwq-YJAavqLRotNx3K4ODy_UaLc5TVLmSZyywTV06KTvPmg61ayXXkWTEeAUzpgee0xLQL7k7xfHLnbUu5sTxYW7Rs1TXRa5AJttYv6-k4Eo2SHea-v3LjVmwgjVf_8ITTm387AslzP-1gnJIfAykFUJucUDprtCPorII7Sw2NSDae0ku6ujaDZ3zD7GPGHFE-EccqnuAhtPonWgWx-1dblctHkeafi)
**I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. **

Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but _**what is worth having in life that is easy?**_ I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts.

If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, **[would you please consider a contribution to my campaign for Congress today?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f58088fc61eb4c03bea185130ba6e5ab&_e=x-aCZ2Zd-tr0Lwc84kF8CFfHLEirLdEzpKba1AonSxO-4JYgQtXrcX2PD3Yw6wmQswUcsJ3OHChhMNghxZcmqCMp4rPZcYapRhYToVYAuLpFjGrTTvDuhmWGEGLdxW4ObUbQ_JiYOYNl9qlxrJ0dE-0ItUXCLB0vKbjdEe4GURy5qTAWgoEptzWkp5ryEDaDDU96xh2juKBuOUR6lGNYHJ6kd2HyPgDZ0GYyPV6igPsLVt5d7Ij8wttnFa5Z48m650KHROQHvhrElGpYbm8Z3Li8YUIdFrg4FTwq-YJAavpkYAVowW-tEB7fr52DRZqDcL4y2aODs5HJPKAhmwk8PTvS_rZts7I3UiRf0jbttg7UQSgxAK8jBe3HNIRqUwO4f7F2O1wKN602HZa-9fobIVSgp_WhKqv_bNJ7NlxOf92FQchNGGHbZhf0gjzBleZGAlJz8JUcVNs14S-qVv0f5DO8sQAbNA0Nu_uqvBBVoFXIMlnNoGE76CQ7OHpZqmSo)** I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress.

Republican congressional hopeful asking you for a few minutes of time to tell you my story tod | No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may . Peter, Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans. I’m speaking with authority on the matter: I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative. My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today. I’m a military veteran (I joined at 17), I’m a lawyer (I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school) I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office. The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success. In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is. I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, . I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for. Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts. I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today. I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but what is worth having in life that is easy? I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts. If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress. Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration. If we take back the house we can hold the Democrats accountable and STOP their radical agenda. Democrats, including my Leftist opponent, want to defund the police, introduce critical race theory into our classrooms, and destroy American industries with their tax-and-waste agenda. name: Amy Kremer
subject: I’m guilty
body:
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a014bef918274a479b0868308562c4b0&_e=2lBbdMDxldPL8OcpRdNIqvOQz5g1ILpTrGCe-R2WDyLd0SXKGLSKTHk5WRmoPKiDyNyCzR-EbkLhSuER0ZmtMHC6FYqODnr4ilFI706fRW8JQEaHvnKi5W10XHMbPA_dLeiIsom5ecojg-02_DtFkkriaR--f4_CnYV79Ks2P9Vq6LZHcyWnUNJTUtfwrnASRCCE89CNkygyakxxp3zGtsujsn-T_P3crQwvjbqPBGnzk8vFXL0Lsdp4hZbaLGLfQKz-9CH-p9r42zTb-C41poXy-VxCFITsTU7MxE2-QMepr-z4nwlLSHdMLjz9tY4p2iOHx2WXnIBEDEROBOMI1lQjH4YC-iPnehL6deC26EUgIu3utNIN88RAZHgC0wNiTC4RsOoR89WzG7VPGq4ONOcCHSqHGCFoWGB2tGiCGMU%3D) Dear Fellow Conservative, Nancy Pelosi and her goons in D.C. are after me and my daughter. We organized PEACEFUL rallies for President Trump with all the permits we needed, and now they’re trying to tie us to the January 6th incident at the Capitol, and make an example out of us to patriots across the country. **They want to send a loud clear message: Trump supporters and conservatives don’t have First Amendment rights in the Biden regime.** _They want you to know that if you dare challenge them, they’ll bankrupt you with legal fees at best and make sure you spend the rest of your life rotting in a cell at worst._ [**That’s why I hope I can count on your generous donation to Women for America First, so I can defend not just my daughter, myself and my organization -- but defend freedom fighters like you.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a014bef918274a479b0868308562c4b0&_e=2lBbdMDxldPL8OcpRdNIqvOQz5g1ILpTrGCe-R2WDyLd0SXKGLSKTHk5WRmoPKiDyNyCzR-EbkLhSuER0ZmtMHC6FYqODnr4ilFI706fRW8JQEaHvnKi5W10XHMbPA_dLeiIsom5ecojg-02_DtFkkriaR--f4_CnYV79Ks2P9Vq6LZHcyWnUNJTUtfwrnASRCCE89CNkygyakxxp3zGtnl5uYQaWBFdM0l_MG-IL-Q9JvhsKf019zIk1dwNp4i6I-JwNScOMV0RAPBot2moz_9dpMt6jdQU6g4EiG2T7_o2LC9LWTYA5i1zYg8q4Ld24w3RyfUlu2VHRjQksRsmDC1qCNM1nvvwjNy9DLfTW-VnhaolufylV_S78qKalEOgxhu9KEGaAWtczQzvtJgqXxu_dAPyn8gchIXbowWJ3Io%3D) They sent us a TWENTY PAGE SUBPOENA, and they’ve indefinitely postponed our deposition. Make no mistake -- if this bogus January 6th witch hunt goes on, it won’t stop with me. If these radical Democrats succeed in taking me down, they won’t rest until the American people live in fear of questioning them. The only thing I’m guilty of is demanding a fair and transparent election. Are you guilty of that too? _If you are, it’s only a matter of time before you’re on their list._ **So I need your help preparing an air-tight case that will stop the Pelosi witch hunt in its tracks, and prove my innocence AND yours.[Can I count on your donation today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a014bef918274a479b0868308562c4b0&_e=2lBbdMDxldPL8OcpRdNIqvOQz5g1ILpTrGCe-R2WDyLd0SXKGLSKTHk5WRmoPKiDyNyCzR-EbkLhSuER0ZmtMHC6FYqODnr4ilFI706fRW8JQEaHvnKi5W10XHMbPA_dLeiIsom5ecojg-02_DtFkkriaR--f4_CnYV79Ks2P9Vq6LZHcyWnUNJTUtfwrnASRCCE89CNkygyakxxp3zGtqGXUa-8QvwnqypwF9tLMOnRk1VcvYkSndCCrqgAvu98ZWxfYuIP6dNTjoCK5v16lIf_q-mEa4UG5BsH8e0WQ4rGpvl_LGuknqZGCKrg-4gvsvxJqK9lbblHdzarCQafmM3YwBT0VGhq4uyFv4dzTP8s_JIojRyioWt5INSHsn69XPT7t_ql9E5goIb5LwOc06son9bcc-d2nDyxCAVB-MU%3D)** Before I get any further, I should probably introduce myself. My name is Amy Kremer, and I’m the Co-Founder of Women for America First. I am proud to have raised a strong conservative daughter, Kylie Jane, who works alongside me as Executive Director of Women for America First. I remember election night like it was yesterday. When I saw the videos from election night, the midnight ballot dumps, Trump’s election observers being turned away -- I knew something was wrong. My worst fear had come true. The Democrats were stealing the election right in front of our eyes. But the Republican National Committee said nothing and did nothing. Neither did the PACs that used President Trump’s name to raise MILLIONS. It quickly became clear that our so-called GOP leadership wasn’t going to lift a finger, and if we wanted anything to happen, the American people were going to have to take matters into their own hands. **So that’s exactly what we did.** We rolled up our sleeves and organized a 35+ city bus tour, going from state-to-state fighting for election integrity. On January 6th, we held a peaceful demonstration at the Ellipse, and I’m PROUD of what we did. Our event drew in hundreds of thousands of peaceful protesters, and had NOTHING to do with what happened at the Capitol. We didn’t tell anyone to go to the Capitol, and neither me nor my daughter or anyone from the Women for America First team ever set foot in the Capitol. After our rally was over, we went straight back to our hotel -- after 35+ cities in 39 days, we were exhausted! Now, they’re trying to punish us for something we had NOTHING to do with. **I won’t stand for it -- and I hope you won’t either.** [**Please give me the resources I need to take Nancy Pelosi and her goons head on, and stop their witch hunt before they get to patriots like you.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a014bef918274a479b0868308562c4b0&_e=2lBbdMDxldPL8OcpRdNIqvOQz5g1ILpTrGCe-R2WDyLd0SXKGLSKTHk5WRmoPKiDyNyCzR-EbkLhSuER0ZmtMHC6FYqODnr4ilFI706fRW8JQEaHvnKi5W10XHMbPA_dLeiIsom5ecojg-02_DtFkkriaR--f4_CnYV79Ks2P9Vq6LZHcyWnUNJTUtfwrnASRCCE89CNkygyakxxp3zGtmEb8jlWFmz0wQTwsZ1B8tFfKoO3QwRyaIEodpWc_0AIJzqlf-Y5Gb9zPcJ8TvQpc2H53PkTLnfifcId5VOa5azNBxGcSOjvVK_5lDCW2vvwNU6zoYhydHne6tKXFUfo2yHEoYY3zgJz78Kt6wOkbBs1MFw1pdZ7sYmPT8M28LfMs8-K13XeWRSGJKPMA53gIyg7Dkolj3GiNggBtCGpx3M%3D) Touring the country with my daughter after the election, I saw just how many people are on our side. I saw us gather in the streets by the thousands, and I know they’re coming after me because they’re afraid of what we can accomplish on a united front. But I won’t be intimidated, and I won’t be silenced. I will fight for the future of this country with everything I have -- **but I don’t stand a chance without folks like you by my side.** Thank you for your time. Fight for Liberty, Amy Kremer [**STAND WITH US AGAINST TYRANNY**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a014bef918274a479b0868308562c4b0&_e=2lBbdMDxldPL8OcpRdNIqvOQz5g1ILpTrGCe-R2WDyLd0SXKGLSKTHk5WRmoPKiDyNyCzR-EbkLhSuER0ZmtMHC6FYqODnr4ilFI706fRW8JQEaHvnKi5W10XHMbPA_dLeiIsom5ecojg-02_DtFkkriaR--f4_CnYV79Ks2P9Vq6LZHcyWnUNJTUtfwrnASRCCE89CNkygyakxxp3zGtj6HWAGvoJkiw0sqE6XNw03QlRGR9fI9xu0T9YJneKISf6UJEr7L2SP9nvJDjZibYfA0sPhEEnsTg0X9jMEBjGG_CjdIjTCln5ZtsuhTzRqo7FN0pi2i3Q0YqPNyiV82J4DYSzW2zLf3TgnpSorkQ-rOiD4gCTU305ZA_kHlr4pFvlzLzrXIORdMKmNlczTcj4TemCtlKYGpIFf0FrNpn3A%3D) To MAIL a donation via USPS to our headquarters, please send to:
**Women for America First**
**PO Box 72861**
**Marietta, GA 30007** [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a014bef918274a479b0868308562c4b0&_e=2lBbdMDxldPL8OcpRdNIqvOQz5g1ILpTrGCe-R2WDyLd0SXKGLSKTHk5WRmoPKiDyNyCzR-EbkLhSuER0ZmtMHC6FYqODnr4ilFI706fRW8JQEaHvnKi5W10XHMbPA_dLeiIsom5ecojg-02_DtFkkriaR--f4_CnYV79Ks2P9Vq6LZHcyWnUNJTUtfwrnASRCCE89CNkygyakxxp3zGtuBWDGuI3bvdsRGhel1w8_7RCDEB95D7MaQ92O28fZooBmOHPM0lSBPq4gtHy39aWiACnLJ6uZMetgaFxhYzy55xwcuftiMdMqiluYYjKumZ3Ms11eSJHR9-edJsB5Sw_poXG2FgmI4Q8UQSDYXP06G3JT2btx5gdBdEsbIFbrgweFT1Nbe8QUdWjEoYEmaTvEDuWUjrMx3rcEPqspNup0s%3D) | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a014bef918274a479b0868308562c4b0&_e=2lBbdMDxldPL8OcpRdNIqukJ7xkENHe40zWlcXULeaLVXZLsqVfYce3kg9r5j8IKP_6k9vtIEmxrV81nstav2sgwhZMVWQxpbm95g39mqUjzWNC2tV0UNZmg2UMb45nYPCV7KxEuovysB2OioS5rozKC48lTURXuu4ksJ6jxPadFeS_PZEOXUao-jyQAk1qmFeoxay6hCa9G2NUVHN-J8KwVnM_gFkWK6YFRtKvre-XzMoiK2e0Dm70l6vBT4rM2h8zFno8Qsc6oglrNCiXYtBAa6EIbp8WSfxjK2QaP0Mo%3D) | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a014bef918274a479b0868308562c4b0&_e=2lBbdMDxldPL8OcpRdNIqi_eaZBHX8zDG7Eff3-f3vTurLCWgekiduoOV_Y-3D8LOJJkCbQTtIsb8-wOW4qp2luZVed78eaiGckvrCzt1WQgXTjn8H1I3TZCzeIKq_2bKU8hYKttv8hBgoKMzecOXTNddKEwYa01Tvi8O2WPTYH4pd1i_qZ_-vQFk9VDvG7fcJBl9Ul3QAuTFzNHhZn6ePF888kGmhQVOKc-JaqS65smBwy0nLWobZgm5Tl-Yh9iqo-lXqroFfxn8BUDHBl8zA%3D%3D)

| | Have we done enough to convince you that this is 2021’s most important race, Derek?

Barack Obama was here on Saturday. Stacey Abrams was here on Sunday. Joe Biden was here just yesterday.

The polls are tied and there are 6 days left.

If Youngkin wins, Trumpism gains ground and we can expect Youngkins to sprout up in every race across the country next year. If Youngkin wins, extremism wins and Trump’s path back to the White House is crystal clear.

**_But we’re still not seeing enough support coming in from our grassroots team!_ This election is less than a week out, Derek — we need all hands on deck right now.**

clean_body: Please! | | | = | | Have we done enough to convince you that this is 2021’s most important race, Derek? Barack Obama was here on Saturday. Stacey Abrams was here on Sunday. Joe Biden was here just yesterday. The polls are tied and there are 6 days left. If Youngkin wins, Trumpism gains ground and we can expect Youngkins to sprout up in every race across the country next year. If Youngkin wins, extremism wins and Trump’s path back to the White House is crystal clear. But we’re still not seeing enough support coming in from our grassroots team! This election is less than a week out, Derek — we need all hands on deck right now. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Together, we can stop extremism. But it’s going to take all of us. This is where the rubber meets the road. It’s now or never, folks. = Talk soon, Terry =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

Hi team, When we launched this campaign, the press, the Democratic establishment, and even the incumbent, dismissed us. Patriots—

Let me cut to the chase here.

Gas prices are at their highest levels in almost a decade. Prices in New York City are on their way to $4.00 a gallon and, yesterday, Joe Biden’s response was “I don’t have a near-term answer. It’s gonna be hard.”

President Biden doesn’t have an answer for soaring gas prices, so here is my response: the buck stops with the President, this is his mess and he needs to fix it.

Unbelievably, then Biden said he might not even try to reduce gas prices for hardworking people who are struggling to pay more.

There are no words that can describe this level of failure and betrayal of the American people.

**[We need to stop Joe Biden right now and I need your support to help me do it. body:
| | | There isn't much time left, so I'll make this quick.

Virginians have already begun casting their ballots and there are just 6 days left until Election Day.

If Clinton-ally Terry McAuliffe wins this race, there will be dire consequences for Virginia. He's bad on crime, bad for our economy, and bad for our schools.

If I'm elected, on day one I'll cut exploding costs for families, defend our police instead of defunding them, jumpstart job growth, and ban Critical Race Theory.

_**[If you have anything to spare, I'm asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c08bc09cb94d46a9aebbd071f7f65484&_e=gFZIEj1vY62TkMRgGsX2SXivC7ZHYFYQpdnZrVRM--WOprB9Jb6nI_fh0L3jWJ0atrxu1yIBMuIOLEkBZPaoK5vZOKE4Me6wtTVvIRXjVcJWQf5DTFw5jSuXwio2iOIfH3wgJzlPwcK-glm7RjN8fyVOcOWfPJ4cd385jHXJ7kGAsFznN-NLz5ExM-yJ6xn56lEwE_I0zrgdhT83RgM9MQRZyk3Tmnqk_tCn3U2cbw-KUhnu-tFMY24ZTD2ZBz9-SHIaweFGCJMTZqiRLSGqD5t5xbIvOkjRT1q94jiqe-WGIlb-Y1K5oxwBy7fTfCnykAyryGxG9XuBOeDVTDcRE0f0jKNoXRO4pMsBjzN5q6gupLItceEdV65J3Y8tYVB70WfE_iUd44GdYc457_Jct73QLr4IfnyWvpdXT-6YNoWdOkq4q-KlyLC1RJbDJ9k0SHycIWtD3JN_ybDkpH--lMjUsAeETC7hu5H9_n3Fz6T22JZDYDbRV5R9X1dY-3NcvLgRdIsmVfNn4i5kudwDeB1IdDjLiqmeKhP7HjDZPSg%3D "If you have anything to spare, I’m asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.")**_

All eyes are on Virginia. The results of this election will be used as a guide map for what could follow in next year's midterms.

If Republicans _win_ , it will be a huge blow to the Democrats' hopes of holding onto their majority. But if Republicans _lose_ , Democrats will leverage our loss for their own gain.

We _can_ win. In fact, the latest polls have me and McAuliffe neck-and-neck.

**This race will come down to the final get-out-the-vote efforts.** Every single dollar could impact how many more doors we can knock, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach.

_**[So, can I please count on you to pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $1?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c08bc09cb94d46a9aebbd071f7f65484&_e=gFZIEj1vY62TkMRgGsX2SXivC7ZHYFYQpdnZrVRM--WOprB9Jb6nI_fh0L3jWJ0atrxu1yIBMuIOLEkBZPaoK5vZOKE4Me6wtTVvIRXjVcJWQf5DTFw5jSuXwio2iOIfH3wgJzlPwcK-glm7RjN8fyVOcOWfPJ4cd385jHXJ7kGAsFznN-NLz5ExM-yJ6xn56lEwE_I0zrgdhT83RgM9MQRZyk3Tmnqk_tCn3U2cbw-KUhnu-tFMY24ZTD2ZBz9-SHIaweFGCJMTZqiRLSGqD5t5xbIvOkjRT1q94jiqe-WGIlb-Y1K5oxwBy7fTfCnykAyryGxG9XuBOeDVTDcRE4ip-tl24Id-PlRrATjzslinOyVo78Hh2T4FLFbZEFI1ByUyWcSpgn_TQCmTUQNzUaHq-1nphj3cWhiKt7Yi3BZ-0YDmSV_dglGEXs3p7d5_OFrlZnalEmbNAVWZQ8VIYJgBjZTzupq7b6TBg05DRh3n5FjPBlG2SBAMZvQPDMv17ofMtuZ3wuoaRWc6g3ytYYhscR1jhu5-LIPSpwBwg30%3D "So, can I please count on you to pitch in anything you’re able ASAP, even if it’s just $1?")**_

Glenn Youngkin

clean_body: | | | There isn't much time left, so I'll make this quick. Virginians have already begun casting their ballots and there are just 6 days left until Election Day. If Clinton-ally Terry McAuliffe wins this race, there will be dire consequences for Virginia. He's bad on crime, bad for our economy, and bad for our schools. If I'm elected, on day one I'll cut exploding costs for families, defend our police instead of defunding them, jumpstart job growth, and ban Critical Race Theory. "If you have anything to spare, I’m asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections." | | | All eyes are on Virginia. The results of this election will be used as a guide map for what could follow in next year's midterms. If Republicans win , it will be a huge blow to the Democrats' hopes of holding onto their majority. But if Republicans lose , Democrats will leverage our loss for their own gain. We can win. In fact, the latest polls have me and McAuliffe neck-and-neck. This race will come down to the final get-out-the-vote efforts. Every single dollar could impact how many more doors we can knock, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: 2022 will be a winning year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

It’s the end of the month, which means that political campaigns and PACs
are asking their supporters to chip in whatever they can ahead of critical
end-of-month deadlines.

For too long, fundraising — not grassroots organizing — has been the best
indicator of election success. That is why special interest groups,
corporations, and the ultrawealthy control Congress,
Peter. Why electing working people
and people of color is so difficult. And why we’re working hard to
overcome these obstacles and elect Rana Abdelhamid, Jessica Cisneros, Kina
Collins, Odessa Kelly, and Summer Lee to Congress.

We have a goal to raise $20,000 to the Primary Power Fund by the end of
the month because our slate isn’t backed by right-wing dark money or
corporations, and it’s up to us to make up the difference. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/79939?refcode=em20211027-20208x&t=1002&akid=20208%2E1203867%2EdiA4JT ]Our Justice
Democrats in Congress have taught us about the power of $3, $5, or $27
contributions in disrupting the political establishment. That is why we’re
asking if you’ll chip in a few dollars to our Primary Power Fund
end-of-month goal today?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/79939?refcode=em20211027-20208&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=20208%2E1203867%2EdiA4JT ]Primary Power Fund

Our small but mighty progressive coalition in Congress has already
accomplished so much, and we’re ready to grow our movement by electing
Summer, Jessica, Kina, Odessa, and Rana. But to defeat a political system
dominated by corporate dollars, and in which the outcome of elections is
typically determined by whoever raises the most money, these end-of-month
deadlines can feel “make it or break it.”

We are working to make 2022 a winning year for Justice Democrats. But for
our progressive candidates to join AOC and Bernie in Congress, we need to
hit our end-of-month goal. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/79939?refcode=em20211027-20208&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=20208%2E1203867%2EdiA4JT ]Can we count on you to give $3, $5, or $27
towards the Primary Power Fund today?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/79939?refcode=em20211027-20208&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=20208%2E1203867%2EdiA4JT ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1025&akid=20208%2E1203867%2EdiA4JT ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1026&akid=20208%2E1203867%2EdiA4JT ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211027-20208-footer&t=1027&refcode2=20208_1203867_diA4JT&akid=20208%2E1203867%2EdiA4JT

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1028&akid=20208%2E1203867%2EdiA4JT

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Derek, we’re going to need all hands on deck if we want to pull this off, and I’m counting on you to step up today.

And in four days, my campaign will reach our final end‐of‐month fundraising deadline. So let me quickly tell you why this is so critical:

name: Andrea
subject: Tim needs your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1215%2E3611125%2EpfUBAV ][IMG]

Hi folks,

I’m Andrea -- and Tim Ryan is my husband.

I’m reaching out to you because Tim needs your help. Tim doesn’t ask for
help often -- even though he never hesitates to help others -- so when he
does ask, you know it really matters.

And boy, does this matter.

Tim has dedicated his life to giving everyone a fair shake. I’m a first
grade teacher, so I like to think I know a thing or two about devoting
your life to a cause that matters. In fact, Tim’s dedication to public
service and helping people is one of the main reasons I fell in love with
him.

We need Tim in the Senate because he understands what everyday Ohio
families are going through. He knows the importance of giving our kids a
good education and making sure all of us can get ahead.

But Tim can’t do it alone. This campaign is made up of thousands of
grassroots supporters across the state and country who all believe in
cutting workers in on the deal. We need each and every one of you to step
up and help out where you can.

Tim’s campaign is fast approaching a critical fundraising deadline and
we’re behind. Folks, I wouldn’t be asking if this weren’t so
important.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5708?t=1007&akid=1215%2E3611125%2EpfUBAV ]Can you please chip in $25 so Tim’s campaign can meet its end-of-month
fundraising goals and flip this Senate seat blue?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5708?t=1008&akid=1215%2E3611125%2EpfUBAV ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5709?t=1009&akid=1215%2E3611125%2EpfUBAV ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5710?t=1010&akid=1215%2E3611125%2EpfUBAV ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5711?t=1011&akid=1215%2E3611125%2EpfUBAV ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5712?t=1012&akid=1215%2E3611125%2EpfUBAV ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5708?t=1013&akid=1215%2E3611125%2EpfUBAV ]Other Amount

We really appreciate your support,

Andrea

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5708?t=1014&akid=1215%2E3611125%2EpfUBAV ]Andrea

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=1215%2E3611125%2EpfUBAV ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=1215%2E3611125%2EpfUBAV ]click here.

name: Tom Van Horn
subject: Reminder: Join Doug for a special night in Bethesda!
body:
| Hi friends, We wanted to make sure you saw this invitation to a very special Team Gansler event! They all lied about everything having to do with Russia, Russia, Russia, because they knew it was a SCAM, and they all lied about everything having to do with Ukraine, Ukraine, Ukraine because they knew it was a SCAM. They made up fairy tales about me knowing how badly it would hurt the U.S.A.--and nothing happens to them. Is there no justice in our Country? The Left NEVER stops coming after me, Friend. I'm fighting back (and I'll WIN), but I'm calling on YOU to stand with me. CONFIRM YOUR INFORMATION | You've always been a loyal supporter, Friend. Are you still? Thank you, Donald J. body:
Sign the petition to STOP THEM! Help us stop the Democrats from invading your privacy. Sign Now. | | | | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f8ff898e1a&e=1050d051da)
---
| | | Patriot,

Rep. Jake LaTurner and Republicans in Congress are fighting hard for us, but _**we need your help.**_

**The Democrats have snuck a provision that allows them to spy on YOUR bank account in their Socialist Spending Spree. [Sign the petition to stop them!](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=19dc763ae6&e=1050d051da)**

With all the **crises they've created at our border, in the Middle East, and in our supply chain** , we'd hope they would focus on helping us. Instead, _**they're targeting regular Americans**_ by attempting to violate our financial privacy.

body:
It is with absolute humility that I issue this announcement. I have been nominated for the John Maddox Prize for 2021. The John Maddox Prize
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/b4Np41_vd/c?w=HTsBsOVFJL8YJYnH6tK2dShcEIDo2Zn1zYD2Z-ZM1Mw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmViZWthaGpvbmVzY2FtcGFpZ24uY29tL3NvL2I0TnA0MV92ZD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdlN2E4N2UxLTcwNDMtNDE3OS1iODM4LTVjYTg5MjBmYWFkNyJ9)_**

| | |
---
| | Rebekah Jones: 2021 John Maddox Prize Nominee
---
| |
---
|
---
| | It is with absolute humility that I issue this announcement. I have been nominated for the John Maddox Prize for 2021. The [John Maddox Prize](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/b4Np41_vd/c?w=EM9DIQy4DYPc9N5lMoZAgvV2yXYSnE1wGZTGqBWxtss.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZW5zZWFib3V0c2NpZW5jZS5vcmcvam9obi1tYWRkb3gtcHJpemUvIiwiciI6ImE5YWVjODliLWFlN2MtNDE5MS1jN2U5LTMxOGNiMWI3NmE2NyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdlN2E4N2UxLTcwNDMtNDE3OS1iODM4LTVjYTg5MjBmYWFkNyJ9) is awarded by the world's most prestigious academic publication, [Nature](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/b4Np41_vd/c?w=9SWWZh3rzXoS_f-68mYyRfm-nkTh33Ui-eiSHBkpSio.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmF0dXJlLmNvbS8iLCJyIjoiYTlhZWM4OWItYWU3Yy00MTkxLWM3ZTktMzE4Y2IxYjc2YTY3IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2U3YTg3ZTEtNzA0My00MTc5LWI4MzgtNWNhODkyMGZhYWQ3In0), to scientists and researchers who have "shown great courage and integrity in standing up for science and scientific reasoning against fierce opposition and hostility." "The John Maddox Prize recognises the work of individuals who promote science and evidence, advancing the public discussion around difficult topics despite challenges or hostility." \- Sense About Science ([click here for source](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/b4Np41_vd/c?w=EM9DIQy4DYPc9N5lMoZAgvV2yXYSnE1wGZTGqBWxtss.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZW5zZWFib3V0c2NpZW5jZS5vcmcvam9obi1tYWRkb3gtcHJpemUvIiwiciI6ImE5YWVjODliLWFlN2MtNDE5MS1jN2U5LTMxOGNiMWI3NmE2NyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdlN2E4N2UxLTcwNDMtNDE3OS1iODM4LTVjYTg5MjBmYWFkNyJ9)) My nomination came from France, and while I know I am not going to win, to have even been accepted as a nominee is profoundly and deeply humbling, validating, and proof that the world believes in me and every one of you who has supported me throughout these past 17 months. I am honored and left without words as to how much this nomination means to me and my family, who have endured so much harassment and hatred while I fought for truth and transparency during COVID-19. My fight for data, science and truth isn't over. I'm going to keep fighting that fight as the first woman, first scientist and first Maddox-prize-nominated Congresswoman ever elected to Florida's 1st district. Our most recent poll shows my favorability to be higher than both Gaetz' and Desantis' approval ratings in what all the political establishment said was an R+30 district and "hopeless" to win as a democrat (though, to be fair, I tried to run without a party until I learned of Desantis' new election suppression laws and was forced to switch). We are still in need of ballot petitions to even have my name printed on the ballot. ANY registered voter in the state of Florida can complete and submit a ballot petition - it does not matter what county they're in or what party they're registered with. The form and more information can be found on my campaign website: www.RebekahJonesCampaign.com Our campaign mailing address is: PO BOX 1259, Gulf Breeze, FL 32562Thank you all!
---

clean_body: did you miss this in your inbox? | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Did you miss this in your inbox? We were reviewing responses to a critical we sent you earlier this month on whether there should be a investigation of Trump’s role on January 6th. | | | | | National Republicans are applying HEAVY PRESSURE to stop the January 6th Committee -- That’s why we reached out to get your opinion. Unfortunately you’re one of the only top Democrats that didn’t respond. So, please, we need you to let us know whether you support a thorough investigation into Trump’s involvement in the insurrection: | | | Thank you, your input is critical. \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. | | Derek, we have **just a couple of minutes until our donation match opportunity expires,** so I’ll make this quick. **_[Will you rush $15 to help me hit $1 million before tonight’s deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38010304/313598059/-2023814932?refcode=20211027.13_TM_10IK&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2U4OWU1ZS05ZjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1pNHT32JIzvBFE9t8bVSfTnd2lDjF_3brhUNOgp1f5o=)_**

I’m counting on members of this powerful grassroots team, chipping in $15 at a time. That’s how we’re going to win this race.

**_[So right now, please chip in to my campaign — your contribution could be the one that puts us over the top.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38010305/313598060/-2023814932?refcode=20211027.13_TM_10IK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2U4OWU1ZS05ZjM3LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1pNHT32JIzvBFE9t8bVSfTnd2lDjF_3brhUNOgp1f5o=)_**

Terry

subject: Secret planes and open borders
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c53d3c991bca/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-4980398?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
|
The crisis at our southern border has been raging for months now. Democrats, Republicans, and foreign leaders have called on Biden to do something - he’s been silent, along with his “border czar” Kamala Harris.

Now we find out just what the administration has been up to...here’s a hint, they aren’t doing anything to secure our southern border.

[No, not even close. Instead, they are conducting secret flights in the middle of the night to transport thousands of illegal immigrants throughout the country.
](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=e10dc7c2d9&e=13f35c4add)
They’re doing it under the cover of darkness to hide their failure and prevent you from knowing what's going on - thankfully, the administration has been exposed.

This isn’t leadership. This isn’t even basic competence. No, this administration has been running secret operations to hide the extent of the border crisis from the American people.

[**_> >> Americans deserve better than this disgrace of a President. He’s proved he cannot be trusted to run the nation or keep us safe, it's time to take back the House and stop Biden in his tracks <<<_**](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=7b157e0f90&e=13f35c4add)

**Can you rush $10, $20, or $50 now to help take back our country and defend our Southern border? **

Our October fundraising deadline is only 3 days away, and I’ve set a goal for this campaign to receive donations from over 5,000 individual grassroots supporters. Right now, national Republicans are trying to stack the odds with outside spending so they can flip Nevada bright red.
